тЦ╕Persona: ЁЯОм restaurant_syncЁЯФЧ #story-restaurant_sync ЁЯФМ EXTERNAL ЁЯЧгя╕П fr-FR
The Sirene/Google sync ACL (a scheduled worker) acting as an EXTERNAL caller. It seeds and refreshes public listings on the restaurants' behalf тАФ no human; it issues the same commands an owner would.

ЁЯФ▓ 1. restaurant ЁЯФЧ
Restaurant provider domain: accounts, locations, lifecycle, order-acceptance mode (incl. catalog & order-fulfilment operations performed by restaurant staff).
ЁЯз░ API operations (25)
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО restaurantsЁЯФЧ #query-restaurants
Discover: public list of restaurants. All args are optional filters resolved by the read side (Restaurant); the query returns only matching restaurants. `list` selects a curated/ personalized shelf (the read model resolves its members).
input: ЁЯзй RestaurantsQueryInput { search?: string, tags?: [ЁЯФд Tag], serviceType?: ЁЯФд ServiceType, openNow?: boolean, city?: ЁЯФд CityName, priceRange?: ЁЯФд PriceRange, list?: ЁЯФд RestaurantListKey, listingStatus?: ЁЯФд RestaurantListingStatus, orderableOnly?: boolean }
returns: ЁЯзй Restaurant [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П Restaurant
roles: EVERYONE (open тАФ roles omitted) ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО restaurantЁЯФЧ #query-restaurant
A restaurant + its catalog by slug (multi-tenant resolution by Host or /r/{slug}).
input: ЁЯзй RestaurantQueryInput! { slug: ЁЯФд Slug }
returns: ЁЯзй Restaurant ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П Restaurant
roles: EVERYONE (open тАФ roles omitted) ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО restaurantDeliveriesЁЯФЧ #query-restaurantdeliveries
A restaurant's active delivery jobs (delivery board; ownership enforced server-side).
input: ЁЯзй RestaurantDeliveriesQueryInput! { restaurantId: ЁЯФд RestaurantId, status?: ЁЯФд DeliveryStatus }
returns: ЁЯзй DeliveryJob [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П View_DeliveryJob
roles: RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО pendingRefundsЁЯФЧ #query-pendingrefunds
The refund queue (RefundProcess): refunds opened for decision, with their lifecycle status (status = REQUESTED is the pending, awaiting-decision queue). The restaurant sees its own orders' refunds (restaurant-scoped, ownership enforced server-side); an admin arbitrates across restaurants.
input: ЁЯзй PendingRefundsQueryInput { restaurantId?: ЁЯФд RestaurantId, status?: ЁЯФд RefundStatus }
returns: ЁЯзй Refund [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П View_PendingRefunds
roles: RESTAURANT, ADMIN ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО restaurantLocationsByAccountЁЯФЧ #query-restaurantlocationsbyaccount
All restaurant locations under an account (back-office; ownership enforced server-side).
input: ЁЯзй RestaurantLocationsByAccountQueryInput! { accountId: ЁЯФд RestaurantAccountId }
returns: ЁЯзй Restaurant [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П Restaurant
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V1
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО prospectionPipelineЁЯФЧ #query-prospectionpipeline
B2B prospection pipeline (admin): scored prospects, optionally filtered by minimum score / pipeline status.
input: ЁЯзй ProspectionPipelineQueryInput { minScore?: ЁЯФд ProspectionScore, status?: ЁЯФд ProspectPipelineStatus }
returns: ЁЯзй Prospect [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П ProspectionPipeline
roles: ADMIN ┬╖ V1

ЁЯзй Output types (2)
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй RestaurantЁЯФЧ #type-restaurant
A restaurant (public discovery + single-restaurant header). Navigates to its catalogs.
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П Restaurant
FieldTypeReq.
idЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
accountIdЁЯФд RestaurantAccountIdтмЬ nullable

ЁЯОн Actors (3)
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн RestaurantAccountЁЯФЧ #actor-restaurantaccount
A restaurant account (HubRise: restaurant) that owns one or more Restaurant locations.
ЁЯзй aggregate
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurantAccountтЪб RestaurantAccountRegisteredтЫФ RefAlreadyUsed, тЫФ InvalidCurrency
ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantAccountтЪб RestaurantAccountUpdatedтЫФ RestaurantAccountNotFound, тЫФ NoEditableFieldProvided
ЁЯУй DeleteRestaurantAccountтЪб RestaurantAccountDeletedтЫФ RestaurantAccountNotFound
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн RestaurantЁЯФЧ #actor-restaurant
A single restaurant location: profile, operational status (DRAFT/ACTIVE/INACTIVE), live acceptance mode, and the partnership LISTING funnel (NON_PARTNER тЖТ PASSIVE_PARTNER тЖТ ACTIVE_PARTNER). The Sirene/Google sync is an EXTERNAL ACL that calls RegisterRestaurant / UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile / MarkRestaurantClosed here AS THE OWNER тАФ there is no dedicated pre-registration command; an account-less registration with listingStatus NON_PARTNER is a seeded listing.
ЁЯзй aggregate
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurantтЪб RestaurantRegisteredтЫФ RestaurantAccountNotFound, тЫФ SlugAlreadyTaken, тЫФ RefAlreadyUsed
ЁЯУй ActivateRestaurantтЪб RestaurantActivatedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ RestaurantNotReadyForActivation
ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantтЪб RestaurantUpdatedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ NoEditableFieldProvided
ЁЯУй DeactivateRestaurantтЪб RestaurantDeactivatedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound
ЁЯУй ChangeOrderAcceptanceModeтЪб RestaurantAcceptanceModeChangedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ RestaurantNotActive, тЫФ AcceptanceModeUnchanged
ЁЯУй RemoveRestaurantтЪб RestaurantRemovedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound
ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileтЪб RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdatedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound
ЁЯУй MarkRestaurantClosedтЪб RestaurantMarkedClosedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound
ЁЯУй ClaimRestaurantListingтЪб RestaurantListingClaimedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ ListingOwnershipNotVerified, тЫФ ListingAlreadyClaimed
ЁЯУй OptOutRestaurantListingтЪб RestaurantListingOptedOutтЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ ListingOwnershipNotVerified
ЁЯУй ChangeRestaurantListingStatusтЪб RestaurantListingStatusChangedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound
ЁЯУй ConfigureGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkтЪб RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkConfiguredтЫФ RestaurantNotFound
ЁЯУй VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkтЪб RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkVerifiedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ GbpOrderLinkNotConfigured
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> DRAFT : RestaurantRegistered
  DRAFT --> ACTIVE : RestaurantActivated
  INACTIVE --> ACTIVE : RestaurantActivated
  DRAFT --> INACTIVE : RestaurantDeactivated
  ACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantDeactivated
  DRAFT --> INACTIVE : RestaurantRemoved
  ACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantRemoved
  INACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantRemoved
  DRAFT --> INACTIVE : RestaurantMarkedClosed
  ACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantMarkedClosed
  INACTIVE --> INACTIVE : RestaurantMarkedClosed
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн ProspectЁЯФЧ #actor-prospect
Sales/CRM state of a NON_PARTNER restaurant listing worked as a B2B prospect (ADR-0020); id = restaurantId. The `prospection-acl` worker (EXTERNAL) reads the COMPUTED score from ProspectionPipeline + the schedule, fires HubSpot/Resend/Slack, then records the contact fact here. The score is never an input or an emitted event. First RecordProspectContact is the prospect's birth; anti-spam invariants guard contacts.
ЁЯзй aggregate
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
ЁЯУй RecordProspectContactтЪб ProspectContactedтЫФ ProspectContactLimitReached, тЫФ ProspectContactedTooRecently
ЁЯУй MarkProspectColdтЪб ProspectMarkedColdтЫФ ProspectNotFound
ЁЯУй RecordProspectReplyтЪб ProspectRepliedтЫФ ProspectNotFound

ЁЯУй Commands (19)
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurantAccountЁЯФЧ #command-registerrestaurantaccount
Admin creates a restaurant ACCOUNT (HubRise: restaurant) that will own one or more locations. Account-level facts (legal entity, billing contact, currency, default tax, timezone) live here.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П registerRestaurantAccount ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн RestaurantAccount
emits: тЪб RestaurantAccountRegistered
throws: тЫФ RefAlreadyUsed, тЫФ InvalidCurrency
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantAccountIdЁЯФд RestaurantAccountIdтЬЕ requiredClient-generated id for the new account.
legalNameЁЯФд RestaurantLegalNameтЬЕ required
contactЁЯУж RestaurantContactтмЬ nullable
defaultCurrencyЁЯФд CurrencyCodeтЬЕ required
defaultTaxRateЁЯУж TaxRateтЬЕ required
timezoneЁЯФд TimeZoneтмЬ nullable
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullableHubRise restaurant (account) reference, when seeded externally.

emits: тЪб RestaurantAccountUpdated

тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurantЁЯФЧ #command-registerrestaurant
The single, generic way to register a restaurant LOCATION. Used by an owner/admin onboarding a partner location (accountId set), AND by the Sirene/Google sync ACL seeding a public listing as if it were the owner (no accountId, listingStatus NON_PARTNER, externalIdentifiers from the source). Starts in DRAFT.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П registerRestaurant ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Restaurant
emits: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
throws: тЫФ RestaurantAccountNotFound, тЫФ SlugAlreadyTaken, тЫФ RefAlreadyUsed
FieldTypeReq.Description
modeЁЯФд ModeтмЬ optional
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ requiredClient/ACL-generated id for the new location.
accountIdЁЯФд RestaurantAccountIdтмЬ nullableThe owning account (must already exist) тАФ omitted for a non-partner public listing.
listingStatusЁЯФд RestaurantListingStatusтмЬ nullablePartnership funnel; defaults to NON_PARTNER when omitted (e.g. sync-seeded listing).
slugЁЯФд SlugтЬЕ required
displayNameЁЯФд RestaurantDisplayNameтЬЕ required
contactЁЯУж RestaurantContactтмЬ nullableLocation-specific contact; falls back to the account contact when absent.
websiteЁЯФд WebUrlтмЬ nullable
tags[ЁЯФд Tag]тмЬ optional
marginRateЁЯФд MarginPercentтмЬ nullableFood margin %, input to the service-fee split (ADR-0017).
cuisineCategoryЁЯФд CuisineCategoryтмЬ nullableCuisine bucket; selects the Uber Eats price-estimate coefficient (ADR-0024).
uberPricesOptInbooleanтмЬ nullableAuthorize showing real Uber Eats prices for comparison (ADR-0023 opt-in).
addressЁЯУж AddressтЬЕ required
locationЁЯУж GeoPointтмЬ nullableGeo coordinates (typically from the Google Maps sync).
timezoneЁЯФд TimeZoneтмЬ nullableLocation timezone; falls back to the account timezone when absent.
preparationTimeMinutesintegerтмЬ nullable
openingHours[ЁЯУж OpeningHoursSlot]тмЬ optional
externalIdentifiers[ЁЯУж ExternalIdentifier]тмЬ optionalSource-agnostic identifiers preserving original keys (siret/naf/google_place_idтАж). Not unique.
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullableSet only when seeded from an external source (e.g. HubRise location).

тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileЁЯФЧ #command-updaterestaurantgooglebusinessprofile
Record GBP-SPECIFIC metrics (Google place id + rating/reviews) for a restaurant. Issued by the Sirene/Google sync ACL (or admin). Carries ONLY Google-listing data тАФ general restaurant info (name/address/hours/phone/website/tags) is set via Register/UpdateRestaurant, so the two data sources stay independent.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П updateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Restaurant

throws: тЫФ RestaurantNotFound

reviewsCountintegerтмЬ nullable

тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй ClaimRestaurantListingЁЯФЧ #command-claimrestaurantlisting
An owner claims a public listing. Ownership is proven by verifying the restaurant's Google Business Profile (delegated to Google as a start); the backend validates the proof server-side before accepting.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П claimRestaurantListing ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Restaurant
emits: тЪб RestaurantListingClaimed
throws: тЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ ListingOwnershipNotVerified, тЫФ ListingAlreadyClaimed
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
accountIdЁЯФд RestaurantAccountIdтмЬ nullableAccount to attach the claimed listing to, when the claimant already has one.
googleOwnershipProofstringтЬЕ requiredOpaque Google Business Profile ownership proof/token, verified server-side.

тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй RecordProspectContactЁЯФЧ #command-recordprospectcontact
Record a B2B outreach contact to a prospect. The worker decides WHO/WHEN from the read-model score + schedule; this just records the fact. First contact is the prospect's birth. Anti-spam invariants apply.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П recordProspectContact ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Prospect
emits: тЪб ProspectContacted
throws: тЫФ ProspectContactLimitReached, тЫФ ProspectContactedTooRecently
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
channelЁЯФд OutreachChannelтЬЕ required
sequenceStepintegerтЬЕ required

Mark a prospect cold (no reply by J+21); stops the outreach sequence.

emits: тЪб ProspectMarkedCold
throws: тЫФ ProspectNotFound

reasonstringтмЬ nullable

тЦ╕Event: тЪб RestaurantRegisteredЁЯФЧ #event-restaurantregistered
A restaurant location has been registered. Covers every path: an owner/admin onboarding a partner location (with accountId), or the Sirene/Google sync ACL seeding a public NON_PARTNER listing (no accountId). The listingStatus and externalIdentifiers distinguish them.

consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П Restaurant, ЁЯЧДя╕П ProspectionPipeline

listingStatusЁЯФд RestaurantListingStatusтЬЕ required
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullable
externalIdentifiers[ЁЯУж ExternalIdentifier]тмЬ optional
slugЁЯФд SlugтЬЕ required
displayNameЁЯФд RestaurantDisplayNameтЬЕ required
contactЁЯУж RestaurantContactтмЬ nullable
websiteЁЯФд WebUrlтмЬ nullable
tags[ЁЯФд Tag]тмЬ optional
marginRateЁЯФд MarginPercentтмЬ nullable

тЦ╕Event: тЪб RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdatedЁЯФЧ #event-restaurantgooglebusinessprofileupdated
GBP-SPECIFIC metrics for the restaurant's Google Business Profile (place id + Google's rating/reviews) were observed/refreshed. Carries ONLY data intrinsic to the Google listing тАФ never general restaurant info (name/address/hours/phone/website/tags), which flows through Register/UpdateRestaurant. This keeps Sirene and Google feeding the same restaurant side-by-side with no cross-source dependency.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Restaurant
consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П Restaurant, ЁЯЧДя╕П ProspectionPipeline
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
googlePlaceIdЁЯФд GooglePlaceIdтмЬ nullable
ratingЁЯФд GoogleRatingтмЬ nullable
reviewsCountintegerтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Event: тЪб RestaurantListingClaimedЁЯФЧ #event-restaurantlistingclaimed
An owner proved ownership of the listing (Google Business Profile verification) and claimed it.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Restaurant
consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П Restaurant
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
accountIdЁЯФд RestaurantAccountIdтмЬ nullable
proofstringтмЬ optionalReference to the accepted Google ownership proof (audit; the token itself is not stored).

consumed by: тАФ

A B2B outreach contact was made to a prospect (NON_PARTNER listing) in the sequence.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Prospect
consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П ProspectionPipeline
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
channelЁЯФд OutreachChannelтЬЕ required
sequenceStepintegerтЬЕ requiredDay-offset step in the sequence (e.g. 0 = J+0, 7 = J+7 relance, 21 = J+21).
тЦ╕Event: тЪб ProspectMarkedColdЁЯФЧ #event-prospectmarkedcold
A prospect was marked cold (e.g. no reply by J+21); the outreach sequence stops.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Prospect
consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П ProspectionPipeline

restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
reasonstringтмЬ nullable

projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П ProspectionPipeline

notestringтмЬ nullable
ЁЯУж Entities (7)
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж OpeningHoursSlotЁЯФЧ #entity-openinghoursslot
One opening time window for a given weekday (HubRise opening_hours).
FieldTypeReq.Description
weekdayЁЯФд WeekdayтЬЕ required
fromЁЯФд TimeOfDayтЬЕ required
toЁЯФд TimeOfDayтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж RestaurantContactЁЯФЧ #entity-restaurantcontact
Both fields optional: HubRise locations do not expose email/phone, so an imported restaurant starts without contact info, to be completed by the admin.
FieldTypeReq.Description
emailЁЯФд EmailAddressтмЬ nullable
phoneЁЯФд PhoneNumberтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж GeoPointЁЯФЧ #entity-geopoint
WGS84 geographic coordinates of the restaurant location (e.g. from Google Maps, for map display & distance).
FieldTypeReq.Description
latitudeЁЯФд LatitudeтЬЕ required
longitudeЁЯФд LongitudeтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж ExternalIdentifierЁЯФЧ #entity-externalidentifier
A generic external identifier kept on a Restaurant listing, preserving the ORIGINAL source key/value (e.g. siret/naf from INSEE Sirene, google_place_id from Google, hubrise_ref). Source-agnostic and multi-valued: a restaurant may carry several, and a key (e.g. siret) is NOT unique across restaurants.
FieldTypeReq.Description
keyЁЯФд ExternalIdentifierKeyтЬЕ required
valuestringтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж ProspectЁЯФЧ #entity-prospect
Sales/CRM state of a NON_PARTNER restaurant listing being worked as a B2B prospect (ADR-0020). Id is the restaurantId (1:1). The prospection SCORE is NOT here тАФ it is computed by the ProspectionPipeline projection, never stored. This holds only the outreach state.
FieldTypeReq.Description
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
pipelineStatusЁЯФд ProspectPipelineStatusтЬЕ required
lastContactedAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж RestaurantAccountЁЯФЧ #entity-restaurantaccount
The business account that owns one or more restaurant locations (HubRise: restaurant).
FieldTypeReq.Description
idЁЯФд RestaurantAccountIdтЬЕ required
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullableHubRise restaurant (account) reference, when imported.
legalNameЁЯФд RestaurantLegalNameтЬЕ required
contactЁЯУж RestaurantContactтЬЕ required
defaultCurrencyЁЯФд CurrencyCodeтЬЕ required
defaultTaxRateЁЯУж TaxRateтЬЕ required
timezoneЁЯФд TimeZoneтмЬ nullable
createdByЁЯФд UserIdтЬЕ required
createdAtstring date-timeтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж RestaurantЁЯФЧ #entity-restaurant
A single restaurant location (HubRise: location); belongs to a RestaurantAccount.
FieldTypeReq.Description
modeЁЯФд ModeтмЬ optional
idЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
accountIdЁЯФд RestaurantAccountIdтмЬ nullableThe owning RestaurantAccount; NULL for a non-partner listing (no account yet), set on claim/conversion.
listingStatusЁЯФд RestaurantListingStatusтЬЕ requiredPartnership funnel: NON_PARTNER (seeded from open data) тЖТ PASSIVE_PARTNER тЖТ ACTIVE_PARTNER.
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullableHubRise location reference, when imported.
externalIdentifiers[ЁЯУж ExternalIdentifier]тмЬ optionalSource-agnostic identifiers preserving original keys (siret/naf/google_place_id/hubrise_refтАж). Not unique.
googlePlaceIdЁЯФд GooglePlaceIdтмЬ nullableGoogle Place id, when known (enrichment / GBP).
slugЁЯФд SlugтЬЕ required
displayNameЁЯФд RestaurantDisplayNameтЬЕ required
contactЁЯУж RestaurantContactтмЬ nullableLocation-specific contact; falls back to the account contact when absent.
websiteЁЯФд WebUrlтмЬ nullableRestaurant website (general restaurant info; any source may provide it).
tags[ЁЯФд Tag]тмЬ optionalCuisine/attribute tags (general restaurant info; source-agnostic).
marginRateЁЯФд MarginPercentтмЬ nullableFood margin %, input to the Captain service-fee split (ADR-0017); null тЖТ 0 restaurant contribution.
cuisineCategoryЁЯФд CuisineCategoryтмЬ nullableSINGLE primary cuisine, selects the Uber Eats estimate coefficient (ADR-0024); null тЖТ no estimate. Multi-cuisine discovery lives in `tags`.
uberPricesOptInbooleanтмЬ nullableThe restaurant authorized showing its real Uber Eats prices for comparison (ADR-0023 opt-in). Null/false тЖТ estimate only.
addressЁЯУж AddressтЬЕ required
locationЁЯУж GeoPointтмЬ nullableGeo coordinates (general restaurant info; typically from the Google Maps sync).
statusЁЯФд RestaurantStatusтЬЕ required
orderAcceptanceЁЯФд OrderAcceptanceModeтЬЕ required
timezoneЁЯФд TimeZoneтмЬ nullableLocation timezone (a chain may span zones); falls back to the account timezone when absent.
preparationTimeMinutesintegerтмЬ nullableBase preparation time (HubRise preparation_time).
openingHours[ЁЯУж OpeningHoursSlot]тмЬ optional
createdByЁЯФд UserIdтЬЕ required
createdAtstring date-timeтЬЕ required
ЁЯФд Scalars (23)
ScalarTypeDescription
ЁЯФд RestaurantAccountIdstring uuidRestaurant account (HubRise: restaurant) тАФ groups one or more Restaurant locations.
ЁЯФд UserIdstring uuid
ЁЯФд ExternalIdentifierKeystringKey of a generic external identifier kept on a Restaurant listing (see entities.yaml#/ExternalIdentifier). Open vocabulary preserving the ORIGINAL source key; well-known values: 'siret', 'naf', 'google_place_id', 'hubrise_ref'. NOTE: external ids are NOT assumed unique тАФ one SIRET can host several dark-kitchen brands; cross-reference sources (a google_place_id usually distinguishes them).
ЁЯФд GooglePlaceIdstringGoogle Maps Place id identifying the establishment (enrichment / Business Profile).
ЁЯФд LatitudenumberWGS84 latitude in decimal degrees.
ЁЯФд LongitudenumberWGS84 longitude in decimal degrees.
ЁЯФд GoogleRatingnumberGoogle Maps / Business Profile average rating (0тАУ5), enrichment only.
ЁЯФд WebUrlstring ^https?://An http(s) URL тАФ restaurant website or the Google Business Profile 'Order online' link.
ЁЯФд RestaurantLegalNamestringLegal entity name used for invoices and contracts. Example: 'SARL CHEZ MARCO', 'TOKYO SUSHI RESTAURATION SAS'.
ЁЯФд CityNamestring
ЁЯФд MarginPercentnumberA restaurant's food margin (%), input to the proportional Captain service fee (ADR-0016/0017): the restaurant's variable contribution scales with clamp((marginтИТ55)/(70тИТ55),0,1). Example: 62.0.
ЁЯФд Weekdayenum (MONDAY | TUESDAY | WEDNESDAY | THURSDAY | FRIDAY | SATURDAY | SUNDAY)
ЁЯФд TimeOfDaystring ^([01][0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$Local time of day, HH:mm (HubRise opening_hours format).
ЁЯФд RestaurantStatusenum (DRAFT | ACTIVE | INACTIVE)
ЁЯФд RestaurantListingStatusenum (NON_PARTNER | PASSIVE_PARTNER | ACTIVE_PARTNER)Partnership funnel of a restaurant LISTING, orthogonal to RestaurantStatus (the operational DRAFT/ACTIVE/INACTIVE state). Orderable тЗФ ACTIVE_PARTNER + RestaurantStatus ACTIVE + acceptance тЙа PAUSED.
ЁЯФд GbpLinkStatusenum (UNSET | CONFIGURED | VERIFIED | BROKEN)State of the restaurant's Google Business Profile 'Order online' link to {slug}.captain.food (ADR-0021; V1).
ЁЯФд ProspectionScoreintegerB2B prospection priority (0тАУ10), COMPUTED by the ProspectionPipeline projection from listing facts (ADR-0020) тАФ never stored in an event.
ЁЯФд ProspectPipelineStatusenum (NEW | CONTACTED | COLD | REPLIED | CONVERTED)Prospect funnel stage, DERIVED in the pipeline projection: NEW (no contact) тЖТ CONTACTED тЖТ COLD (J+21) / REPLIED, and CONVERTED when the restaurant reaches ACTIVE_PARTNER.
ЁЯФд OutreachChannelenum (EMAIL | SLACK | PHONE)Channel of a prospection contact (email via Resend, Slack alert, or phone).
ЁЯФд OrderAcceptanceModeenum (NORMAL | BUSY | PAUSED)Current order acceptance mode of a restaurant (HubRise: order_acceptance).
ЁЯФд PriceRangeenum (BUDGET | MODERATE | PREMIUM)Coarse price tier of a restaurant, used as a discovery filter (UI: $ / $$ / $$$).
ЁЯФд CuisineCategoryenum (FAST_FOOD | PIZZA | TRADITIONAL | BISTRONOMIC | FOOD_TRUCK)A restaurant's SINGLE primary/representative cuisine bucket, used only to select ONE Uber Eats mark-up coefficient in View_UberEstimationPolicy (ADR-0024): FAST_FOOD 1.30, PIZZA 1.35, TRADITIONAL 1.40, BISTRONOMIC 1.45, FOOD_TRUCK 1.35. NOT for discovery тАФ a restaurant may belong to several cuisines for browsing/filtering; that is the multi-valued `Restaurant.tags`. This is deliberately one value because the estimate needs a single coefficient.
ЁЯФд RestaurantListKeyenum (ORDER_AGAIN | RECOMMENDED | TOP_DEALS | GREEN_PACKAGING)Named, read-side-curated/personalized discovery shelf for the restaurants query. The read model resolves the actual member restaurants (editorial rules / customer history); the client just asks for a list by key.
тЫФ Errors (13)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
тЫФ RestaurantAccountNotFoundNo restaurant account with this id (e.g. registering a location under a missing account).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Restaurant account not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Compte restaurant introuvable.ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantAccount, ЁЯУй DeleteRestaurantAccount, ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurant
тЫФ SlugAlreadyTakenAnother restaurant already uses this slug.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The address '{slug}' is already taken.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ L'adresse '{slug}' est d├йj├а utilis├йe.ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurant
тЫФ RefAlreadyUsedThe external reference (idempotent import key) is already owned by another aggregate.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The reference '{ref}' is already in use.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ La r├йf├йrence '{ref}' est d├йj├а utilis├йe.ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurantAccount, ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurant
тЫФ InvalidCurrencyCurrency is not a valid ISO 4217 code.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз '{currency}' is not a valid currency.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ '{currency}' n'est pas une devise valide.ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurantAccount
тЫФ RestaurantNotActiveOperation requires an ACTIVE restaurant.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The restaurant '{restaurantName}' is not active.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Le restaurant '{restaurantName}' n'est pas actif.ЁЯУй ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode
тЫФ RestaurantNotReadyForActivationActivation requires at least one catalog with one orderable offer.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Add at least one orderable product before activating '{restaurantName}'.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Ajoutez au moins un produit commandable avant d'activer '{restaurantName}'.ЁЯУй ActivateRestaurant
тЫФ AcceptanceModeUnchangedRequested acceptance mode equals the current one.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз '{restaurantName}' is already in '{mode}' mode.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ '{restaurantName}' est d├йj├а en mode '{mode}'.ЁЯУй ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode
тЫФ ListingAlreadyClaimedThe restaurant listing has already been claimed by an owner.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This restaurant listing has already been claimed.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Cette fiche restaurant a d├йj├а ├йt├й revendiqu├йe.ЁЯУй ClaimRestaurantListing
тЫФ ListingOwnershipNotVerifiedCould not verify ownership of the listing (Google Business Profile proof rejected).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз We couldn't verify that you own this restaurant. Please confirm via your Google Business Profile.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Nous n'avons pas pu v├йrifier que ce restaurant vous appartient. Confirmez via votre fiche Google Business Profile.ЁЯУй ClaimRestaurantListing, ЁЯУй OptOutRestaurantListing
тЫФ GbpOrderLinkNotConfiguredNo Google Business Profile 'Order online' link is configured to verify.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Configure the Google 'Order online' link before verifying it.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Configurez le lien Google ┬л Commander en ligne ┬╗ avant de le v├йrifier.ЁЯУй VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink
тЫФ ProspectContactLimitReachedThe prospect already received the maximum number of outreach contacts (anti-spam: тЙд 3).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This prospect has already been contacted the maximum number of times.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Ce prospect a d├йj├а ├йt├й contact├й le nombre maximum de fois.ЁЯУй RecordProspectContact
тЫФ ProspectContactedTooRecentlyA new contact is too soon after the previous one (anti-spam: тЙе 7 days apart).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This prospect was contacted too recently; wait before contacting again.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Ce prospect a ├йt├й contact├й trop r├йcemment ; patientez avant de le recontacter.ЁЯУй RecordProspectContact
тЫФ ProspectNotFoundNo prospect (contact history) exists for this restaurant.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Prospect not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Prospect introuvable.ЁЯУй MarkProspectCold, ЁЯУй RecordProspectReply
ЁЯУР Business rules (19)
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР AccountRegistrationValidCurrencyUniqueRefЁЯФЧ #rule-accountregistrationvalidcurrencyuniqueref
A restaurant account is registered only with a valid ISO currency and a not-already-used external ref.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountRegistered, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountRegisterIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР AccountUpdateRequiresExistingAccountAndFieldЁЯФЧ #rule-accountupdaterequiresexistingaccountandfield
Account-level fields update only for an existing account and when at least one editable field is provided.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountUpdated, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountUpdateIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР AccountDeletionЁЯФЧ #rule-accountdeletion
A restaurant account can be deleted.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountDeleted
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР LocationRegistrationUnderAccountUniqueSlugЁЯФЧ #rule-locationregistrationunderaccountuniqueslug
A location is registered under an existing account with a unique slug and a not-already-used external ref.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantLocationRegistered, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantRegisterIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RestaurantActivationVisibilityЁЯФЧ #rule-restaurantactivationvisibility
Activating a restaurant makes it visible/orderable; activation is rejected from an invalid state.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantActivated, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantActivateIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RestaurantActivationIdempotentЁЯФЧ #rule-restaurantactivationidempotent
Re-activating an already-active restaurant is a no-op (idempotent).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantActivateAgainIsNoOp
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RestaurantLocationFieldsUpdateЁЯФЧ #rule-restaurantlocationfieldsupdate
Editable location fields can be updated; an update to a missing location or with no field is rejected.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantUpdated, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantUpdateIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RestaurantDeactivationЁЯФЧ #rule-restaurantdeactivation
A restaurant can be deactivated (hidden from customers).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantDeactivated
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР OrderAcceptanceModeManagementЁЯФЧ #rule-orderacceptancemodemanagement
The order-acceptance mode reflects kitchen capacity and is rejected from an invalid state.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAcceptanceModeChanged, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAcceptanceModeIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RestaurantRemovalЁЯФЧ #rule-restaurantremoval
A restaurant location can be removed.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantRemoved
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ListingSeededFromOpenDataЁЯФЧ #rule-listingseededfromopendata
A public NON_PARTNER listing can be seeded from open data (Sirene/Google) with no account, preserving source identifiers.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantSeededFromSync
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР GoogleBusinessProfileEnrichmentЁЯФЧ #rule-googlebusinessprofileenrichment
Google Business Profile data (rating/reviews/hoursтАж) is stored separately from the restaurant's own info.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ClosedListingSyncedFromSourceЁЯФЧ #rule-closedlistingsyncedfromsource
A listing reported closed by the source is marked closed.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantMarkedClosed
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ListingClaimRequiresVerifiedOwnershipЁЯФЧ #rule-listingclaimrequiresverifiedownership
A listing can be claimed only with verified ownership, and only once.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingClaimed, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingClaimUnverifiedIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingClaimAgainIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ListingOptOutЁЯФЧ #rule-listingoptout
A restaurant can opt a listing out.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingOptedOut
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ListingFunnelProgressionЁЯФЧ #rule-listingfunnelprogression
A listing progresses through the partnership funnel (NON_PARTNER тЖТ PASSIVE_PARTNER тЖТ ACTIVE_PARTNER).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingStatusChanged
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР GbpOrderLinkSetupAndVerificationЁЯФЧ #rule-gbporderlinksetupandverification
The Google 'Order online' link can be configured and verified; verification is rejected when it fails.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkConfigured, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkVerified, ЁЯзк TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkVerifyIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ProspectContactScheduleAndLimitЁЯФЧ #rule-prospectcontactscheduleandlimit
A prospect contact is recorded only within the outreach schedule and under the contact limit.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestProspectContacted, ЁЯзк TestProspectContactedTooRecently, ЁЯзк TestProspectContactLimitReached
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ProspectOutreachStateTransitionsЁЯФЧ #rule-prospectoutreachstatetransitions
A prospect can be marked cold or replied; acting on a missing prospect is rejected.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestProspectMarkedCold, ЁЯзк TestProspectReplied, ЁЯзк TestProspectMarkColdNotFound
ЁЯзк Tests (3)

ЁЯОн RestaurantAccount

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountRegisteredЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantaccountregistered
Registers a restaurant account
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurantAccount
then: тЪб RestaurantAccountRegistered
verifies: ЁЯУР AccountRegistrationValidCurrencyUniqueRef
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountRegisterIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantaccountregisterisrejected
Rejects registering an account with an invalid currency or an already-used external ref
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurantAccount
thrown: тЫФ InvalidCurrency, тЫФ RefAlreadyUsed
verifies: ЁЯУР AccountRegistrationValidCurrencyUniqueRef
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountUpdatedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantaccountupdated
Updates account-level fields (legal name)
given: тЪб RestaurantAccountRegistered
when: ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantAccount
then: тЪб RestaurantAccountUpdated
verifies: ЁЯУР AccountUpdateRequiresExistingAccountAndField
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountUpdateIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantaccountupdateisrejected
Rejects updating a missing account or an update with no editable field
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantAccount
thrown: тЫФ RestaurantAccountNotFound, тЫФ NoEditableFieldProvided
verifies: ЁЯУР AccountUpdateRequiresExistingAccountAndField
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAccountDeletedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantaccountdeleted
Deletes a restaurant account
given: тЪб RestaurantAccountRegistered
when: ЁЯУй DeleteRestaurantAccount
then: тЪб RestaurantAccountDeleted
verifies: ЁЯУР AccountDeletion

ЁЯОн Restaurant

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantLocationRegisteredЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantlocationregistered
Registers a location under an existing account
given: тЪб RestaurantAccountRegistered
when: ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurant
then: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
verifies: ЁЯУР LocationRegistrationUnderAccountUniqueSlug
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantRegisterIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantregisterisrejected
Rejects registering a location when the account is missing, the slug is taken, or the external ref is already used
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurant
thrown: тЫФ RestaurantAccountNotFound, тЫФ SlugAlreadyTaken, тЫФ RefAlreadyUsed
verifies: ЁЯУР LocationRegistrationUnderAccountUniqueSlug
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantActivatedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantactivated
Activates a registered restaurant
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ActivateRestaurant
then: тЪб RestaurantActivated
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantActivationVisibility
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantActivateAgainIsNoOpЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantactivateagainisnoop
Re-activating an already-active restaurant is a no-op (idempotent)
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantActivated
when: ЁЯУй ActivateRestaurant
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantActivationIdempotent
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantActivateIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantactivateisrejected
Rejects activating a missing restaurant or one with no orderable offer
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй ActivateRestaurant
thrown: тЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ RestaurantNotReadyForActivation
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantActivationVisibility
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantUpdatedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantupdated
Updates editable location fields (display name)
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurant
then: тЪб RestaurantUpdated
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantLocationFieldsUpdate
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantUpdateIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantupdateisrejected
Rejects updating a missing restaurant or an update with no editable field
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurant
thrown: тЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ NoEditableFieldProvided
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantLocationFieldsUpdate
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantDeactivatedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantdeactivated
Deactivates an active restaurant
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantActivated
when: ЁЯУй DeactivateRestaurant
then: тЪб RestaurantDeactivated
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantDeactivation
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAcceptanceModeChangedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantacceptancemodechanged
Switches an active restaurant to BUSY
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantActivated
when: ЁЯУй ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode
then: тЪб RestaurantAcceptanceModeChanged
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderAcceptanceModeManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantAcceptanceModeIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantacceptancemodeisrejected
Rejects changing acceptance mode when the restaurant is inactive or already in that mode
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode
thrown: тЫФ RestaurantNotActive, тЫФ AcceptanceModeUnchanged
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderAcceptanceModeManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantRemovedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantremoved
Removes (delists) a location from its account
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй RemoveRestaurant
then: тЪб RestaurantRemoved
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantRemoval
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantSeededFromSyncЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantseededfromsync
Sync ACL seeds a public NON_PARTNER listing (no account)
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RegisterRestaurant
then: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
verifies: ЁЯУР ListingSeededFromOpenData
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdatedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantgooglebusinessprofileupdated
Records Google Business Profile enrichment
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile
then: тЪб RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileUpdated
verifies: ЁЯУР GoogleBusinessProfileEnrichment
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantMarkedClosedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantmarkedclosed
Marks a listing closed (Sirene closure)
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй MarkRestaurantClosed
then: тЪб RestaurantMarkedClosed
verifies: ЁЯУР ClosedListingSyncedFromSource
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingClaimedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantlistingclaimed
Owner claims a listing with a valid Google ownership proof
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ClaimRestaurantListing
then: тЪб RestaurantListingClaimed
verifies: ЁЯУР ListingClaimRequiresVerifiedOwnership
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingClaimUnverifiedIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantlistingclaimunverifiedisrejected
Rejects a claim whose Google ownership proof fails
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ClaimRestaurantListing
thrown: тЫФ ListingOwnershipNotVerified
verifies: ЁЯУР ListingClaimRequiresVerifiedOwnership
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingClaimAgainIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantlistingclaimagainisrejected
Rejects claiming an already-claimed listing
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantListingClaimed
when: ЁЯУй ClaimRestaurantListing
thrown: тЫФ ListingAlreadyClaimed
verifies: ЁЯУР ListingClaimRequiresVerifiedOwnership
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingOptedOutЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantlistingoptedout
Owner opts a listing out (proven via GBP)
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй OptOutRestaurantListing
then: тЪб RestaurantListingOptedOut
verifies: ЁЯУР ListingOptOut
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantListingStatusChangedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantlistingstatuschanged
Admin moves a listing along the partnership funnel
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ChangeRestaurantListingStatus
then: тЪб RestaurantListingStatusChanged
verifies: ЁЯУР ListingFunnelProgression
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkConfiguredЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantgbporderlinkconfigured
Configures the Google 'Order online' link
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ConfigureGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink
then: тЪб RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkConfigured
verifies: ЁЯУР GbpOrderLinkSetupAndVerification
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkVerifiedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantgbporderlinkverified
Verifies the configured Google 'Order online' link
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkConfigured
when: ЁЯУй VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink
then: тЪб RestaurantGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLinkVerified
verifies: ЁЯУР GbpOrderLinkSetupAndVerification
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRestaurantGbpOrderLinkVerifyIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrestaurantgbporderlinkverifyisrejected
Rejects verifying when no order link is configured
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink
thrown: тЫФ GbpOrderLinkNotConfigured
verifies: ЁЯУР GbpOrderLinkSetupAndVerification

ЁЯОн Prospect

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestProspectContactedЁЯФЧ #test-testprospectcontacted
Records the first prospection contact (prospect is born)
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RecordProspectContact
then: тЪб ProspectContacted
verifies: ЁЯУР ProspectContactScheduleAndLimit
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestProspectContactedTooRecentlyЁЯФЧ #test-testprospectcontactedtoorecently
Rejects a new contact too soon after the previous one (тЙе7 days apart)
given: тЪб ProspectContacted
when: ЁЯУй RecordProspectContact
thrown: тЫФ ProspectContactedTooRecently
verifies: ЁЯУР ProspectContactScheduleAndLimit
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestProspectContactLimitReachedЁЯФЧ #test-testprospectcontactlimitreached
Rejects a 4th contact (anti-spam: тЙд 3)
given: тЪб ProspectContacted, тЪб ProspectContacted, тЪб ProspectContacted
when: ЁЯУй RecordProspectContact
thrown: тЫФ ProspectContactLimitReached
verifies: ЁЯУР ProspectContactScheduleAndLimit
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestProspectMarkedColdЁЯФЧ #test-testprospectmarkedcold
Marks a contacted prospect cold
given: тЪб ProspectContacted
when: ЁЯУй MarkProspectCold
then: тЪб ProspectMarkedCold
verifies: ЁЯУР ProspectOutreachStateTransitions
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestProspectRepliedЁЯФЧ #test-testprospectreplied
Records a prospect reply
given: тЪб ProspectContacted
when: ЁЯУй RecordProspectReply
then: тЪб ProspectReplied
verifies: ЁЯУР ProspectOutreachStateTransitions
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestProspectMarkColdNotFoundЁЯФЧ #test-testprospectmarkcoldnotfound
Rejects marking cold a prospect that was never contacted
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй MarkProspectCold
thrown: тЫФ ProspectNotFound
verifies: ЁЯУР ProspectOutreachStateTransitions
ЁЯУб Observability (1)
тЦ╕Contract: ЁЯУб prospectionЁЯФЧ #obs-prospection
criticality: medium
workflow: ┬╖ command ЁЯУй RecordProspectContact
emits: тЪб ProspectContacted ┬╖ inbound: тАФ
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idcommand.correlation_idтЬЕтАФ
trace_idotel.trace_idтЬЕтАФ
restaurant_iddomain.aggregate_idтЬЕЁЯФд RestaurantId
spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
pipeline.readINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.score*
outreach.dispatchCLIENTтЬЕтАФmessaging.system*, business.channel*, business.sequence_step*
command.receiveSERVERтЬЕтАФbusiness.command_type*
event.store.appendINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.event_type*
event.publishPRODUCERтЬЕтАФbusiness.event_type*
metrics: prospect_contact_duration_ms (histogram) ┬╖ business: prospect_contacts_sent_total (counter), prospects_converted_total (counter), prospects_cold_total (counter)
success тЗР spans: pipeline.read, outreach.dispatch, event.store.append, event.publish
SLOs: p95 тЙд 2000ms ┬╖ p99 тЙд 5000ms ┬╖ error тЙд 5%
ЁЯФ▓ 2. catalog ЁЯФЧ
Catalog tree, products, offers (SKUs), option lists, per-offer stock; HubRise import.
ЁЯз░ API operations (14)
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО catalogЁЯФЧ #query-catalog
A restaurant's full catalog (categories тЖТ products тЖТ offers + option lists).
input: ЁЯзй CatalogQueryInput! { restaurantId: ЁЯФд RestaurantId }
returns: ЁЯзй Catalog ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П Catalog
roles: EVERYONE (open тАФ roles omitted) ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО categoriesЁЯФЧ #query-categories
The category tree of a restaurant's catalog (for filtering & product discovery). Derived from Catalog.tree тАФ categories are not a separate aggregate, so there is no dedicated view.
input: ЁЯзй CategoriesQueryInput! { restaurantId: ЁЯФд RestaurantId }
returns: ЁЯзй CatalogCategory [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П Catalog
roles: EVERYONE (open тАФ roles omitted) ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П createCatalogЁЯФЧ #mutation-createcatalog
command: ЁЯУй CreateCatalog тЖТ ЁЯОн Catalog
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V0
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П addProductЁЯФЧ #mutation-addproduct
command: ЁЯУй AddProduct тЖТ ЁЯОн Catalog
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V0
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П updateProductЁЯФЧ #mutation-updateproduct
command: ЁЯУй UpdateProduct тЖТ ЁЯОн Catalog
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V1
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П removeProductЁЯФЧ #mutation-removeproduct
command: ЁЯУй RemoveProduct тЖТ ЁЯОн Catalog
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V1
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П addCatalogCategoryЁЯФЧ #mutation-addcatalogcategory
command: ЁЯУй AddCatalogCategory тЖТ ЁЯОн Catalog
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V1
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П updateCatalogCategoryЁЯФЧ #mutation-updatecatalogcategory
command: ЁЯУй UpdateCatalogCategory тЖТ ЁЯОн Catalog
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V1
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П removeCatalogCategoryЁЯФЧ #mutation-removecatalogcategory
command: ЁЯУй RemoveCatalogCategory тЖТ ЁЯОн Catalog
roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V1

тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П addOptionListЁЯФЧ #mutation-addoptionlist

roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V1

roles: ADMIN, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT ┬╖ V1

command: ЁЯУй UpdateOfferStock тЖТ ЁЯОн Catalog

ЁЯзй Output types (2)
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй CatalogЁЯФЧ #type-catalog
A restaurant's catalog (categories тЖТ products тЖТ offers + option lists).
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П Catalog
FieldTypeReq.
idЁЯФд CatalogIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
slugЁЯФд SlugтЬЕ required
nameЁЯФд CatalogNameтЬЕ required
categories[ЁЯзй CatalogCategory]тЬЕ required
products[ЁЯзй Product]тЬЕ required
optionLists[ЁЯзй OptionList]тЬЕ required
updatedAtstring date-timeтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй CatalogCategoryЁЯФЧ #type-catalogcategory
A catalog category (tree via parentRef).
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П Catalog
FieldTypeReq.
idЁЯФд ProductCategoryIdтЬЕ required
parentRefЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullable
nameЁЯФд CatalogCategoryNameтЬЕ required
descriptionЁЯФд ProductDescriptionтмЬ nullable
tags[ЁЯФд Tag]тЬЕ required
imageIds[ЁЯФд ImageId]тЬЕ required
ЁЯОн Actors (1)
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн CatalogЁЯФЧ #actor-catalog
A restaurant catalog: catalog, category tree, products, offers (SKUs), option lists and per-offer stock.
ЁЯзй aggregate
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
ЁЯУй CreateCatalogтЪб CatalogCreatedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ RefNotUnique
ЁЯУй AddProductтЪб ProductAddedтЫФ CatalogNotFound, тЫФ CurrencyMismatch, тЫФ CatalogCategoryRefNotFound, тЫФ RefNotUnique
ЁЯУй UpdateProductтЪб ProductUpdatedтЫФ ProductNotFound, тЫФ ProductMustHaveOffer, тЫФ CurrencyMismatch

ЁЯЧДя╕П Views (1)
тЦ╕View: ЁЯЧДя╕П CatalogЁЯФЧ #view-catalog
source: ЁЯОн Catalog ┬╖ ЁЯЫ╢ V0
fed by: тЪб CatalogCreated, тЪб CatalogCategoryAdded, тЪб CatalogCategoryUpdated, тЪб CatalogCategoryRemoved, тЪб ProductAdded, тЪб ProductUpdated, тЪб ProductRemoved, тЪб OptionListAdded, тЪб OptionListUpdated, тЪб OptionListRemoved, тЪб OfferStockUpdated, тЪб CatalogImported
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
catalog_idЁЯФд CatalogId (derived)тЪб CatalogCreated.catalogIdPK
restaurant_idЁЯФд RestaurantId (derived) тЖТ ЁЯЧДя╕П RestaurantтЪб CatalogCreated.restaurantIdindex
slugЁЯФд SlugтЪая╕П noneтАФтЪая╕П HOLE: CatalogCreated carries no slug тАФ nothing populates this column (drop it or add slug to the event).
nameЁЯФд CatalogName (derived)тЪб CatalogCreated.nameтАФ
treejsonbтЪб CatalogCategoryAdded, тЪб CatalogCategoryUpdated, тЪб CatalogCategoryRemoved, тЪб ProductAdded, тЪб ProductUpdated, тЪб ProductRemoved, тЪб OptionListAdded, тЪб OptionListUpdated, тЪб OptionListRemoved, тЪб OfferStockUpdated, тЪб CatalogImportedтАФAssembled tree: categories -> products -> offers { price_cents, currency, availability, stock_status, uberPrice?, uberPriceBasis? } + option lists. See rules for how uberPrice is derived (ADR-0022/0024).
created_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
ЁЯУй Commands (12)
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй CreateCatalogЁЯФЧ #command-createcatalog
Admin creates a catalog for a restaurant.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П createCatalog ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Catalog
emits: тЪб CatalogCreated
throws: тЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ RefNotUnique
FieldTypeReq.Description
catalogIdЁЯФд CatalogIdтЬЕ requiredClient-generated id for the new catalog.
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
nameЁЯФд CatalogNameтЬЕ required
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй AddProductЁЯФЧ #command-addproduct
Admin adds a product (with its one-or-more offers) to a catalog. The client supplies the product id and each offer id (client-generated).
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П addProduct ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Catalog
emits: тЪб ProductAdded
throws: тЫФ CatalogNotFound, тЫФ CurrencyMismatch, тЫФ CatalogCategoryRefNotFound, тЫФ RefNotUnique
FieldTypeReq.Description
productIdЁЯФд ProductIdтЬЕ requiredClient-generated id for the new product.
catalogIdЁЯФд CatalogIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
categoryRefЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullable
nameЁЯФд ProductNameтЬЕ required
descriptionЁЯФд ProductDescriptionтмЬ nullable
tags[ЁЯФд Tag]тмЬ optional
taxRateЁЯУж TaxRateтЬЕ required
offers[ЁЯУж Offer]тЬЕ required
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullable

тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй UpdateOfferStockЁЯФЧ #command-updateofferstock
Admin (or inventory sync) sets the stock level of a offer. The StockStatus is derived server-side from quantity vs lowStockThreshold.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П updateOfferStock ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Catalog
emits: тЪб OfferStockUpdated
throws: тЫФ OfferNotFound, тЫФ OfferNotStockTracked
FieldTypeReq.Description
catalogIdЁЯФд CatalogIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
offerIdЁЯФд OfferIdтЬЕ required
quantityЁЯФд QuantityтЬЕ required
lowStockThresholdЁЯФд QuantityтмЬ nullable
expiresAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй ImportCatalogЁЯФЧ #command-importcatalog
Admin/system imports or re-syncs a full catalog from an external source (HubRise), replacing the current catalog content. Idempotent via entity `ref`s (HubRise import key).
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П importCatalog ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Catalog
emits: тЪб CatalogImported
throws: тЫФ CatalogNotFound, тЫФ CatalogTranslationFailed, тЫФ MissingRef
FieldTypeReq.Description
catalogIdЁЯФд CatalogIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
sourcestring (HUBRISE | MANUAL)тЬЕ required
categories[ЁЯУж CatalogCategory]тЬЕ required
products[ЁЯУж Product]тЬЕ required
optionLists[ЁЯУж OptionList]тЬЕ required

ЁЯУж Entities (7)
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж StockЁЯФЧ #entity-stock
Inventory of a offer/option. status is DERIVED from quantity and lowStockThreshold (see scalars.yaml#/StockStatus).
FieldTypeReq.Description
quantityЁЯФд QuantityтЬЕ required
lowStockThresholdЁЯФд QuantityтмЬ nullableIf quantity <= threshold, status becomes LOW_STOCK.
statusЁЯФд StockStatusтЬЕ requiredDERIVED server-side from quantity vs lowStockThreshold тАФ never a client input.
expiresAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullableRestock/availability date for out-of-stock items (HubRise inventory expires_at).
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж CatalogЁЯФЧ #entity-catalog
A catalog (HubRise: catalog).
FieldTypeReq.Description
idЁЯФд CatalogIdтЬЕ required
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullable
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
nameЁЯФд CatalogNameтЬЕ required

Catalog category, hierarchical via parentRef (HubRise categories tree).

idЁЯФд ProductCategoryIdтЬЕ required

catalogIdЁЯФд CatalogIdтЬЕ required

descriptionЁЯФд ProductDescriptionтмЬ nullable
tags[ЁЯФд Tag]тмЬ optional
imageIds[ЁЯФд ImageId]тмЬ optional

ЁЯФд Scalars (10)
ScalarTypeDescription
ЁЯФд CatalogIdstring uuidCatalog id (HubRise: catalog).
ЁЯФд ProductCategoryIdstring uuid
ЁЯФд OptionListIdstring uuid
ЁЯФд ImageIdstring uuid
ЁЯФд CatalogNamestring
ЁЯФд CatalogCategoryNamestring
ЁЯФд ProductDescriptionstring
ЁЯФд OptionListNamestring
ЁЯФд CatalogItemAvailabilityenum (AVAILABLE | UNAVAILABLE)
ЁЯФд StockStatusenum (IN_STOCK | LOW_STOCK | OUT_OF_STOCK)
тЫФ Errors (17)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
тЫФ CatalogNotFoundNo catalog with this id (or it does not belong to the restaurant).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Catalog not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Catalog introuvable.ЁЯУй AddProduct, ЁЯУй AddCatalogCategory, ЁЯУй AddOptionList, ЁЯУй ImportCatalog
тЫФ CurrencyMismatchA offer price currency differs from the restaurant default currency.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Prices must use the currency of '{restaurantName}' ('{currency}').ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Les prix doivent utiliser la devise de '{restaurantName}' ('{currency}').ЁЯУй AddProduct, ЁЯУй UpdateProduct
тЫФ RefNotUniqueThe ref is not unique within the catalog.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The reference '{ref}' is already used in this catalog.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ La r├йf├йrence '{ref}' est d├йj├а utilis├йe dans ce catalog.ЁЯУй CreateCatalog, ЁЯУй AddProduct, ЁЯУй AddCatalogCategory
тЫФ CatalogCategoryNotFoundNo category with this id in the catalog.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз CatalogCategory not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Cat├йgorie introuvable.ЁЯУй UpdateCatalogCategory, ЁЯУй RemoveCatalogCategory
тЫФ CatalogCategoryRefNotFoundReferenced category ref does not exist in the catalog.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз No category with reference '{ref}'.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Aucune cat├йgorie avec la r├йf├йrence '{ref}'.ЁЯУй AddProduct
тЫФ ParentCatalogCategoryNotFoundparentRef points to a category that does not exist in the catalog.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The parent category '{parentRef}' does not exist.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ La cat├йgorie parente '{parentRef}' n'existe pas.ЁЯУй AddCatalogCategory
тЫФ CatalogCategoryCycleparentRef would introduce a cycle in the category tree.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Moving '{categoryName}' there would create a category loop.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ D├йplacer '{categoryName}' ici cr├йerait une boucle de cat├йgories.ЁЯУй UpdateCatalogCategory
тЫФ CatalogCategoryNotEmptyCatalogCategory has child categories or products referencing it.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Empty the category '{categoryName}' before removing it.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Videz la cat├йgorie '{categoryName}' avant de la supprimer.ЁЯУй RemoveCatalogCategory
тЫФ ProductNotFoundNo product with this id in the catalog.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Product not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Produit introuvable.ЁЯУй UpdateProduct, ЁЯУй RemoveProduct
тЫФ ProductMustHaveOfferA product must keep at least one offer.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз '{productName}' must keep at least one offer.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ '{productName}' doit conserver au moins une offere.ЁЯУй UpdateProduct
тЫФ OptionListNotFoundNo option list with this id in the catalog.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Option list not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Liste d'options introuvable.ЁЯУй UpdateOptionList, ЁЯУй RemoveOptionList
тЫФ OptionListMustHaveOptionAn option list must keep at least one option.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The option list '{optionListName}' must have at least one option.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ La liste d'options '{optionListName}' doit contenir au moins une option.ЁЯУй AddOptionList, ЁЯУй UpdateOptionList
тЫФ InvalidSelectionBoundsminSelections is greater than maxSelections.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз In '{optionListName}', the minimum cannot exceed the maximum number of selections.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Dans '{optionListName}', le minimum ne peut pas d├йpasser le maximum de s├йlections.ЁЯУй AddOptionList
тЫФ OptionListInUseOption list is still referenced by a offer and cannot be removed.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The option list '{optionListName}' is still used by a product.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ La liste d'options '{optionListName}' est encore utilis├йe par un produit.ЁЯУй RemoveOptionList
тЫФ OfferNotStockTrackedOffer is not stock-tracked, so its stock cannot be set.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз '{productName}' ({offerName}) does not track stock.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ '{productName}' ({offerName}) ne suit pas de stock.ЁЯУй UpdateOfferStock
тЫФ CatalogTranslationFailedThe ACL could not map external (HubRise) shapes to domain types on import.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The imported catalog could not be processed.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Le catalogue import├й n'a pas pu ├кtre trait├й.ЁЯУй ImportCatalog
тЫФ MissingRefAn imported entity is missing its ref (idempotency key).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Every imported item must have a reference.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Chaque ├йl├йment import├й doit avoir une r├йf├йrence.ЁЯУй ImportCatalog
ЁЯУР Business rules (6)
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CatalogCreationForRestaurantЁЯФЧ #rule-catalogcreationforrestaurant
A catalog is created for a restaurant; creation is rejected when invalid/duplicate.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCatalogCreated, ЁЯзк TestCatalogCreateIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CatalogProductManagementЁЯФЧ #rule-catalogproductmanagement
Products can be added, updated and removed in a catalog, with rejection on invalid operations.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCatalogProductAdded, ЁЯзк TestCatalogAddProductIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCatalogProductUpdated, ЁЯзк TestCatalogUpdateProductIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCatalogProductRemoved
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CatalogCategoryTreeManagementЁЯФЧ #rule-catalogcategorytreemanagement
Catalog categories (the tree) can be added, updated and removed, with rejection on invalid operations.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCatalogCategoryAdded, ЁЯзк TestCatalogAddCategoryIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCatalogCategoryUpdated, ЁЯзк TestCatalogUpdateCategoryIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCatalogCategoryRemoved, ЁЯзк TestCatalogRemoveCategoryIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CatalogOptionListManagementЁЯФЧ #rule-catalogoptionlistmanagement
Option lists can be added, updated and removed, with rejection on invalid operations.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCatalogOptionListAdded, ЁЯзк TestCatalogAddOptionListIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCatalogOptionListUpdated, ЁЯзк TestCatalogUpdateOptionListIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCatalogOptionListRemoved, ЁЯзк TestCatalogRemoveOptionListIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР OfferStockManualOrSyncedЁЯФЧ #rule-offerstockmanualorsynced
Offer stock can be updated manually or synced from HubRise; an invalid update is rejected.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCatalogOfferStockUpdated, ЁЯзк TestCatalogUpdateOfferStockIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCatalogOfferStockSyncedFromHubRise
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CatalogImportReplacesContentЁЯФЧ #rule-catalogimportreplacescontent
A HubRise catalog import replaces the catalog content (idempotent on ref); an invalid import is rejected.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCatalogImported, ЁЯзк TestCatalogImportIsRejected
ЁЯзк Tests (1)

ЁЯОн Catalog

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogCreatedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogcreated
Creates a catalog for a registered restaurant
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered
when: ЁЯУй CreateCatalog
then: тЪб CatalogCreated
verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogCreationForRestaurant
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogCreateIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogcreateisrejected
Rejects creating a catalog for a missing restaurant or with a duplicate ref
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй CreateCatalog
thrown: тЫФ RestaurantNotFound, тЫФ RefNotUnique
verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogCreationForRestaurant
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogProductAddedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogproductadded
Adds a product with one offer to a catalog
given: тЪб CatalogCreated
when: ЁЯУй AddProduct
then: тЪб ProductAdded
verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogProductManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogAddProductIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogaddproductisrejected
Rejects adding a product when the catalog/category is missing, a price currency mismatches, or a ref is duplicated
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй AddProduct
thrown: тЫФ CatalogNotFound, тЫФ CurrencyMismatch, тЫФ CatalogCategoryRefNotFound, тЫФ RefNotUnique
verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogProductManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogProductUpdatedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogproductupdated
Updates an existing product (full replace)
given: тЪб CatalogCreated, тЪб ProductAdded
when: ЁЯУй UpdateProduct
then: тЪб ProductUpdated
verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogProductManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogUpdateProductIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogupdateproductisrejected
Rejects updating a missing product, removing its last offer, or mismatching the currency
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй UpdateProduct
thrown: тЫФ ProductNotFound, тЫФ ProductMustHaveOffer, тЫФ CurrencyMismatch
verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogProductManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogProductRemovedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogproductremoved
Removes a product from a catalog
given: тЪб CatalogCreated, тЪб ProductAdded
when: ЁЯУй RemoveProduct
then: тЪб ProductRemoved
verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogProductManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogCategoryAddedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogcategoryadded
Adds a category to a catalog
given: тЪб CatalogCreated
when: ЁЯУй AddCatalogCategory
then: тЪб CatalogCategoryAdded
verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogCategoryTreeManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogAddCategoryIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogaddcategoryisrejected
Rejects adding a category when the catalog/parent is missing or the ref is duplicated
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй AddCatalogCategory
thrown: тЫФ CatalogNotFound, тЫФ ParentCatalogCategoryNotFound, тЫФ RefNotUnique
verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogCategoryTreeManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogCategoryUpdatedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogcategoryupdated
Updates a catalog category (full replace)
given: тЪб CatalogCreated, тЪб CatalogCategoryAdded
when: ЁЯУй UpdateCatalogCategory

verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogCategoryTreeManagement
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogUpdateCategoryIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogupdatecategoryisrejected
Rejects updating a missing category or one that would create a cycle
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй UpdateCatalogCategory
thrown: тЫФ CatalogCategoryNotFound, тЫФ CatalogCategoryCycle

when: ЁЯУй RemoveCatalogCategory

when: ЁЯУй UpdateOfferStock

Imports a full catalog from an external source
given: тЪб CatalogCreated
when: ЁЯУй ImportCatalog

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCatalogImportIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcatalogimportisrejected
Rejects importing into a missing catalog, on a translation failure, or with a missing ref
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй ImportCatalog

verifies: ЁЯУР CatalogImportReplacesContent
ЁЯФ▓ 3. order ЁЯФЧ
Cart selection тЖТ checkout тЖТ order lifecycle, incl. the checkout & refund sagas (the V0 risk point: external Stripe).
ЁЯз░ API operations (21)
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО cartЁЯФЧ #query-cart
A single cart by id (session-scoped; readable by the guest/customer who owns it).
input: ЁЯзй CartQueryInput! { id: ЁЯФд CartId }
returns: ЁЯзй Cart ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П Cart
roles: EVERYONE (open тАФ roles omitted) ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО ordersЁЯФЧ #query-orders
Orders, optionally scoped by customer and/or restaurant and filtered by status. Serves both the customer's own history and the restaurant back-office queue; ownership/scope enforced server-side.
input: ЁЯзй OrdersQueryInput { customerId?: ЁЯФд CustomerId, restaurantId?: ЁЯФд RestaurantId, status?: ЁЯФд OrderStatus }
returns: ЁЯзй Order [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П OrderTracking
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, ADMIN ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО orderЁЯФЧ #query-order
Order tracking by id; owning customer or the restaurant/admin. Ownership enforced server-side.
input: ЁЯзй OrderQueryInput! { id: ЁЯФд OrderId }
returns: ЁЯзй Order ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П OrderTracking
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, ADMIN ┬╖ V0

тЦ╕Subscription: ЁЯФФ orderStatusChangedЁЯФЧ #subscription-orderstatuschanged
Order status change events for ONE order, tracked by orderId тАФ what the confirmation screen has in hand (#14, ADR-20260720-220000; replaces the pre-acceptance-first correlationId key). Ownership is resolver-side per row: a CUSTOMER caller must BE the order's customer; ADMIN sees any order; RESTAURANT/RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT paths are trusted like the `orders` query until a callerтЖФrestaurant binding exists (recorded gap). No guest session scope on Order reads (ADR-20260720-213000 ┬з3 тАФ guests follow paymentStatusChanged until they verify a phone).
input: ЁЯзй OrderStatusChangedSubscriptionInput! { orderId: ЁЯФд OrderId }
streams: ЁЯзй Order
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, ADMIN ┬╖ V0
ЁЯзй Output types (3)
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй CartЁЯФЧ #type-cart
A customer's in-progress selection for a single restaurant (priced by the projection).
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П Cart
FieldTypeReq.
idЁЯФд CartIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтмЬ nullable
statusЁЯФд CartStatusтЬЕ required

totalAmountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
breakdownЁЯУж PaymentBreakdownтмЬ nullable
uberComparisonЁЯУж UberComparisonтмЬ nullable
updatedAtstring date-timeтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй OrderЁЯФЧ #type-order
An order with its tracking status and payment state.

idЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required

statusЁЯФд OrderStatusтЬЕ required

totalAmountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
breakdownЁЯУж PaymentBreakdownтЬЕ required
deliveryAddressЁЯУж AddressтмЬ nullable
estimatedReadyAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable
placedAtstring date-timeтЬЕ required
statusChangedAtstring date-timeтЬЕ required
paymentStatusЁЯФд PaymentStatusтЬЕ required
restaurantStarsЁЯФд StarRatingтмЬ nullable

captainTipЁЯУж MoneyтмЬ nullable
uberComparisonЁЯУж UberComparisonтмЬ nullable
deliveryStatusЁЯФд DeliveryStatusтмЬ nullable
courierЁЯУж CourierтмЬ nullable
estimatedDropoffAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable
ratedAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй RefundЁЯФЧ #type-refund
A refund opened for decision on a paid order (RefundProcess): REQUESTED until the restaurant/admin decides, then APPROVED (Stripe refund requested) or DENIED, and REFUNDED once Stripe settles. Serves the restaurant's and admin's refund queue (filter status = REQUESTED for pending ones).
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_PendingRefunds
FieldTypeReq.
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
statusЁЯФд RefundStatusтЬЕ required
amountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
approvedAmountЁЯУж MoneyтмЬ nullable
reasonstringтмЬ nullable
refundIdЁЯФд RefundIdтмЬ nullable
requestedAtstring date-timeтЬЕ required
decidedAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable
ЁЯОн Actors (5)
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн CartЁЯФЧ #actor-cart
A visitor's in-progress selection for one restaurant, built (possibly as a guest) before checkout. Validated incrementally; converted to an Order by PlaceOrderProcess.
ЁЯзй aggregate
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
ЁЯУй AddCartLineтЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAddedтЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartRestaurantMismatch, тЫФ OfferNotFound, тЫФ OfferUnavailable, тЫФ InsufficientStock, тЫФ InvalidOptionSelection, тЫФ QuantityExceedsLimit
ЁЯУй RemoveCartLineтЪб CartLineRemovedтЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartLineNotFound
ЁЯУй ChangeCartLineQuantityтЪб CartLineQuantityChangedтЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartLineNotFound, тЫФ InsufficientStock, тЫФ QuantityExceedsLimit
ЁЯУй BindCartToCustomerтЪб CartBoundToCustomerтЫФ CartNotFound
тЪб CartCheckedOutтЪб CartCheckedOutтАФ
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> OPEN : CartStarted
  OPEN --> CHECKED_OUT : CartCheckedOut
  CHECKED_OUT --> [*]
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн OrderЁЯФЧ #actor-order
A single order through its lifecycle. Born from OrderPlaced (delivered by PlaceOrderProcess and recorded here), then driven to a terminal state.
ЁЯзй aggregate
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
тЪб OrderPlacedтЪб OrderPlacedтАФ
ЁЯУй AcceptOrderтЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurantтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
ЁЯУй StartPreparationтЪб OrderPreparationStartedтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
ЁЯУй MarkOrderReadyтЪб OrderMarkedReadyтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
ЁЯУй MarkOrderDeliveredтЪб OrderDeliveredтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
ЁЯУй RejectOrderтЪб OrderRejectedByRestaurantтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
ЁЯУй CancelOrderByCustomerтЪб OrderCancelledByCustomerтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
ЁЯУй CancelOrderByRestaurantтЪб OrderCancelledByRestaurantтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
ЁЯУй RateOrderтЪб OrderRatedтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus, тЫФ OrderAlreadyRated
ЁЯУй RateRestaurantтЪб RestaurantRatedтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus, тЫФ RestaurantAlreadyRated
ЁЯУй TipOrderтЪб OrderTippedтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus, тЫФ InvalidTipRecipient
ЁЯУй RequestRefundтЪб RefundRequestedтЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> PLACED : OrderPlaced
  PLACED --> ACCEPTED : OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
  ACCEPTED --> PREPARING : OrderPreparationStarted
  ACCEPTED --> READY : OrderMarkedReady
  PREPARING --> READY : OrderMarkedReady
  READY --> DELIVERED : OrderDelivered
  PLACED --> REJECTED : OrderRejectedByRestaurant
  PLACED --> CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER : OrderCancelledByCustomer
  ACCEPTED --> CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT : OrderCancelledByRestaurant
  PREPARING --> CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT : OrderCancelledByRestaurant
  READY --> CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT : OrderCancelledByRestaurant
  DELIVERED --> [*]
  REJECTED --> [*]
  CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER --> [*]
  CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT --> [*]
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн PaymentЁЯФЧ #actor-payment
A payment for an order, driven to a terminal state. Born from PaymentIntentCreated (emitted by PlaceOrderProcess), then driven to a terminal state.
ЁЯзй aggregate
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
тЪб PaymentIntentCreatedтЪб PaymentIntentCreatedтАФ
тЪб PaymentCapturedтЪб PaymentCapturedтАФ
тЪб PaymentFailedтЪб PaymentFailedтАФ
тЪб PaymentRefundedтЪб PaymentRefundedтАФ
тЪб RefundOpenedтЪб RefundOpenedтАФ
тЪб RefundApprovedтЪб RefundApprovedтАФ
тЪб RefundDeniedтЪб RefundDeniedтАФ
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> PENDING : PaymentIntentCreated
  PENDING --> CAPTURED : PaymentCaptured
  PENDING --> FAILED : PaymentFailed
  CAPTURED --> REFUNDED : PaymentRefunded
  FAILED --> [*]
  REFUNDED --> [*]
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн PlaceOrderProcessЁЯФЧ #actor-placeorderprocess
The checkout saga. On PlaceOrder: reads the OPEN cart, re-validates and prices it server-side against the live catalog, creates the Stripe PaymentIntent, and freezes the full priced checkout onto PaymentIntentCreated (ADR-20260719-014434) тАФ the state row (one live run per cart) is what prevents concurrent checkouts of the same cart. On PaymentCaptured: materializes the Order and closes the cart from the frozen snapshot alone. On PaymentFailed: resolves the run; the cart stays OPEN.
тЪЩя╕П process manager
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
ЁЯУй PlaceOrderтЪб PaymentIntentCreatedтЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartEmpty, тЫФ RestaurantPaused, тЫФ CannotOrderTestRestaurant, тЫФ DeliveryAddressRequired, тЫФ OutsideDeliveryArea, тЫФ PriceUnresolvable, тЫФ PriceMismatch, тЫФ PaymentDeclined
тЪб PaymentCapturedтЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб CartCheckedOutтЫФ PaymentEventOrphaned
тЪб PaymentFailedPayment failed: resolve the run; no order is placed and the cart stays OPEN.тЫФ PaymentEventOrphaned
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant IN as Inbox (trigger)
  participant PM as PlaceOrderProcess (decides)
  participant ST as payment_process_manager (state)
  participant RM_Cart as Cart (read model)
  participant RM_Restaurant as Restaurant (read model)
  participant PT_payment as port payment (adapter)
  participant AG_Payment as Payment (aggregate)
  participant AG_Order as Order (aggregate)
  participant AG_Cart as Cart (aggregate)
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: PlaceOrder (command)
  PM->>RM_Cart: read as cart [cart_id=PlaceOrder.cartId]
  PM--xIN: throws CartNotFound
  PM--xIN: throws CartNotOpen unless cart.status == OPEN
  PM--xIN: throws CartEmpty
  PM->>RM_Restaurant: read as restaurant [restaurant_id=PlaceOrder.restaurantId]
  PM--xIN: throws RestaurantPaused
  PM--xIN: throws CannotOrderTestRestaurant
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryAddressRequired
  PM--xIN: throws OutsideDeliveryArea
  PM--xIN: throws PriceUnresolvable
  PM--xIN: throws PriceMismatch
  PM->>PT_payment: request
  PM--xIN: throws PaymentDeclined
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver PaymentIntentCreated тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set cart_id=PlaceOrder.cartId, order_id=PlaceOrder.orderId, payment_intent_id=payment.request, process_status=AWAITING_PAYMENT_RESULT, payment_status=PENDING
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: PaymentCaptured (event)
  PM->>ST: by payment_intent_id=PaymentCaptured.paymentIntentId
  PM--xIN: throws PaymentEventOrphaned
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=AWAITING_PAYMENT_RESULT
  PM->>AG_Order: deliver OrderPlaced тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>AG_Cart: deliver CartCheckedOut тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set payment_status=CAPTURED, process_status=ORDER_PLACED, last_processed_stripe_event_id=envelope.event_id
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: PaymentFailed (event)
  PM->>ST: by payment_intent_id=PaymentFailed.paymentIntentId
  PM--xIN: throws PaymentEventOrphaned
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=AWAITING_PAYMENT_RESULT
  PM->>ST: set payment_status=FAILED, process_status=FAILED, last_processed_stripe_event_id=envelope.event_id
  end
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн RefundProcessЁЯФЧ #actor-refundprocess
Approved refunds. A refundable fact (rejection, cancellation, customer request) OPENS a pending refund: RefundOpened is delivered to the Payment aggregate (so the refund queue, View_PendingRefunds, folds from the log) and the state row goes PENDING_APPROVAL; the RESTAURANT (its own orders) or an ADMIN decides with ApproveRefund / DenyRefund (authz = api.yaml roles); on approval the outbound Stripe refund is requested and the run settles when Stripe reports PaymentRefunded (the fact itself is recorded by the Payment aggregate). The refund-eligibility window is a config value enforced at approval, not a domain rule.
тЪЩя╕П process manager
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
тЪб OrderRejectedByRestaurantтЪб RefundOpenedтАФ
тЪб OrderCancelledByCustomerтЪб RefundOpenedтАФ
тЪб OrderCancelledByRestaurantтЪб RefundOpenedтАФ
тЪб RefundRequestedтЪб RefundOpenedтАФ
ЁЯУй ApproveRefundтЪб RefundApprovedтЫФ RefundNotPending
ЁЯУй DenyRefundтЪб RefundDeniedтЫФ RefundNotPending
тЪб PaymentRefundedStripe reported the settled refund (recorded by the Payment aggregate) тАФ close the run. The fact is already in the log; nothing to emit. тАФ
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant IN as Inbox (trigger)
  participant PM as RefundProcess (decides)
  participant ST as refund_process_manager (state)
  participant RM_OrderTracking as OrderTracking (read model)
  participant AG_Payment as Payment (aggregate)
  participant PT_payment as port payment (adapter)
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: OrderRejectedByRestaurant (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=OrderRejectedByRestaurant.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.payment_status == CAPTURED
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundOpened тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set order_id=OrderRejectedByRestaurant.orderId, payment_intent_id=order.payment_intent_id, process_status=PENDING_APPROVAL, reason=OrderRejectedByRestaurant.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: OrderCancelledByCustomer (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=OrderCancelledByCustomer.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.payment_status == CAPTURED
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundOpened тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set order_id=OrderCancelledByCustomer.orderId, payment_intent_id=order.payment_intent_id, process_status=PENDING_APPROVAL, reason=OrderCancelledByCustomer.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: OrderCancelledByRestaurant (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=OrderCancelledByRestaurant.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.payment_status == CAPTURED
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundOpened тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set order_id=OrderCancelledByRestaurant.orderId, payment_intent_id=order.payment_intent_id, process_status=PENDING_APPROVAL, reason=OrderCancelledByRestaurant.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: RefundRequested (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=RefundRequested.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.payment_status == CAPTURED
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundOpened тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set order_id=RefundRequested.orderId, payment_intent_id=order.payment_intent_id, process_status=PENDING_APPROVAL, reason=RefundRequested.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: ApproveRefund (command)
  PM->>ST: by order_id=ApproveRefund.orderId
  PM--xIN: throws RefundNotPending unless state.process_status == PENDING_APPROVAL
  PM->>PT_payment: refund
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundApproved тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=APPROVED_AWAITING_SETTLEMENT, approved_amount_cents=ApproveRefund.amount, reason=ApproveRefund.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DenyRefund (command)
  PM->>ST: by order_id=DenyRefund.orderId
  PM--xIN: throws RefundNotPending unless state.process_status == PENDING_APPROVAL
  PM->>AG_Payment: deliver RefundDenied тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=DENIED, reason=DenyRefund.reason
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: PaymentRefunded (event)
  PM->>ST: by order_id=PaymentRefunded.orderId; expect process_status=APPROVED_AWAITING_SETTLEMENT
  PM->>ST: set refund_id=PaymentRefunded.refundId, process_status=REFUNDED
  end
ЁЯЧДя╕П Views (3)
тЦ╕View: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_PendingRefundsЁЯФЧ #view-view_pendingrefunds
source: ЁЯОн Payment ┬╖ ЁЯЫ╢ V0

decided_attimestamptzтЪб RefundApproved, тЪб RefundDeniednullableThe decision's occurrence time (approval or denial); null while REQUESTED.
