updated_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
тЦ╕View: ЁЯЧДя╕П CartЁЯФЧ #view-cart
source: ЁЯОн Cart ┬╖ ЁЯЫ╢ V0
Joined with the catalog for pricing (secondary source).
fed by: тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded, тЪб CartLineQuantityChanged, тЪб CartLineRemoved, тЪб CartCheckedOut, тЪб CartBoundToCustomer
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
cart_idЁЯФд CartId (derived)тЪб CartStarted.cartIdPK
restaurant_idЁЯФд RestaurantId (derived) тЖТ ЁЯЧДя╕П RestaurantтЪб CartStarted.restaurantIdтАФ
session_idЁЯФд SessionId (derived)тЪб CartStarted.sessionIdindexThe visitor session that started the cart; CartBindingProcess binds all OPEN carts of a session on CustomerIdentified.
customer_idЁЯФд CustomerId (derived) тЖТ ЁЯЧДя╕П CustomerтЪб CartStarted.customerId, тЪб CartBoundToCustomer.customerIdnullableNULL while guest; bound by CartBoundToCustomer (CartBindingProcess sends BindCartToCustomer per open cart of the identified session) or at checkout.
statusЁЯФд CartStatusтЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartCheckedOutтАФDerived from event type: OPEN on CartStarted, CHECKED_OUT on CartCheckedOut.
linesjsonbтЪб CartLineAdded, тЪб CartLineQuantityChanged, тЪб CartLineRemovedтАФPriced by the projection from the live catalog: [{ cart_line_id, offer_id, product_id, name, offer_name, quantity, unit_price_cents, selected_options, line_total_cents }].
total_amount_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб CartLineAdded, тЪб CartLineQuantityChanged, тЪб CartLineRemovedтАФCOMPUTED by the projection from the live catalog (never trusted from the client).
currencyЁЯФд CurrencyCodeтЪб CartLineAddedтАФFrom the catalog currency at pricing time (the restaurant's default_currency).
estimated_breakdownjsonbтЪб CartLineAdded, тЪб CartLineQuantityChanged, тЪб CartLineRemovednullableESTIMATED PaymentBreakdown for the checkout display (ADR-0018), COMPUTED by the projection from the cart food total + PricingPolicy + the restaurant margin_rate. Same shape as OrderPlaced.breakdown; recomputed on the final order.
uber_comparisonjsonbтЪб CartLineAdded, тЪб CartLineQuantityChanged, тЪб CartLineRemovednullableUberComparison for the cart-level comparison (ADR-0022/0025), COMPUTED by the projection (see rules). Null when the restaurant has no cuisine_category.
created_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
тЦ╕View: ЁЯЧДя╕П OrderTrackingЁЯФЧ #view-ordertracking
source: ЁЯОн Order ┬╖ ЁЯЫ╢ V0
The single canonical Order read model. Folds the Order lifecycle + Stripe payment facts (secondary source). Serves every order query тАФ by id (`order`), by customer (history) and by restaurant+status (back-office queue) тАФ via the indexes below; there is no separate per-persona order projection.
fed by: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, тЪб OrderPreparationStarted, тЪб OrderMarkedReady, тЪб OrderDelivered, тЪб OrderRejectedByRestaurant, тЪб OrderCancelledByCustomer, тЪб OrderCancelledByRestaurant, тЪб PaymentCaptured, тЪб PaymentRefunded, тЪб OrderRated, тЪб RestaurantRated, тЪб OrderTipped, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartner, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider, тЪб DeliveryStatusUpdated, тЪб DeliveryCompleted, тЪб DeliveryDispatchFailed
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
order_idЁЯФд OrderId (derived)тЪб OrderPlaced.orderIdPK
refЁЯФд ExternalReference (derived)тЪб OrderPlaced.refтАФ
restaurant_idЁЯФд RestaurantId (derived) тЖТ ЁЯЧДя╕П RestaurantтЪб OrderPlaced.restaurantIdтАФ
customer_idЁЯФд CustomerId (derived) тЖТ ЁЯЧДя╕П CustomerтЪб OrderPlaced.customerIdindex, nullable
statusЁЯФд OrderStatusтЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, тЪб OrderPreparationStarted, тЪб OrderMarkedReady, тЪб OrderDelivered, тЪб OrderRejectedByRestaurant, тЪб OrderCancelledByCustomer, тЪб OrderCancelledByRestaurantтАФDerived from the lifecycle event type.
service_typeЁЯФд ServiceType (derived)тЪб OrderPlaced.serviceTypeтАФ
itemsjsonb (derived)тЪб OrderPlaced.itemsтАФ
total_amount_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.totalAmountтАФamountCents of OrderPlaced.totalAmount (Money).
currencyЁЯФд CurrencyCodeтЪб OrderPlaced.totalAmountтАФcurrency of OrderPlaced.totalAmount (Money).
articles_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownтАФbreakdown.articles.amountCents (food TTC; ADR-0016/0018).
delivery_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownтАФbreakdown.delivery.amountCents (тЖТ rider; 0 for collection).
service_fee_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownтАФbreakdown.serviceFee.amountCents (Captain buyer service fee).
restaurant_payout_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownтАФbreakdown.restaurantPayout.amountCents (3-way split тЖТ restaurant).
rider_payout_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownтАФbreakdown.riderPayout.amountCents (3-way split тЖТ rider).
captain_net_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownтАФbreakdown.captainNet.amountCents (kept by Captain; feeds Open-Collective totals).
uber_total_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableDERIVED estimated Uber Eats all-in total for the same order (ADR-0025; see rules). Null if no cuisine_category.
uber_restaurant_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableDERIVED estimated Uber restaurant net (after ~30% commission; see rules).
uber_rider_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableDERIVED estimated Uber courier earning (base; per-km not modelled in V0; see rules).
uber_platform_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableDERIVED estimated Uber platform take = uber_total тИТ uber_restaurant тИТ uber_rider.
uber_basisЁЯФд ComparisonBasisтЪб OrderPlaced.breakdownnullableESTIMATED (V0) or REAL (opted-in + HubRise Uber prices; deferred). Null if no comparison.
delivery_addressjsonb (derived)тЪб OrderPlaced.deliveryAddressnullable
estimated_ready_attimestamptz (derived)тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant.estimatedReadyAtnullable
placed_attimestamptzтЪб OrderPlacedтАФOrderPlaced occurrence time.
status_changed_attimestamptzтЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, тЪб OrderPreparationStarted, тЪб OrderMarkedReady, тЪб OrderDelivered, тЪб OrderRejectedByRestaurant, тЪб OrderCancelledByCustomer, тЪб OrderCancelledByRestaurantтАФOccurrence time of the latest status-changing event.
payment_intent_idЁЯФд PaymentIntentId (derived)тЪб PaymentCaptured.paymentIntentIdnullableThe captured Stripe PaymentIntent; RefundProcess reads it to open a pending refund.
payment_statustextтЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб PaymentCaptured, тЪб PaymentRefundedтАФFolded from Stripe facts; candidate for a PaymentStatus enum. OrderPlaced seeds CAPTURED: PlaceOrderProcess emits it only in reaction to PaymentCaptured (V0 prepaid-online), and that capture sits earlier in the log than the row it would fold into.
restaurant_starsЁЯФд StarRating (derived)тЪб RestaurantRated.starsnullableCustomer's 0тАУ5 rating of the restaurant; null until rated.
rating_commentЁЯФд RatingComment (derived)тЪб RestaurantRated.commentnullable
rider_thumbЁЯФд ThumbRating (derived)тЪб OrderRated.riderThumbnullable
rider_tip_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderTipped.tipsnullable╬г OrderTipped.tips[recipient==RIDER].amount (all tippers); null if none.
restaurant_tip_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderTipped.tipsnullable╬г OrderTipped.tips[recipient==RESTAURANT].amount; null if none.
captain_tip_centsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЪб OrderTipped.tipsnullable╬г OrderTipped.tips[recipient==CAPTAIN].amount; null if none.
rated_attimestamptzтЪб OrderRated, тЪб RestaurantRated, тЪб OrderTippednullableOccurrence time of the latest rating/tip event.
delivery_statusЁЯФд DeliveryStatusтЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartner, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider, тЪб DeliveryStatusUpdated, тЪб DeliveryCompleted, тЪб DeliveryDispatchFailednullableMirror of the order's DeliveryJob status (correlated by order_id); null for COLLECTION / before dispatch. DeliveryDispatchFailed (offer cap exhausted) mirrors FAILED (ADR-20260720-004556).
courierjsonbтЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartner, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRidernullableAssigned Courier { displayName, phone?, riderId? } once accepted; null before.
estimated_dropoff_attimestamptzтЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.estimatedDropoffAtnullablePartner-reported ETA to the customer; null when unknown.
created_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
ЁЯУй Commands (18)
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй AddCartLineЁЯФЧ #command-addcartline
Visitor adds a line to a cart, validated against the live catalog. The client generates the cartId and sends it on every add; the first add for a new cartId creates the cart (idempotently), binding it to the restaurant.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П addCartLine ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Cart
emits: тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
throws: тЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartRestaurantMismatch, тЫФ OfferNotFound, тЫФ OfferUnavailable, тЫФ InsufficientStock, тЫФ InvalidOptionSelection, тЫФ QuantityExceedsLimit
FieldTypeReq.Description
cartIdЁЯФд CartIdтЬЕ requiredClient-generated cart id; the first add for it creates the cart (session-owned).
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
lineЁЯУж CartLineтЬЕ required
sessionIdЁЯФд SessionIdтЬЕ requiredOptional session id (ADR-0038) to bind the cart to a session for test-mode carts.
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй RemoveCartLineЁЯФЧ #command-removecartline
Visitor removes a line from a cart.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П removeCartLine ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Cart
emits: тЪб CartLineRemoved
throws: тЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartLineNotFound
FieldTypeReq.Description
cartIdЁЯФд CartIdтЬЕ required
cartLineIdЁЯФд CartLineIdтЬЕ required
sessionIdЁЯФд SessionIdтЬЕ requiredOptional session id (ADR-0038) to bind the cart to a session for test-mode carts.
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй ChangeCartLineQuantityЁЯФЧ #command-changecartlinequantity
Visitor changes the quantity of an existing cart line.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П changeCartLineQuantity ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Cart
emits: тЪб CartLineQuantityChanged
throws: тЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartLineNotFound, тЫФ InsufficientStock, тЫФ QuantityExceedsLimit
FieldTypeReq.Description
cartIdЁЯФд CartIdтЬЕ required
cartLineIdЁЯФд CartLineIdтЬЕ required
quantityintegerтЬЕ required
sessionIdЁЯФд SessionIdтЬЕ requiredOptional session id (ADR-0038) to bind the cart to a session for test-mode carts.
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй PlaceOrderЁЯФЧ #command-placeorder
SAGA (checkout). Reads the OPEN cart referenced by cartId, re-validates it against the live catalog, prices it server-side, takes payment via Stripe, records the order, then closes the cart. This is the V0 risk point: it depends on an external actor (Stripe) and must be a saga with a failure branch. Now that the customer has verified their phone, customerId is bound here.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П placeOrder ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн PlaceOrderProcess
emits: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated
throws: тЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartEmpty, тЫФ RestaurantPaused, тЫФ CannotOrderTestRestaurant, тЫФ DeliveryAddressRequired, тЫФ OutsideDeliveryArea, тЫФ PriceUnresolvable, тЫФ PriceMismatch, тЫФ PaymentDeclined
FieldTypeReq.Description
modeЁЯФд ModeтмЬ optional
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ requiredClient-generated id for the order the saga will materialize on payment capture.
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
cartIdЁЯФд CartIdтЬЕ requiredThe OPEN cart to check out; its lines become the order's line items.
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтмЬ nullableResolved from the now-authenticated session; bound onto the cart at checkout.
customerContactЁЯУж CustomerContactтЬЕ required
serviceTypeЁЯФд ServiceTypeтЬЕ required
deliveryAddressЁЯУж AddressтмЬ nullable
noteЁЯФд OrderNoteтмЬ nullable
paymentMethodIdstringтЬЕ requiredStripe PaymentMethod / client secret reference for the payment step. The wallet behind it (card, Apple Pay, Google Pay) is a client-side/Stripe concern and does not change the domain: every method yields a standard Stripe PaymentMethod and the same saga.
expectedTotalЁЯУж MoneyтмЬ nullableOPTIONAL confirmation of the total the client displayed at checkout. NEVER used to price anything тАФ the server recomputes the total from the live catalog (the only price authority) and rejects with errors.yaml#/PriceMismatch when the two diverge, so a customer is never charged an amount other than the one they were shown.

тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй TipOrderЁЯФЧ #command-tiporder
Customer tips one or more of the rider / restaurant / Captain on an order (ADR-012). Optional and SEPARATE from the price тАФ Captain keeps 0% (100% passes through). Additive: may be sent at checkout or post-delivery; multiple tips accumulate.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П tipOrder ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Order
emits: тЪб OrderTipped
throws: тЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus, тЫФ InvalidTipRecipient

tips[ЁЯУж Tip]тЬЕ required

Bind a cart to a customer (after phone verification). The cart is then owned by the customer and can be retrieved across sessions. This is a one-time operation per cart.

emits: тЪб CartBoundToCustomer
throws: тЫФ CartNotFound

customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required

тЦ╕Event: тЪб CartBoundToCustomerЁЯФЧ #event-cartboundtocustomer
A cart that was started by a guest visitor (no customerId) was bound to a Customer after sign-in. This is a domain event, not an auth event. The cartId is the same as the original guest cart; the cart's customerId is now set to the signed-in customer.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Cart, ЁЯОн CartBindingProcess
consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П Cart
FieldTypeReq.Description
cartIdЁЯФд CartIdтЬЕ required
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Event: тЪб CartStartedЁЯФЧ #event-cartstarted
A new cart was created for a restaurant (emitted with the first line added).

consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П Cart

customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтмЬ nullableNull while the visitor is a guest; bound at checkout.

тЦ╕Event: тЪб PaymentIntentCreatedЁЯФЧ #event-paymentintentcreated
A payment intent was created at checkout for a pending order. Carries the full priced checkout frozen at intent creation (`checkout`), so PlaceOrderProcess can rebuild OrderPlaced + CartCheckedOut from the event log alone when PaymentCaptured arrives (no out-of-log store). `checkout.restaurantId`/`customerId` duplicate the top-level fields and `checkout.totalAmount == amount == checkout.breakdown.total`.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Payment, ЁЯОн PlaceOrderProcess
consumed by: ЁЯОн Payment
projected into: non-projected
FieldTypeReq.Description
paymentIntentIdЁЯФд PaymentIntentIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтмЬ nullable
amountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
checkoutЁЯУж CheckoutSnapshotтЬЕ requiredThe full priced checkout frozen at intent creation (rebuilds OrderPlaced/CartCheckedOut on capture).
тЦ╕Event: тЪб PaymentCapturedЁЯФЧ #event-paymentcaptured
Payment was successfully authorized/captured for an order.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Payment
consumed by: ЁЯОн Payment, ЁЯОн PlaceOrderProcess
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П OrderTracking
FieldTypeReq.Description
paymentIntentIdЁЯФд PaymentIntentIdтЬЕ required
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтмЬ nullableNull when captured before the Order aggregate is created in the saga.
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
amountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Event: тЪб PaymentFailedЁЯФЧ #event-paymentfailed
Payment authorization/capture failed; no order is placed.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Payment
consumed by: ЁЯОн Payment, ЁЯОн PlaceOrderProcess
projected into: тАФ
FieldTypeReq.Description
paymentIntentIdЁЯФд PaymentIntentIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
reasonstringтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Event: тЪб PaymentRefundedЁЯФЧ #event-paymentrefunded
A captured payment was refunded (e.g. after rejection or cancellation).
emitted by: ЁЯОн Payment
consumed by: ЁЯОн Payment, ЁЯОн RefundProcess
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_PendingRefunds, ЁЯЧДя╕П OrderTracking
FieldTypeReq.Description
refundIdЁЯФд RefundIdтЬЕ required
paymentIntentIdЁЯФд PaymentIntentIdтЬЕ required
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
amountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
reasonstringтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Event: тЪб RefundOpenedЁЯФЧ #event-refundopened
A refundable fact on a paid order (rejection, cancellation, customer request) opened a refund for a restaurant/admin decision. Delivered by RefundProcess to the Payment aggregate ONLY when the payment is CAPTURED, so the refund queue (View_PendingRefunds) folds from the log, not from PM state. `amount` is the captured order total eligible for refund (an approval may still be partial).
emitted by: ЁЯОн Payment, ЁЯОн RefundProcess
consumed by: ЁЯОн Payment
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_PendingRefunds
FieldTypeReq.Description
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
amountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredThe captured order total eligible for refund (the decision may approve less).
reasonstringтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Event: тЪб RefundApprovedЁЯФЧ #event-refundapproved
The restaurant or an admin approved a refund; the RefundProcess will drive the Stripe refund for this amount.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Payment, ЁЯОн RefundProcess
consumed by: ЁЯОн Payment
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_PendingRefunds
FieldTypeReq.Description
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required
amountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredApproved refund amount (may be partial).
reasonstringтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Event: тЪб RefundDeniedЁЯФЧ #event-refunddenied
The restaurant or an admin denied a pending refund request.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Payment, ЁЯОн RefundProcess
consumed by: ЁЯОн Payment
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_PendingRefunds
FieldTypeReq.Description
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required
reasonstringтЬЕ required
ЁЯУж Entities (11)
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж MoneyЁЯФЧ #entity-money
Stronger-typed money than HubRise's "9.80 EUR" string. Converted at the HubRise boundary (parse + x100), kept as integer minor units + currency internally.
FieldTypeReq.Description
amountCentsЁЯФд MoneyCentsтЬЕ required
currencyЁЯФд CurrencyCodeтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж PaymentBreakdownЁЯФЧ #entity-paymentbreakdown
The order's money breakdown, computed server-side by PlaceOrderProcess (ADR-0016/0017/0018). Carries BOTH the buyer-facing checkout lines and the 3-way Stripe Connect split, in one place so they can't diverge. Invariants: total = articles + delivery + serviceFee; restaurantPayout = articles тИТ restaurantContribution; riderPayout = delivery; captainNet = serviceFee + restaurantContribution (gross of Stripe fees, which Captain absorbs as merchant of record). 0% commission on food: restaurantContribution is a distinct service line, never a cut of the menu price.
FieldTypeReq.Description
articlesЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredFood sub-total TTC (100% to the restaurant, minus its service contribution).
deliveryЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredDelivery fee (тЖТ rider); zero for collection. Delivery integration is post-V0.
serviceFeeЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredCaptain service fee shown to the buyer (the buyer part of the fee).
totalЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredWhat the buyer pays = articles + delivery + serviceFee (the PaymentIntent amount).
restaurantContributionЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredRestaurant's variable service part (margin-proportional); deducted from its payout.
restaurantPayoutЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredTransfer to the restaurant Connect account = articles тИТ restaurantContribution.
riderPayoutЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredTransfer to the rider Connect account = delivery.
captainNetЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredKept on the Captain platform account = serviceFee + restaurantContribution (gross of Stripe).
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж UberComparisonЁЯФЧ #entity-ubercomparison
What the same order would cost тАФ and how it would be split тАФ on Uber Eats, for the pedagogical comparison (ADR-0022/0025). `basis` says whether these are the restaurant's REAL Uber prices (shared via HubRise opt-in, ADR-0023) or a labelled ESTIMATE (coefficient-based, ADR-0024). Estimated split: restaurantShare = uberFood ├Ч (1 тИТ uber_commission); riderShare тЙИ rider_base (+/km, not modelled in V0); platformShare = total тИТ restaurantShare тИТ riderShare. The client derives "you save" = captainTotal тИТ total.
FieldTypeReq.Description
totalЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredEstimated (or real) all-in Uber Eats price for the same order.
restaurantShareЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredWhat the restaurant would net on Uber (after its ~30% commission).
riderShareЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredWhat the courier would earn on Uber (base + per-km; per-km not modelled in V0).
platformShareЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ requiredWhat Uber Eats would keep = total тИТ restaurantShare тИТ riderShare.
basisЁЯФд ComparisonBasisтЬЕ requiredREAL (HubRise opt-in) or ESTIMATED (labelled). V0 shows ESTIMATED.
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж TipЁЯФЧ #entity-tip
One customer tip to a single recipient (ADR-012). Optional, separate from the price; Captain keeps 0%.
FieldTypeReq.Description
recipientЁЯФд TipRecipientтЬЕ required
amountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж CustomerContactЁЯФЧ #entity-customercontact
FieldTypeReq.Description
displayNameЁЯФд CustomerDisplayNameтЬЕ required
emailЁЯФд EmailAddressтмЬ optional
phoneЁЯФд PhoneNumberтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж CartLineItemЁЯФЧ #entity-cartlineitem
A line stored in a cart: the customer's selection by id (no prices stored).
FieldTypeReq.Description
cartLineIdЁЯФд CartLineIdтЬЕ required
offerIdЁЯФд OfferIdтЬЕ required
quantityintegerтЬЕ required
selectedOptionIds[ЁЯФд OptionId]тмЬ optional
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж CartЁЯФЧ #entity-cart
A customer's in-progress selection for a SINGLE restaurant. customerId is null while the visitor is still a guest; it is bound at checkout once the phone is verified.
FieldTypeReq.Description
idЁЯФд CartIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтмЬ nullable
statusЁЯФд CartStatusтЬЕ required
lines[ЁЯУж CartLineItem]тЬЕ required
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж SelectedOptionЁЯФЧ #entity-selectedoption
An option chosen by the customer on a line item, priced at order time.
FieldTypeReq.Description
optionIdЁЯФд OptionIdтЬЕ required
optionListIdЁЯФд OptionListIdтмЬ optional
nameЁЯФд OptionNameтЬЕ required
priceЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж OrderLineItemЁЯФЧ #entity-orderlineitem
FieldTypeReq.Description
offerIdЁЯФд OfferIdтЬЕ required
productIdЁЯФд ProductIdтмЬ optional
nameЁЯФд ProductNameтЬЕ required
offerNameЁЯФд OfferNameтмЬ nullable
quantityintegerтЬЕ required
unitPriceЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
selectedOptions[ЁЯУж SelectedOption]тмЬ optional
lineTotalЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required(unitPrice + sum(selectedOptions.price)) * quantity, computed server-side.
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж CheckoutSnapshotЁЯФЧ #entity-checkoutsnapshot
The validated, server-priced checkout PlaceOrderProcess freezes onto events.yaml#/PaymentIntentCreated when it creates the Stripe PaymentIntent тАФ everything events.yaml#/OrderPlaced + events.yaml#/CartCheckedOut need beyond the inbound PaymentCaptured fact, so the order is reconstructable from the event log alone (no out-of-log store). Mirrors the application `CheckoutSnapshot` port type. Invariant: totalAmount == breakdown.total (== the PaymentIntent amount).
FieldTypeReq.Description
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required
cartIdЁЯФд CartIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтмЬ nullable
modeЁЯФд ModeтмЬ nullable
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullable
customerContactЁЯУж CustomerContactтЬЕ required
serviceTypeЁЯФд ServiceTypeтЬЕ required
deliveryAddressЁЯУж AddressтмЬ nullable
items[ЁЯУж OrderLineItem]тЬЕ requiredPriced order lines frozen at checkout тАФ recomputed server-side from the live catalog (rules.yaml#/ServerPriceAuthority).
totalAmountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
breakdownЁЯУж PaymentBreakdownтЬЕ required
noteЁЯФд OrderNoteтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж OrderЁЯФЧ #entity-order
FieldTypeReq.Description
modeЁЯФд ModeтмЬ optional
idЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required
refЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullable
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтмЬ nullable
customerContactЁЯУж CustomerContactтЬЕ required
serviceTypeЁЯФд ServiceTypeтЬЕ required
deliveryAddressЁЯУж AddressтмЬ nullable
items[ЁЯУж OrderLineItem]тЬЕ required
totalAmountЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
statusЁЯФд OrderStatusтЬЕ required
noteЁЯФд OrderNoteтмЬ nullable
ЁЯФд Scalars (17)
ScalarTypeDescription
ЁЯФд OptionIdstring uuid
ЁЯФд CartIdstring uuid
ЁЯФд CartLineIdstring uuidIdentifies a line within a cart, used to edit its quantity or remove it.
ЁЯФд PaymentIntentIdstringStripe PaymentIntent id (provider reference). Example: 'pi_3Nabc...'.
ЁЯФд RefundIdstringStripe Refund id (provider reference). Example: 're_3Nabc...'.
ЁЯФд MoneyCentsintegerMonetary amount in minor units (e.g. cents).
ЁЯФд OrderNotestring
ЁЯФд StarRatingintegerRestaurant rating in stars (0тАУ5), given by the customer on a delivered order.
ЁЯФд ThumbRatingenum (UP | DOWN)Rider rating: thumbs up or down.
ЁЯФд RatingCommentstringFree-text comment accompanying a restaurant rating.
ЁЯФд OrderStatusenum (PLACED | ACCEPTED | REJECTED | PREPARING | READY | OUT_FOR_DELIVERY | DELIVERED | CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER | CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT)
ЁЯФд TipRecipientenum (RIDER | RESTAURANT | CAPTAIN)Who a tip goes to (ADR-012). Tips are separate from the core 3-way split and Captain skims 0% (100% passes through); a tip to CAPTAIN is the tipper's explicit choice, not a cut of others' tips.
ЁЯФд Tipperenum (CUSTOMER | RESTAURANT)Who gives a tip: the CUSTOMER (may tip rider/restaurant/Captain) or the RESTAURANT (may tip rider/ Captain тАФ e.g. thanking the courier). Derived server-side from the caller's role, not client-supplied.
ЁЯФд CartStatusenum (OPEN | CHECKED_OUT)Lifecycle of a cart. Only an OPEN cart accepts line edits or checkout. Carts are never abandoned/expired тАФ they persist until checked out, so there is no abandonment state.
ЁЯФд PaymentStatusenum (PENDING | CAPTURED | FAILED | REFUNDED)Order payment state, folded from Stripe facts (PaymentIntentCreated/Captured/Failed/Refunded).
ЁЯФд RefundStatusenum (REQUESTED | APPROVED | DENIED | REFUNDED)Lifecycle of a refund request as read models fold it from the domain facts (View_PendingRefunds): REQUESTED on RefundOpened (awaiting a restaurant/admin decision), APPROVED on RefundApproved (Stripe refund requested), DENIED on RefundDenied, REFUNDED once Stripe settles (PaymentRefunded). Distinct from RefundProcessStatus, the RefundProcess state-table run status.
ЁЯФд ComparisonBasisenum (ESTIMATED | REAL)Provenance of an Uber Eats comparison amount: REAL (the restaurant's own Uber prices, shared via HubRise after explicit opt-in тАФ ADR-0023) or ESTIMATED (coefficient-based, always labelled тАФ ADR-0024).
тЫФ Errors (22)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
тЫФ RestaurantPausedRestaurant acceptance mode is PAUSED; it cannot take orders.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз '{restaurantName}' is not taking orders right now.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ '{restaurantName}' ne prend pas de commandes pour le moment.ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
тЫФ OfferUnavailableOffer availability is UNAVAILABLE (manual flag).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз '{productName}' ({offerName}) is currently unavailable.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ '{productName}' ({offerName}) est actuellement indisponible.ЁЯУй AddCartLine
тЫФ InsufficientStockRequested quantity exceeds available stock.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Only {available} left of '{productName}' ({offerName}), but {requested} were requested.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Il ne reste que {available} de '{productName}' ({offerName}), mais {requested} ont ├йt├й demand├йs.ЁЯУй AddCartLine, ЁЯУй ChangeCartLineQuantity
тЫФ QuantityExceedsLimitRequested quantity exceeds the per-line maximum.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз You can't order that many of '{productName}'.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Vous ne pouvez pas commander autant de '{productName}'.ЁЯУй AddCartLine, ЁЯУй ChangeCartLineQuantity
тЫФ InvalidOptionSelectionA selected option does not belong to the offer, or violates the option list's min/max.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Invalid option selection for '{productName}'.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ S├йlection d'options invalide pour '{productName}'.ЁЯУй AddCartLine
тЫФ CartNotFoundNo cart with this id.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Cart not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Panier introuvable.ЁЯУй AddCartLine, ЁЯУй RemoveCartLine, ЁЯУй ChangeCartLineQuantity, ЁЯУй BindCartToCustomer, ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
тЫФ CartNotOpenCart is not OPEN (already checked out).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This cart can no longer be modified.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Ce panier ne peut plus ├кtre modifi├й.ЁЯУй AddCartLine, ЁЯУй RemoveCartLine, ЁЯУй ChangeCartLineQuantity, ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
тЫФ CartRestaurantMismatchLine/checkout restaurant differs from the cart's restaurant (no mixing).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Your cart already has items from another restaurant, not '{restaurantName}'.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Votre panier contient d├йj├а des articles d'un autre restaurant que '{restaurantName}'.ЁЯУй AddCartLine
тЫФ CartLineNotFoundNo line with this id in the cart.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This cart line no longer exists.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Cette ligne du panier n'existe plus.ЁЯУй RemoveCartLine, ЁЯУй ChangeCartLineQuantity
тЫФ CartEmptyCheckout attempted on an empty cart.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Your cart is empty.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Votre panier est vide.ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
тЫФ OrderNotFoundNo order with this id.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Order not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Commande introuvable.ЁЯУй AcceptOrder, ЁЯУй StartPreparation, ЁЯУй MarkOrderReady, ЁЯУй MarkOrderDelivered, ЁЯУй RejectOrder, ЁЯУй CancelOrderByCustomer, ЁЯУй CancelOrderByRestaurant, ЁЯУй RateOrder, ЁЯУй RateRestaurant, ЁЯУй TipOrder, ЁЯУй RequestRefund
тЫФ InvalidOrderStatusOrder is not in a status that allows this transition.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This action is not allowed while the order is '{currentStatus}'.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Cette action n'est pas autoris├йe tant que la commande est '{currentStatus}'.ЁЯУй AcceptOrder, ЁЯУй StartPreparation, ЁЯУй MarkOrderReady, ЁЯУй MarkOrderDelivered, ЁЯУй RejectOrder, ЁЯУй CancelOrderByCustomer, ЁЯУй CancelOrderByRestaurant, ЁЯУй RateOrder, ЁЯУй RateRestaurant, ЁЯУй TipOrder, ЁЯУй RequestRefund
тЫФ OrderAlreadyRatedThe delivery (rider thumb) has already been rated for this order; final.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз You have already rated this delivery.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Vous avez d├йj├а not├й cette livraison.ЁЯУй RateOrder
тЫФ RestaurantAlreadyRatedThe restaurant has already been rated for this order; final (one per order).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз You have already rated the restaurant for this order.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Vous avez d├йj├а not├й le restaurant pour cette commande.ЁЯУй RateRestaurant
тЫФ InvalidTipRecipientThe tipper cannot tip this recipient (e.g. a restaurant tipping itself).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз You can't send a tip to this recipient.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Vous ne pouvez pas envoyer de pourboire ├а ce destinataire.ЁЯУй TipOrder
тЫФ DeliveryAddressRequiredserviceType is DELIVERY but no delivery address was provided.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз A delivery address is required for delivery.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Une adresse de livraison est requise pour la livraison.ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
тЫФ OutsideDeliveryAreaDelivery address is outside the restaurant's delivery area.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This address is outside the delivery area of '{restaurantName}'.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Cette adresse est en dehors de la zone de livraison de '{restaurantName}'.ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
тЫФ PaymentDeclinedStripe declined the payment synchronously at checkout (no order placed).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Payment was declined.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Le paiement a ├йt├й refus├й.ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
тЫФ PriceMismatchThe client-submitted confirmation total (PlaceOrder.expectedTotal) differs from the total the server recomputed from the live catalog. The server is the only price authority: the checkout is rejected so the customer is never charged an amount other than the one they were shown. ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Prices have changed since you loaded the menu. Please review your cart and try again.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Les prix ont chang├й depuis l'affichage du menu. Veuillez v├йrifier votre panier et r├йessayer.ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
тЫФ PriceUnresolvableA cart line's price could not be resolved from the live catalog at checkout (offer or selected option no longer present). Fail-closed: the checkout is rejected тАФ the server never falls back to a client-supplied amount. ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз An item in your cart is no longer available at a known price. Please review your cart.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Un article de votre panier n'a plus de prix connu. Veuillez v├йrifier votre panier.ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
тЫФ RefundNotPendingThe refund decision (ApproveRefund / DenyRefund, by the restaurant or an admin) targets an order with no refund pending approval тАФ either no refund run exists for the order, or it was already approved, denied or settled. ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз No refund is pending approval for this order.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Aucun remboursement n'est en attente d'approbation pour cette commande.ЁЯУй ApproveRefund, ЁЯУй DenyRefund
тЫФ CannotOrderTestRestaurantA production (LIVE) order was placed against a TEST restaurant (ADR-0038 test-mode isolation). Real customers never reach test data; a TEST order may instead target a LIVE restaurant (receipt validation). ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This restaurant is not available.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Ce restaurant n'est pas disponible.ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
ЁЯУР Business rules (19)
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CartPricedFromLiveCatalogЁЯФЧ #rule-cartpricedfromlivecatalog
Cart lines are added/changed/removed and priced by the projection from the live catalog, never trusted from the client.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCartFirstLineAdded, ЁЯзк TestCartLineQuantityChanged, ЁЯзк TestCartLineRemoved
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CartRejectsUnorderableOrInvalidLineЁЯФЧ #rule-cartrejectsunorderableorinvalidline
Adding an unorderable offer or operating on an invalid/absent line is rejected.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenOfferNotOrderable, ЁЯзк TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenCartInvalid, ЁЯзк TestCartRemoveLineIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachineЁЯФЧ #rule-orderlifecyclestatusmachine
An order advances accept тЖТ prepare тЖТ ready тЖТ delivered (or reject/cancel), each transition allowed only from the correct status.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestOrderAcceptedByRestaurant, ЁЯзк TestOrderAcceptIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestOrderPreparationStarted, ЁЯзк TestOrderMarkedReady, ЁЯзк TestOrderDelivered, ЁЯзк TestOrderRejected, ЁЯзк TestOrderCancelledByCustomer, ЁЯзк TestOrderCancelledByRestaurant, ЁЯзк TestOrderLifecycleRejectsSkippedTransition, ЁЯзк TestOrderLifecycleTerminalStateRefusesTransitions
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleIsExplicitЁЯФЧ #rule-orderlifecycleisexplicit
The Order status machine is the DECLARED lifecycle (actors.yaml#/Order/lifecycle, ADR-20260720-004419), not implicit code: a move the declared transition table does not contain тАФ a skipped/repeated step, or any transition out of a terminal state (DELIVERED, REJECTED, CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER, CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT) тАФ is rejected with InvalidOrderStatus.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestOrderLifecycleRejectsSkippedTransition, ЁЯзк TestOrderLifecycleTerminalStateRefusesTransitions
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР OrderRatedOnceWhenDeliveredЁЯФЧ #rule-orderratedoncewhendelivered
A delivered order can be rated (rider thumb) exactly once.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestOrderRated, ЁЯзк TestOrderRateOrderIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RestaurantRatedOncePerOrderЁЯФЧ #rule-restaurantratedonceperorder
The restaurant can be rated exactly once per order.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestOrderRestaurantRated, ЁЯзк TestOrderRateRestaurantTwiceIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР TipsAdditiveMultiRecipientSeparateЁЯФЧ #rule-tipsadditivemultirecipientseparate
Tips (rider/restaurant/Captain, by customer or restaurant) are additive and separate from the split; an invalid recipient is rejected (ADR-0029).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestOrderTipped, ЁЯзк TestOrderTippedByRestaurant, ЁЯзк TestOrderTipIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RefundRequestByCustomerЁЯФЧ #rule-refundrequestbycustomer
A customer can request a refund for an order.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestOrderRefundRequested
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ServerPriceAuthorityЁЯФЧ #rule-serverpriceauthority
The server is the only price authority on the write path: order line totals, the order total and the payment-intent amount are recomputed at checkout from the live catalog (Offer prices, Option prices) тАФ no client-supplied amount is ever trusted. A client-submitted expectedTotal is a confirmation only, checked for equality (divergence rejects with PriceMismatch), and a cart line whose price cannot be resolved from the live catalog rejects the checkout fail-closed (PriceUnresolvable) тАФ never a fallback to the client's number.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderRecomputesPriceServerSide, ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderRejectsPriceMismatch, ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderRejectsUnresolvablePrice
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CheckoutPricesCartCreatesPaymentIntentЁЯФЧ #rule-checkoutpricescartcreatespaymentintent
Checkout reads and prices the open cart and creates a Stripe PaymentIntent; it is rejected on paused restaurant / empty cart / missing or out-of-area address / declined payment.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderCreatesPaymentIntent, ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CheckoutSnapshotFrozenAtIntentЁЯФЧ #rule-checkoutsnapshotfrozenatintent
When it creates the PaymentIntent, PlaceOrderProcess freezes the full priced checkout (cart, contact, service type, delivery address, priced items, breakdown) onto PaymentIntentCreated, so the order can be materialized from the event log alone on payment capture тАФ no out-of-log store.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderCreatesPaymentIntent, ЁЯзк TestPaymentIntentCreatedRecorded
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР OrderTestModeIsolationЁЯФЧ #rule-ordertestmodeisolation
Test-mode isolation (ADR-0038): a production (LIVE) order is rejected against a TEST restaurant, so real customers never reach test data; a TEST order MAY target a LIVE restaurant to validate the real receipt path, and TEST orders/deliveries are excluded from payouts and analytics.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderRejectsTestRestaurantForLiveOrder
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCaptureЁЯФЧ #rule-ordermaterializedonpaymentcapture
On payment capture the order is materialized and the cart is closed.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderPaymentCapturedPlacesOrder, ЁЯзк TestCartCheckedOutRecorded, ЁЯзк TestOrderPlacedBirthRecorded, ЁЯзк TestPaymentCapturedRecorded
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CheckoutAbortsOnPaymentFailureЁЯФЧ #rule-checkoutabortsonpaymentfailure
On payment failure the saga aborts, no order is placed and the cart stays open.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderPaymentFailedPlacesNothing, ЁЯзк TestPaymentFailedRecorded
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RefundOnRejectionOrCancellationЁЯФЧ #rule-refundonrejectionorcancellation
When a paid order is rejected, cancelled, or a refund is requested, a refund is opened as PENDING_APPROVAL for a restaurant/admin decision; nothing is refunded without approval.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRefundOnOrderRejected, ЁЯзк TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByCustomer, ЁЯзк TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByRestaurant, ЁЯзк TestRefundOnRefundRequested
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RefundRequiresApprovalЁЯФЧ #rule-refundrequiresapproval
Only an explicit decision тАФ by the RESTAURANT for its own orders, or by an ADMIN тАФ resolves a pending refund: ApproveRefund (possibly partial) requests the Stripe refund, DenyRefund closes it; both are rejected when no refund is pending approval for the order.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestPaymentRefundApprovedRecorded, ЁЯзк TestPaymentRefundDeniedRecorded, ЁЯзк TestRefundApprovedByAdmin, ЁЯзк TestRefundDeniedByAdmin, ЁЯзк TestRefundDecisionRejectedWhenNotPending
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RefundSettledFactRecordedЁЯФЧ #rule-refundsettledfactrecorded
The settled refund fact reported back by Stripe is recorded.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRefundSettledFactRecorded, ЁЯзк TestPaymentRefundedRecorded
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР PendingRefundVisibleUntilDecidedЁЯФЧ #rule-pendingrefundvisibleuntildecided
A refund opened for decision is recorded as a domain fact (RefundOpened on the Payment) and stays visible in the refund queue (pendingRefunds) as REQUESTED until an explicit decision resolves it; the decision and the Stripe settlement update its status (APPROVED/DENIED, then REFUNDED) instead of dropping it.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestPendingRefundVisibleUntilDecided
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР OrphanPaymentEventFlaggedЁЯФЧ #rule-orphanpaymenteventflagged
A Stripe payment outcome that matches no known checkout run is surfaced as a typed error (PaymentEventOrphaned) тАФ the recorded fact stands, but the anomaly is never silently skipped.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestPaymentCaptureOrphanIsFlagged
ЁЯзк Tests (5)

ЁЯОн Cart

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCartFirstLineAddedЁЯФЧ #test-testcartfirstlineadded
Adds the first line to a new cart (the cart is created)
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй AddCartLine
then: тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
verifies: ЁЯУР CartPricedFromLiveCatalog
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenOfferNotOrderableЁЯФЧ #test-testcartaddlineisrejectedwhenoffernotorderable
Rejects adding a line when the offer is unknown, unavailable, or out of stock
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй AddCartLine
thrown: тЫФ OfferNotFound, тЫФ OfferUnavailable, тЫФ InsufficientStock
verifies: ЁЯУР CartRejectsUnorderableOrInvalidLine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenCartInvalidЁЯФЧ #test-testcartaddlineisrejectedwhencartinvalid
Rejects adding a line on a missing/closed/mismatched cart, with a bad option selection, or over the quantity limit
given: тЪб CartStarted
when: ЁЯУй AddCartLine
thrown: тЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartRestaurantMismatch, тЫФ InvalidOptionSelection, тЫФ QuantityExceedsLimit
verifies: ЁЯУР CartRejectsUnorderableOrInvalidLine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCartLineQuantityChangedЁЯФЧ #test-testcartlinequantitychanged
Changes the quantity of an existing cart line
given: тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
when: ЁЯУй ChangeCartLineQuantity
then: тЪб CartLineQuantityChanged
verifies: ЁЯУР CartPricedFromLiveCatalog
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCartLineRemovedЁЯФЧ #test-testcartlineremoved
Removes a line from a cart
given: тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
when: ЁЯУй RemoveCartLine
then: тЪб CartLineRemoved
verifies: ЁЯУР CartPricedFromLiveCatalog
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCartRemoveLineIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcartremovelineisrejected
Rejects removing a line from a missing/closed cart or a line that does not exist
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RemoveCartLine
thrown: тЫФ CartNotFound, тЫФ CartNotOpen, тЫФ CartLineNotFound
verifies: ЁЯУР CartRejectsUnorderableOrInvalidLine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCartBoundToCustomerЁЯФЧ #test-testcartboundtocustomer
A guest cart is bound to the identified customer (one-time bind)
given: тЪб CartStarted
when: ЁЯУй BindCartToCustomer
then: тЪб CartBoundToCustomer
verifies: ЁЯУР GuestCartsBoundOnIdentification
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCartCheckedOutRecordedЁЯФЧ #test-testcartcheckedoutrecorded
The Cart records the checkout fact delivered by PlaceOrderProcess and closes (idempotent)
given: тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
when: ЁЯУй CartCheckedOut
then: тЪб CartCheckedOut
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCapture

ЁЯОн Order

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderAcceptedByRestaurantЁЯФЧ #test-testorderacceptedbyrestaurant
Restaurant accepts a placed order
given: тЪб OrderPlaced
when: ЁЯУй AcceptOrder
then: тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderAcceptIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testorderacceptisrejected
Rejects accepting a missing order or one not in an acceptable status
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй AcceptOrder
thrown: тЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderPreparationStartedЁЯФЧ #test-testorderpreparationstarted
Restaurant starts preparing an accepted order
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
when: ЁЯУй StartPreparation
then: тЪб OrderPreparationStarted
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderMarkedReadyЁЯФЧ #test-testordermarkedready
Restaurant marks the order ready for pickup/delivery
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, тЪб OrderPreparationStarted
when: ЁЯУй MarkOrderReady
then: тЪб OrderMarkedReady
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderDeliveredЁЯФЧ #test-testorderdelivered
The order is delivered to the customer
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderMarkedReady
when: ЁЯУй MarkOrderDelivered
then: тЪб OrderDelivered
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testorderrejected
Restaurant rejects a placed order
given: тЪб OrderPlaced
when: ЁЯУй RejectOrder
then: тЪб OrderRejectedByRestaurant
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderCancelledByCustomerЁЯФЧ #test-testordercancelledbycustomer
Customer cancels the order before acceptance
given: тЪб OrderPlaced
when: ЁЯУй CancelOrderByCustomer
then: тЪб OrderCancelledByCustomer
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderCancelledByRestaurantЁЯФЧ #test-testordercancelledbyrestaurant
Restaurant cancels an order it had accepted
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
when: ЁЯУй CancelOrderByRestaurant
then: тЪб OrderCancelledByRestaurant
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderLifecycleRejectsSkippedTransitionЁЯФЧ #test-testorderlifecyclerejectsskippedtransition
Rejects a move the declared Order state machine does not contain (accepting an already-accepted order)
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
when: ЁЯУй AcceptOrder
thrown: тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleIsExplicit, ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderLifecycleTerminalStateRefusesTransitionsЁЯФЧ #test-testorderlifecycleterminalstaterefusestransitions
Rejects any lifecycle transition out of a terminal state (cancelling a delivered order)
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderMarkedReady, тЪб OrderDelivered
when: ЁЯУй CancelOrderByRestaurant
thrown: тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleIsExplicit, ЁЯУР OrderLifecycleStatusMachine
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderRatedЁЯФЧ #test-testorderrated
Customer rates the delivery (rider thumb) after delivery
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderDelivered
when: ЁЯУй RateOrder
then: тЪб OrderRated
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderRatedOnceWhenDelivered
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderRateOrderIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testorderrateorderisrejected
Rejects rating the delivery of a missing/not-delivered order or rating it twice
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RateOrder
thrown: тЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus, тЫФ OrderAlreadyRated
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderRatedOnceWhenDelivered
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderRestaurantRatedЁЯФЧ #test-testorderrestaurantrated
Customer rates the restaurant after delivery
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderDelivered
when: ЁЯУй RateRestaurant
then: тЪб RestaurantRated
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantRatedOncePerOrder
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderRateRestaurantTwiceIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testorderraterestauranttwiceisrejected
Rejects rating the restaurant a second time for the same order
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderDelivered, тЪб RestaurantRated
when: ЁЯУй RateRestaurant
thrown: тЫФ RestaurantAlreadyRated
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantRatedOncePerOrder
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderTippedЁЯФЧ #test-testordertipped
Customer tips the rider, restaurant and Captain after delivery
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderDelivered
when: ЁЯУй TipOrder
then: тЪб OrderTipped
verifies: ЁЯУР TipsAdditiveMultiRecipientSeparate
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderTippedByRestaurantЁЯФЧ #test-testordertippedbyrestaurant
Restaurant tips the rider (thanking the courier)
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderDelivered
when: ЁЯУй TipOrder
then: тЪб OrderTipped
verifies: ЁЯУР TipsAdditiveMultiRecipientSeparate
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderTipIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testordertipisrejected
Rejects tipping a missing order, or a restaurant tipping itself
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй TipOrder
thrown: тЫФ OrderNotFound, тЫФ InvalidOrderStatus, тЫФ InvalidTipRecipient
verifies: ЁЯУР TipsAdditiveMultiRecipientSeparate
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderRefundRequestedЁЯФЧ #test-testorderrefundrequested
Customer requests a refund for a delivered order
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderDelivered
when: ЁЯУй RequestRefund
then: тЪб RefundRequested
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundRequestByCustomer
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestOrderPlacedBirthRecordedЁЯФЧ #test-testorderplacedbirthrecorded
The Order is born by recording the OrderPlaced fact delivered by PlaceOrderProcess (idempotent)
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй OrderPlaced
then: тЪб OrderPlaced
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCapture

ЁЯОн Payment

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPaymentIntentCreatedRecordedЁЯФЧ #test-testpaymentintentcreatedrecorded
The Payment is born by recording PaymentIntentCreated with the frozen checkout snapshot
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй PaymentIntentCreated
then: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated
verifies: ЁЯУР CheckoutSnapshotFrozenAtIntent
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPaymentCapturedRecordedЁЯФЧ #test-testpaymentcapturedrecorded
The Payment records the inbound Stripe capture fact (delivered via the ACL, idempotent)
given: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated
when: ЁЯУй PaymentCaptured
then: тЪб PaymentCaptured
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCapture
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPaymentFailedRecordedЁЯФЧ #test-testpaymentfailedrecorded
The Payment records the inbound Stripe failure fact (cart stays open downstream)
given: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated
when: ЁЯУй PaymentFailed
then: тЪб PaymentFailed
verifies: ЁЯУР CheckoutAbortsOnPaymentFailure
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPaymentRefundedRecordedЁЯФЧ #test-testpaymentrefundedrecorded
The Payment records the settled refund fact reported by Stripe (idempotent)
given: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated, тЪб PaymentCaptured
when: ЁЯУй PaymentRefunded
then: тЪб PaymentRefunded
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundSettledFactRecorded
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPendingRefundVisibleUntilDecidedЁЯФЧ #test-testpendingrefundvisibleuntildecided
The Payment records the opened refund (RefundOpened, idempotent) so the refund queue folds it as REQUESTED until decided
given: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated, тЪб PaymentCaptured
when: ЁЯУй RefundOpened
then: тЪб RefundOpened
verifies: ЁЯУР PendingRefundVisibleUntilDecided
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPaymentRefundApprovedRecordedЁЯФЧ #test-testpaymentrefundapprovedrecorded
The Payment records the refund approval (restaurant or admin) delivered by RefundProcess
given: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated, тЪб PaymentCaptured
when: ЁЯУй RefundApproved
then: тЪб RefundApproved
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundRequiresApproval
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPaymentRefundDeniedRecordedЁЯФЧ #test-testpaymentrefunddeniedrecorded
The Payment records the refund denial (restaurant or admin) delivered by RefundProcess
given: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated, тЪб PaymentCaptured
when: ЁЯУй RefundDenied
then: тЪб RefundDenied
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundRequiresApproval

ЁЯОн PlaceOrderProcess

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderCreatesPaymentIntentЁЯФЧ #test-testplaceordercreatespaymentintent
Checkout reads the open cart, prices it, and creates a Stripe payment intent
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantActivated, тЪб CatalogCreated, тЪб ProductAdded, тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
when: ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
then: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated
verifies: ЁЯУР CheckoutPricesCartCreatesPaymentIntent, ЁЯУР CheckoutSnapshotFrozenAtIntent
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderRecomputesPriceServerSideЁЯФЧ #test-testplaceorderrecomputespriceserverside
Checkout recomputes every line total and the order total from the live catalog; a matching client confirmation total passes
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantActivated, тЪб CatalogCreated, тЪб ProductAdded, тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
when: ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
then: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated
verifies: ЁЯУР ServerPriceAuthority
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderRejectsPriceMismatchЁЯФЧ #test-testplaceorderrejectspricemismatch
A client confirmation total that diverges from the server-recomputed total rejects the checkout (server is the price authority)
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantActivated, тЪб CatalogCreated, тЪб ProductAdded, тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
when: ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
thrown: тЫФ PriceMismatch
verifies: ЁЯУР ServerPriceAuthority
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderRejectsUnresolvablePriceЁЯФЧ #test-testplaceorderrejectsunresolvableprice
A cart line whose price cannot be resolved from the live catalog rejects the checkout fail-closed (never the client's number)
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantActivated, тЪб CatalogCreated, тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
when: ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
thrown: тЫФ PriceUnresolvable
verifies: ЁЯУР ServerPriceAuthority
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testplaceorderisrejected
Rejects checkout when the restaurant is paused, the cart is empty, the delivery address is missing or out of area, or the payment is declined
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantActivated, тЪб CartStarted
when: ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
thrown: тЫФ RestaurantPaused, тЫФ CartEmpty, тЫФ DeliveryAddressRequired, тЫФ OutsideDeliveryArea, тЫФ PaymentDeclined
verifies: ЁЯУР CheckoutPricesCartCreatesPaymentIntent
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderRejectsTestRestaurantForLiveOrderЁЯФЧ #test-testplaceorderrejectstestrestaurantforliveorder
A production (LIVE) order against a TEST restaurant is rejected (test-mode isolation)
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб RestaurantActivated, тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded
when: ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
thrown: тЫФ CannotOrderTestRestaurant
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderTestModeIsolation
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderPaymentCapturedPlacesOrderЁЯФЧ #test-testplaceorderpaymentcapturedplacesorder
On payment capture the saga materializes the order and closes the cart
given: тЪб CartStarted, тЪб CartLineAdded, тЪб PaymentIntentCreated
when: ЁЯУй PaymentCaptured
then: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб CartCheckedOut
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderMaterializedOnPaymentCapture
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPlaceOrderPaymentFailedPlacesNothingЁЯФЧ #test-testplaceorderpaymentfailedplacesnothing
On payment failure the saga aborts and places no order (cart stays open)
given: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated
when: ЁЯУй PaymentFailed
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР CheckoutAbortsOnPaymentFailure
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestPaymentCaptureOrphanIsFlaggedЁЯФЧ #test-testpaymentcaptureorphanisflagged
A capture matching no checkout run aborts the saga with a typed error (never a silent skip)
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй PaymentCaptured
thrown: тЫФ PaymentEventOrphaned
verifies: ЁЯУР OrphanPaymentEventFlagged

ЁЯОн RefundProcess

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRefundOnOrderRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testrefundonorderrejected
Requests a Stripe refund when an order is rejected by the restaurant
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй OrderRejectedByRestaurant
then: тЪб RefundOpened
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundOnRejectionOrCancellation
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByCustomerЁЯФЧ #test-testrefundonordercancelledbycustomer
Requests a Stripe refund when the customer cancels the order
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй OrderCancelledByCustomer
then: тЪб RefundOpened
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundOnRejectionOrCancellation
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByRestaurantЁЯФЧ #test-testrefundonordercancelledbyrestaurant
Requests a Stripe refund when the restaurant cancels the order
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй OrderCancelledByRestaurant
then: тЪб RefundOpened
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundOnRejectionOrCancellation
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRefundOnRefundRequestedЁЯФЧ #test-testrefundonrefundrequested
Validates eligibility and requests a Stripe refund on a customer refund request
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RefundRequested
then: тЪб RefundOpened
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundOnRejectionOrCancellation
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRefundSettledFactRecordedЁЯФЧ #test-testrefundsettledfactrecorded
Records the settled refund fact reported back by Stripe
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй PaymentRefunded
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundSettledFactRecorded
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRefundApprovedByAdminЁЯФЧ #test-testrefundapprovedbyadmin
The restaurant or an admin approves the pending refund: Stripe refund requested, decision recorded on the Payment
given: тЪб RefundRequested
when: ЁЯУй ApproveRefund
then: тЪб RefundApproved
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundRequiresApproval
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRefundDeniedByAdminЁЯФЧ #test-testrefunddeniedbyadmin
The restaurant or an admin denies the pending refund: the run closes with the decision recorded on the Payment
given: тЪб RefundRequested
when: ЁЯУй DenyRefund
then: тЪб RefundDenied
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundRequiresApproval
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRefundDecisionRejectedWhenNotPendingЁЯФЧ #test-testrefunddecisionrejectedwhennotpending
A refund decision on an order with no refund pending approval is rejected
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй ApproveRefund
thrown: тЫФ RefundNotPending
verifies: ЁЯУР RefundRequiresApproval
ЁЯУб Observability (2)
тЦ╕Contract: ЁЯУб place-orderЁЯФЧ #obs-place-order
criticality: high
workflow: saga ЁЯУж PlaceOrderProcess ┬╖ command ЁЯУй PlaceOrder
emits: тЪб PaymentIntentCreated, тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб CartCheckedOut ┬╖ inbound: тЪб PaymentCaptured, тЪб PaymentFailed
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key

ЁЯФ▓ 4. customer ЁЯФЧ
Customer-facing consumer domain: discovery/browse, identity (phone-keyed), favorites, profile, address book, cart & ordering use-cases; cart binding.
ЁЯз░ API operations (19)
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО paymentStatusЁЯФЧ #query-paymentstatus
The checkout payment state for an order (ADR-20260720-015500): paymentIntentId, clientSecret while the run is in flight, and the folded PaymentStatus тАФ the read-side home of the values placeOrder used to return. Served from the PlaceOrderProcess run row (the declared exception to PM-table privacy). Literal roles [PUBLIC, CUSTOMER, ADMIN] (#13/#31): the checkout paths only, ownership-scoped in the resolver тАФ the checkout's customer, its anonymous session (X-SESSION-ID), or ADMIN; strangers resolve null (never an existence oracle).
input: ЁЯзй PaymentStatusQueryInput! { orderId: ЁЯФд OrderId }
returns: ЁЯзй PaymentIntent ┬╖ reads тАФ
roles: PUBLIC, CUSTOMER, ADMIN ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО meЁЯФЧ #query-me
The signed-in customer's own profile (resolves the session authRef тЖТ Customer via Customer).
input: (none)
returns: ЁЯзй CustomerProfile ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П Customer
roles: CUSTOMER ┬╖ V1
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО favoriteRestaurantsЁЯФЧ #query-favoriterestaurants
The customer's favorited restaurants (Customer.favorite_restaurant_ids joined to Restaurant).
input: ЁЯзй FavoriteRestaurantsQueryInput! { customerId: ЁЯФд CustomerId }
returns: ЁЯзй Restaurant [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П Restaurant
roles: CUSTOMER ┬╖ V1
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО cartsЁЯФЧ #query-carts
A customer's carts (one OPEN cart per restaurant).
input: ЁЯзй CartsQueryInput! { customerId: ЁЯФд CustomerId }
returns: ЁЯзй Cart [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П Cart
roles: CUSTOMER, ADMIN ┬╖ V0

тЦ╕Subscription: ЁЯФФ paymentStatusChangedЁЯФЧ #subscription-paymentstatuschanged
Checkout payment-state changes for one order (the push counterpart of queries/paymentStatus, ADR-20260720-015500): re-resolves the PlaceOrderProcess run row on Payment-stream events, so the checkout page receives the clientSecret and the terminal CAPTURED/FAILED without polling. Literal roles like the query (#31), ownership-scoped at stream setup (customer / session / ADMIN) тАФ strangers get an empty stream.
input: ЁЯзй PaymentStatusChangedSubscriptionInput! { orderId: ЁЯФд OrderId }
streams: ЁЯзй PaymentIntent
roles: PUBLIC, CUSTOMER, ADMIN ┬╖ V0
ЁЯзй Output types (1)
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй CustomerProfileЁЯФЧ #type-customerprofile
A customer's own profile (display name + contact). Backed by the identity read model; surfaced to the customer only (profile management is V1 тАФ no V0 query yet).
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П Customer
FieldTypeReq.
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
displayNameЁЯФд CustomerDisplayNameтмЬ nullable
emailЁЯФд EmailAddressтмЬ nullable
emailVerifiedbooleanтЬЕ required
phoneЁЯФд PhoneNumberтЬЕ required
localeЁЯФд LocaleтмЬ nullable
timezoneЁЯФд TimeZoneтмЬ nullable
ЁЯОн Actors (2)
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн CustomerЁЯФЧ #actor-customer
A customer identity, keyed by phone number and linked to the auth provider user (authRef).
ЁЯзй aggregate
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
ЁЯУй RequestPhoneVerificationDelegate to Supabase Auth: send an SMS OTP (Twilio; mock in dev). No event.тАФ
ЁЯУй VerifyPhoneтЪб CustomerRegistered, тЪб CustomerIdentifiedтЫФ InvalidVerificationCode, тЫФ VerificationCodeExpired
ЁЯУй RequestEmailVerificationDelegate to Supabase Auth: send an email magic link (localized via the stored locale). No event.тЫФ EmailAlreadyInUse
ЁЯУй ConfirmEmailVerificationтЪб CustomerEmailVerifiedтЫФ InvalidVerificationToken, тЫФ VerificationCodeExpired
ЁЯУй RequestPhoneChangeDelegate to Supabase Auth: send an SMS OTP to the new phone. No event.тЫФ PhoneAlreadyInUse
ЁЯУй ConfirmPhoneChangeтЪб CustomerPhoneChangedтЫФ InvalidVerificationCode, тЫФ VerificationCodeExpired, тЫФ PhoneAlreadyInUse
ЁЯУй ChangeLanguageтЪб CustomerLanguageChangedтАФ
ЁЯУй MarkRestaurantAsFavoriteтЪб RestaurantFavoritedтЫФ RestaurantNotFound
ЁЯУй UnmarkRestaurantAsFavoriteтЪб RestaurantUnfavoritedтАФ
ЁЯУй UpdateCustomerInfoтЪб CustomerInfoUpdatedтЫФ NoEditableFieldProvided
ЁЯУй SetCustomerPreferencesтЪб CustomerPreferencesSetтАФ
ЁЯУй SetCustomerAddressтЪб CustomerAddressSetтАФ
ЁЯУй RemoveCustomerAddressтЪб CustomerAddressRemovedтАФ
ЁЯУй SetCustomerPaymentMethodтЪб CustomerPaymentMethodSetтАФ
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн CartBindingProcessЁЯФЧ #actor-cartbindingprocess
Binds a returning visitor's OPEN guest carts to their Customer. Reacts to CustomerIdentified (authRef тЖТ customerId) by sending BindCartToCustomer for each OPEN cart of the session тАФ the Cart aggregate owns the bind fact (CartBoundToCustomer); the state row makes a re-delivered CustomerIdentified a no-op.
тЪЩя╕П process manager
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
тЪб CustomerIdentifiedтЪб CartBoundToCustomerтАФ
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant IN as Inbox (trigger)
  participant PM as CartBindingProcess (decides)
  participant ST as cart_binding_process_manager (state)
  participant RM_Cart as Cart (read model)
  participant AG_Cart as Cart (aggregate)
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: CustomerIdentified (event)
  PM->>RM_Cart: read as open_carts [session_id=CustomerIdentified.sessionId, status=OPEN]
  PM->>AG_Cart: send BindCartToCustomer (for each open_carts) тАФ the aggregate validates
  PM->>ST: set session_id=CustomerIdentified.sessionId, customer_id=CustomerIdentified.customerId
  end
ЁЯЧДя╕П Views (1)
тЦ╕View: ЁЯЧДя╕П CustomerЁЯФЧ #view-customer
source: ЁЯОн Customer ┬╖ ЁЯЫ╢ V0
Identity/lookup read model: resolves a returning phone (or auth_ref) to an existing Customer, backs VerifyPhone idempotency + auth resolution, and serves the `me` query (CustomerProfile). Also bound when CustomerIdentified stamps carts. The stored `locale` localizes authenticated SMS/email sends.
fed by: тЪб CustomerRegistered, тЪб RestaurantRated, тЪб RestaurantFavorited, тЪб RestaurantUnfavorited, тЪб CustomerInfoUpdated, тЪб CustomerEmailVerified, тЪб CustomerPhoneChanged, тЪб CustomerLanguageChanged, тЪб CustomerPreferencesSet, тЪб CustomerAddressSet, тЪб CustomerAddressRemoved, тЪб CustomerPaymentMethodSet
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
customer_idЁЯФд CustomerId (derived)тЪб CustomerRegistered.customerIdPK
phoneЁЯФд PhoneNumber (derived)тЪб CustomerRegistered.phone, тЪб CustomerPhoneChanged.phoneunique
auth_refЁЯФд ExternalReference (derived)тЪб CustomerRegistered.authRefindex, nullableAuth provider user id (Supabase Auth) тЖТ Customer.
display_nameЁЯФд CustomerDisplayName (derived)тЪб CustomerRegistered.displayName, тЪб CustomerInfoUpdated.displayNamenullable
emailЁЯФд EmailAddress (derived)тЪб CustomerRegistered.email, тЪб CustomerEmailVerified.emailnullable
email_verifiedbooleanтЪб CustomerEmailVerifiedтАФTrue once an email magic link has been confirmed (CustomerEmailVerified).
localeЁЯФд Locale (derived)тЪб CustomerRegistered.locale, тЪб CustomerLanguageChanged.localenullablei18n culture; set at registration or via ChangeLanguage. Localizes authenticated SMS/email sends.
timezoneЁЯФд TimeZone (derived)тЪб CustomerRegistered.timezone, тЪб CustomerPreferencesSet.timezonenullable
ratingsjsonbтЪб RestaurantRatedтАФThe customer's own submitted ratings (assembled from RestaurantRated): [{ order_id, restaurant_id, stars, comment, rated_at }].
favorite_restaurant_idsjsonbтЪб RestaurantFavorited, тЪб RestaurantUnfavoritedтАФ[restaurant_id] the customer favorited.
preferencesjsonbтЪб CustomerPreferencesSetnullable{ dietary_tags: [...], favorite_cuisines: [...] } from CustomerPreferencesSet.
addressesjsonbтЪб CustomerAddressSet, тЪб CustomerAddressRemovedтАФSaved address book: [{ address_id, label, address }] from CustomerAddressSet/Removed.
payment_method_idЁЯФд PaymentMethodId (derived)тЪб CustomerPaymentMethodSet.paymentMethodIdnullable
created_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
updated_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)
ЁЯУй Commands (14)
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй RequestPhoneVerificationЁЯФЧ #command-requestphoneverification
Ask Supabase Auth to send an SMS OTP to a phone (Twilio; a mock provider in dev). Emits no event. `locale` localizes the message; when absent it defaults from the dialing code (e.g. '+33' тЖТ fr-FR).
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П requestPhoneVerification ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Customer
emits: тАФ
throws: тАФ
FieldTypeReq.Description
dialingCodeЁЯФд DialingCodeтЬЕ required
nationalNumberЁЯФд NationalPhoneNumberтЬЕ required
localeЁЯФд LocaleтмЬ nullableSMS language; defaults from the dialing code's country when absent.
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй VerifyPhoneЁЯФЧ #command-verifyphone
Verify the SMS OTP with Supabase Auth, then register-or-identify: a first verified phone CREATES the Customer (CustomerRegistered), a returning phone RESOLVES + signs in (CustomerIdentified). The backend decides new-vs-returning; the client never calls register/identify directly.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П verifyPhone ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Customer
emits: тЪб CustomerRegistered, тЪб CustomerIdentified
throws: тЫФ InvalidVerificationCode, тЫФ VerificationCodeExpired
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ requiredClient-generated id, used only when the phone is new; ignored for a returning phone.
dialingCodeЁЯФд DialingCodeтЬЕ required
nationalNumberЁЯФд NationalPhoneNumberтЬЕ required
codeЁЯФд OtpCodeтЬЕ required
sessionIdЁЯФд SessionIdтЬЕ requiredThe visitor session verifying the phone тАФ carried onto CustomerIdentified so CartBindingProcess binds this session's open carts.
displayNameЁЯФд CustomerDisplayNameтмЬ nullable
localeЁЯФд LocaleтмЬ nullablePersisted on registration; defaults from the dialing code when absent.
timezoneЁЯФд TimeZoneтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй RequestEmailVerificationЁЯФЧ #command-requestemailverification
Ask Supabase Auth to email a magic link to verify/link an email for the signed-in customer. Emits no event; the message is localized via the customer's STORED locale (no per-call language param).
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П requestEmailVerification ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Customer
emits: тАФ
throws: тЫФ EmailAlreadyInUse
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
emailЁЯФд EmailAddressтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй ConfirmEmailVerificationЁЯФЧ #command-confirmemailverification
Confirm an email magic link: the client returns the Supabase token, we VERIFY it server-side and link the now-verified email to the Customer. Used for both the initial email and later changes.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П confirmEmailVerification ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Customer
emits: тЪб CustomerEmailVerified
throws: тЫФ InvalidVerificationToken, тЫФ VerificationCodeExpired
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
tokenЁЯФд EmailVerificationTokenтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй RequestPhoneChangeЁЯФЧ #command-requestphonechange
Ask Supabase to send an SMS OTP to a NEW phone for a signed-in customer (stored locale). Emits no event.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П requestPhoneChange ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Customer
emits: тАФ
throws: тЫФ PhoneAlreadyInUse
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
newDialingCodeЁЯФд DialingCodeтЬЕ required
newNationalNumberЁЯФд NationalPhoneNumberтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй ConfirmPhoneChangeЁЯФЧ #command-confirmphonechange
Verify the OTP on the new phone and change the customer's phone (тЖТ canonical E.164 PhoneNumber).
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П confirmPhoneChange ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Customer
emits: тЪб CustomerPhoneChanged
throws: тЫФ InvalidVerificationCode, тЫФ VerificationCodeExpired, тЫФ PhoneAlreadyInUse
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
newDialingCodeЁЯФд DialingCodeтЬЕ required
newNationalNumberЁЯФд NationalPhoneNumberтЬЕ required
codeЁЯФд OtpCodeтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй ChangeLanguageЁЯФЧ #command-changelanguage
Persist the customer's preferred language (the single locale setter). The stored locale then localizes subsequent authenticated SMS/email sends тАФ so they need no per-call language param.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П changeLanguage ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Customer
emits: тЪб CustomerLanguageChanged
throws: тАФ
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
localeЁЯФд LocaleтЬЕ required

тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй SetCustomerPaymentMethodЁЯФЧ #command-setcustomerpaymentmethod
Customer sets or updates their preferred Stripe payment method.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П setCustomerPaymentMethod ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн Customer
emits: тЪб CustomerPaymentMethodSet
throws: тАФ
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
paymentMethodIdЁЯФд PaymentMethodIdтЬЕ required
тЪб Events (12)
тЦ╕Event: тЪб CustomerRegisteredЁЯФЧ #event-customerregistered
A customer account was created on first phone verification (passwordless OTP, identity managed by the auth provider). Phone number is the primary identifier.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Customer
consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П Customer
FieldTypeReq.Description
modeЁЯФд ModeтмЬ optional
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
authRefЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullableAuth provider user id (e.g. Supabase Auth), linking identity to this Customer.
phoneЁЯФд PhoneNumberтЬЕ required
displayNameЁЯФд CustomerDisplayNameтмЬ nullable
emailЁЯФд EmailAddressтмЬ nullableOptional, e.g. captured later for receipts.
localeЁЯФд LocaleтмЬ nullablePreferred culture (language + date/time/number display).
timezoneЁЯФд TimeZoneтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Event: тЪб CustomerIdentifiedЁЯФЧ #event-customeridentified
A returning visitor signed in and was resolved to an existing Customer (authRef тЖТ customerId). NOT an auth event (OTP/session live in the auth provider): this records the DOMAIN fact so the visitor's OPEN guest carts can be bound to the customerId тАФ letting carts started on different devices converge under one customer and be merged at checkout. Thanks to the sessionId, the existing open cart(s) can be bound to the customerId and merged at checkout. This is a domain event, not an auth event.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Customer
consumed by: ЁЯОн CartBindingProcess
projected into: тАФ
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
authRefЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтЬЕ requiredAuth provider user id that was matched to this Customer (via Customer.auth_ref).
sessionIdЁЯФд SessionIdтЬЕ requiredSession id (ADR-0041) for the sign-in event; not required for cart binding.

тЦ╕Event: тЪб CustomerPaymentMethodSetЁЯФЧ #event-customerpaymentmethodset
Customer set or updated their preferred Stripe payment method.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Customer
consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П Customer
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerIdЁЯФд CustomerIdтЬЕ required
paymentMethodIdЁЯФд PaymentMethodIdтЬЕ required
ЁЯФд Scalars (7)
ScalarTypeDescription
ЁЯФд AddressIdstring uuidIdentifies a saved address in a customer's address book.
ЁЯФд PaymentMethodIdstringStripe PaymentMethod id (provider reference). Example: 'pm_1Nabc...'.
ЁЯФд DialingCodestring ^\+[0-9]{1,4}$Country dialing/calling code in '+NN' form (e.g. '+33', '+1'). This is what the phone-country picker emits and what the auth commands receive тАФ NOT the ISO country code.
ЁЯФд NationalPhoneNumberstringNational (subscriber) part of a phone number, without the dialing code. E.g. '0612345678' or '612345678'.
ЁЯФд OtpCodestring ^[0-9]{4,8}$One-time SMS code from Supabase Auth (sent via Twilio; a mock provider in dev).
ЁЯФд EmailVerificationTokenstringOpaque Supabase token from an email magic link; verified server-side (never trusted as a bare client claim).
ЁЯФд Localestring ^[a-z]{2}-[A-Z]{2}$i18n culture code, language-REGION (BCP 47 / .NET CultureInfo). Example: 'fr-FR', 'en-US'. Drives the UI language AND the display of dates, times and numbers (paired with TimeZone for the zone).
тЫФ Errors (5)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
тЫФ InvalidVerificationCodeThe SMS OTP code does not match (rejected by Supabase Auth).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The verification code is incorrect. Please try again.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Le code de v├йrification est incorrect. Veuillez r├йessayer.ЁЯУй VerifyPhone, ЁЯУй ConfirmPhoneChange
тЫФ VerificationCodeExpiredThe SMS OTP (or email link) has expired; request a new one.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Le code de v├йrification a expir├й. Veuillez en demander un nouveau.ЁЯУй VerifyPhone, ЁЯУй ConfirmEmailVerification, ЁЯУй ConfirmPhoneChange
тЫФ InvalidVerificationTokenThe email magic-link token failed server-side verification with Supabase Auth.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This email verification link is invalid or has already been used.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Ce lien de v├йrification d'e-mail est invalide ou a d├йj├а ├йt├й utilis├й.ЁЯУй ConfirmEmailVerification
тЫФ EmailAlreadyInUseThe email is already linked to another customer.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The email '{email}' is already in use by another account.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ L'e-mail '{email}' est d├йj├а utilis├й par un autre compte.ЁЯУй RequestEmailVerification
тЫФ PhoneAlreadyInUseThe phone number is already linked to another customer (on change).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The phone number '{phone}' is already in use by another account.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Le num├йro '{phone}' est d├йj├а utilis├й par un autre compte.ЁЯУй RequestPhoneChange, ЁЯУй ConfirmPhoneChange
ЁЯУР Business rules (9)
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifiesЁЯФЧ #rule-phoneverificationregistersoridentifies
Phone-OTP verification registers a new customer or identifies a returning one; an invalid code is rejected.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestPhoneVerification, ЁЯзк TestCustomerVerifyPhoneRegisters, ЁЯзк TestCustomerVerifyPhoneReturningIdentifies, ЁЯзк TestCustomerVerifyPhoneIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValidЁЯФЧ #rule-emailverificationuniquetokenvalid
Email verification requires a unique email and a valid token; duplicates/invalid tokens are rejected.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestEmailVerification, ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestEmailVerificationDuplicateIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCustomerConfirmEmailVerification, ЁЯзк TestCustomerConfirmEmailInvalidTokenIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР PhoneChangeVerifiedAndUniqueЁЯФЧ #rule-phonechangeverifiedandunique
A phone change is verified and must be unique; a duplicate is rejected.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestPhoneChange, ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestPhoneChangeDuplicateIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCustomerConfirmPhoneChange
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CustomerProfileUpdateЁЯФЧ #rule-customerprofileupdate
A customer can change language and profile info; an update with no field is rejected.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCustomerChangeLanguage, ЁЯзк TestCustomerInfoUpdated, ЁЯзк TestCustomerUpdateWithoutFieldIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CustomerPreferencesЁЯФЧ #rule-customerpreferences
A customer's preferences can be set.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCustomerPreferencesSet
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР FavoritesManagementЁЯФЧ #rule-favoritesmanagement
A customer can favorite/unfavorite restaurants; favoriting an unknown one is rejected and unfavoriting a non-favorite is a no-op.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRestaurantFavorited, ЁЯзк TestCustomerFavoriteUnknownRestaurantIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestCustomerRestaurantUnfavorited, ЁЯзк TestCustomerUnfavoriteNonFavoriteIsNoOp
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР AddressBookManagementЁЯФЧ #rule-addressbookmanagement
A customer can add/update and remove saved delivery addresses.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCustomerAddressSet, ЁЯзк TestCustomerAddressRemoved
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР PaymentMethodStorageЁЯФЧ #rule-paymentmethodstorage
A customer's payment method can be stored.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCustomerPaymentMethodSet
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР GuestCartsBoundOnIdentificationЁЯФЧ #rule-guestcartsboundonidentification
A returning visitor's open guest carts are bound to their Customer on identification.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCartBindingOnCustomerIdentified, ЁЯзк TestCartBoundToCustomer
ЁЯзк Tests (2)

ЁЯОн Customer

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestPhoneVerificationЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerrequestphoneverification
Sends an SMS OTP to a phone (localized via the dialing code); emits nothing
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RequestPhoneVerification
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifies
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerVerifyPhoneRegistersЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerverifyphoneregisters
Verifying the OTP on a new phone registers the customer
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй VerifyPhone
then: тЪб CustomerRegistered
verifies: ЁЯУР PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifies
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerVerifyPhoneReturningIdentifiesЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerverifyphonereturningidentifies
Verifying the OTP on a known phone identifies the returning customer
given: тЪб CustomerRegistered
when: ЁЯУй VerifyPhone
then: тЪб CustomerIdentified
verifies: ЁЯУР PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifies
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerVerifyPhoneIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerverifyphoneisrejected
Rejects phone verification when the OTP is wrong or expired
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй VerifyPhone
thrown: тЫФ InvalidVerificationCode, тЫФ VerificationCodeExpired
verifies: ЁЯУР PhoneVerificationRegistersOrIdentifies
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestEmailVerificationЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerrequestemailverification
Sends an email magic link to verify/link an email; emits nothing
given: тЪб CustomerRegistered
when: ЁЯУй RequestEmailVerification
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValid
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestEmailVerificationDuplicateIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerrequestemailverificationduplicateisrejected
Rejects requesting email verification for an email already used by another account
given: тЪб CustomerRegistered
when: ЁЯУй RequestEmailVerification
thrown: тЫФ EmailAlreadyInUse
verifies: ЁЯУР EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValid
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerConfirmEmailVerificationЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerconfirmemailverification
Confirms the email magic link (token verified server-side) and links the email
given: тЪб CustomerRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ConfirmEmailVerification
then: тЪб CustomerEmailVerified
verifies: ЁЯУР EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValid
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerConfirmEmailInvalidTokenIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerconfirmemailinvalidtokenisrejected
Rejects email confirmation when the magic-link token is invalid or expired
given: тЪб CustomerRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ConfirmEmailVerification
thrown: тЫФ InvalidVerificationToken, тЫФ VerificationCodeExpired
verifies: ЁЯУР EmailVerificationUniqueTokenValid
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestPhoneChangeЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerrequestphonechange
Sends an OTP to a new phone for a phone change; emits nothing
given: тЪб CustomerRegistered
when: ЁЯУй RequestPhoneChange
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР PhoneChangeVerifiedAndUnique
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRequestPhoneChangeDuplicateIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerrequestphonechangeduplicateisrejected
Rejects changing to a phone already used by another account
given: тЪб CustomerRegistered
when: ЁЯУй RequestPhoneChange
thrown: тЫФ PhoneAlreadyInUse
verifies: ЁЯУР PhoneChangeVerifiedAndUnique
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerConfirmPhoneChangeЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerconfirmphonechange
Confirms the OTP on the new phone and changes the phone
given: тЪб CustomerRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ConfirmPhoneChange
then: тЪб CustomerPhoneChanged
verifies: ЁЯУР PhoneChangeVerifiedAndUnique

when: ЁЯУй ChangeLanguage
then: тЪб CustomerLanguageChanged

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCustomerRestaurantFavoritedЁЯФЧ #test-testcustomerrestaurantfavorited

given: тЪб CustomerRegistered
when: ЁЯУй UnmarkRestaurantAsFavorite
