ЁЯУб Observability (1)
тЦ╕Contract: ЁЯУб customer-identificationЁЯФЧ #obs-customer-identification
criticality: high
workflow: ┬╖ command ЁЯУй VerifyPhone
emits: тЪб CustomerRegistered, тЪб CustomerIdentified ┬╖ inbound: тАФ
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idcommand.correlation_idтЬЕтАФ
trace_idotel.trace_idтЬЕтАФ
customer_iddomain.aggregate_idтЬЕЁЯФд CustomerId
spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
command.receiveSERVERтЬЕтАФbusiness.command_type*
otp.verifyCLIENTтЬЕтАФmessaging.system*, business.result*
event.store.appendINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.event_type*
event.publishPRODUCERтЬЕтАФbusiness.event_type*
metrics: customer_identification_duration_ms (histogram) ┬╖ business: customer_signins_total (counter), otp_verifications_failed_total (counter)
success тЗР spans: command.receive, otp.verify, event.store.append, event.publish
SLOs: p95 тЙд 600ms ┬╖ p99 тЙд 1200ms ┬╖ error тЙд 2%
ЁЯФ▓ 5. delivery ЁЯФЧ
Delivery fulfilment: dispatch of ready DELIVERY orders to a partner (Avelo37) and/or independent riders, courier assignment, status tracking to hand-over (ADR-0031).
ЁЯз░ API operations (7)
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО deliveryЁЯФЧ #query-delivery
The delivery job of an order (tracking); owning customer, the restaurant/admin, or the assigned rider. Ownership enforced server-side.
input: ЁЯзй DeliveryQueryInput! { orderId: ЁЯФд OrderId }
returns: ЁЯзй DeliveryJob ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П View_DeliveryJob
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, RIDER, ADMIN ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО myDeliveriesЁЯФЧ #query-mydeliveries
The independent rider's assigned/available delivery jobs (rider app).
input: ЁЯзй MyDeliveriesQueryInput { status?: ЁЯФд DeliveryStatus }
returns: ЁЯзй DeliveryJob [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П View_DeliveryJob
roles: RIDER ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П acceptDeliveryЁЯФЧ #mutation-acceptdelivery
command: ЁЯУй AcceptDelivery тЖТ ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
roles: RIDER ┬╖ V0
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П confirmPickupЁЯФЧ #mutation-confirmpickup
command: ЁЯУй ConfirmPickup тЖТ ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
roles: RIDER ┬╖ V0
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П completeDeliveryЁЯФЧ #mutation-completedelivery
command: ЁЯУй CompleteDelivery тЖТ ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
roles: RIDER ┬╖ V0
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П cancelDeliveryЁЯФЧ #mutation-canceldelivery
command: ЁЯУй CancelDelivery тЖТ ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
roles: RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, ADMIN ┬╖ V0
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
тЦ╕Mutation: тЬПя╕П escalateDeliveryЁЯФЧ #mutation-escalatedelivery
command: ЁЯУй EscalateDelivery тЖТ ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
roles: RESTAURANT, ADMIN ┬╖ V0
returns: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptance (acceptance-first тАФ outcome via ЁЯФО operationStatus)
ЁЯзй Output types (1)
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй DeliveryJobЁЯФЧ #type-deliveryjob
One delivery of an order (ADR-0031): status, courier, addresses and ETAs. Serves the rider job list, the restaurant delivery board and admin.
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_DeliveryJob

estimatedDropoffAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable

deliveredAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable
ЁЯОн Actors (3)
тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн DeliveryJobЁЯФЧ #actor-deliveryjob
One delivery of an order (bounded context: delivery). Born from DeliveryRequested (emitted by DeliveryDispatchProcess), then fulfilled by EITHER an independent Captain rider (these commands) OR a delivery partner (inbound DeliveryAcceptedByPartner/RejectedByPartner/StatusUpdated, recorded via the avelo37-acl тАФ no command). ADR-0031.
ЁЯзй aggregate

тЪб DeliveryOfferTimedOutтЪб DeliveryOfferTimedOutтАФ
тЪб DeliveryStatusUpdatedтЪб DeliveryStatusUpdatedтАФ
тЪб DeliveryDispatchFailedтЪб DeliveryDispatchFailedтАФ

тЦ╕Actor: ЁЯОн DeliveryDispatchProcessЁЯФЧ #actor-deliverydispatchprocess
Dispatches and tracks deliveries (bounded context: delivery, ADR-0031; resolveтЖТwalk strategy, #60). When a DELIVERY order is marked ready, delivers the DeliveryRequested birth to the DeliveryJob (deterministic UUIDv5 job id from the order id = idempotency key), then RESOLVES a dispatch strategy: a RESTAURANT-dispatch order short-circuits to SELF_DISPATCHED (Captain offers no channel and only tracks тАФ the restaurant drives progress and the customer still gets tracking); a CAPTAIN-dispatch order WALKS the city's ranked channel list (CityDeliveryRanking), offering the rank-1 channel. Three triggers advance the walk to the next ranked channel тАФ a partner decline (DeliveryRejectedByPartner), an offer timeout (DeliveryOfferTimedOut) and a manual operator escalate (DeliveryEscalationRequested) тАФ until the list is exhausted, then fails closed with DeliveryDispatchFailed (fail-closed, rules.yaml#/DispatchExhaustionFailsClosed тАФ #60 supersedes the ADR-20260720-004556 numeric cap-3). Channel selection and "channels remain?" are RUNTIME HOOKS (the CityDeliveryRanking read/selection the value forms cannot carry), so each leg carries its branches linearly with notes. Closes the order on delivery by sending MarkOrderDelivered тАФ the Order validates the transition, so a terminal cancelled/rejected order is never resurrected.
тЪЩя╕П process manager
ReceivesEmits тЖТThrows
тЪб OrderMarkedReadyтЪб DeliveryRequestedтАФ
тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartnerThe partner accepted (inbound, recorded by the DeliveryJob aggregate тАФ the courier lives on the job): just advance the run. тЫФ DeliveryJobNotFound
тЪб DeliveryRejectedByPartnerтЪб DeliveryDispatchFailedтЫФ DeliveryJobNotFound
тЪб DeliveryEscalationRequestedтЪб DeliveryDispatchFailedтЫФ DeliveryJobNotFound
тЪб DeliveryOfferTimedOutтЪб DeliveryDispatchFailedтЫФ DeliveryJobNotFound
тЪб DeliveryStatusUpdatedтЪб OrderDeliveredтЫФ DeliveryJobNotFound
тЪб DeliveryCompletedтЪб OrderDeliveredтЫФ DeliveryJobNotFound
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant IN as Inbox (trigger)
  participant PM as DeliveryDispatchProcess (decides)
  participant ST as delivery_dispatch_process_manager (state)
  participant RM_OrderTracking as OrderTracking (read model)
  participant RM_Restaurant as Restaurant (read model)
  participant AG_DeliveryJob as DeliveryJob (aggregate)
  participant PT_delivery as port delivery (adapter)
  participant AG_Order as Order (aggregate)
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: OrderMarkedReady (event)
  PM->>RM_OrderTracking: read as order [order_id=OrderMarkedReady.orderId]
  Note over PM: skip unless order.service_type == DELIVERY
  PM->>RM_Restaurant: read as restaurant [restaurant_id=OrderMarkedReady.restaurantId]
  PM->>AG_DeliveryJob: deliver DeliveryRequested тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>PT_delivery: offer_job
  PM->>ST: set order_id=OrderMarkedReady.orderId, restaurant_id=OrderMarkedReady.restaurantId, delivery_job_id=DeliveryRequested.deliveryJobId, process_status=?, offer_attempts=?, current_rank=?, current_channel=?
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryAcceptedByPartner (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>ST: set process_status=ACCEPTED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryRejectedByPartner (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryRejectedByPartner.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=OFFERED
  PM->>PT_delivery: offer_job
  PM->>ST: set offer_attempts=state.offer_attempts, current_rank=?, current_channel=?, process_status=OFFERED
  Note over PM: skip unless precondition holds
  PM->>AG_DeliveryJob: deliver DeliveryDispatchFailed тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=FAILED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryEscalationRequested (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryEscalationRequested.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=OFFERED
  PM->>PT_delivery: offer_job
  PM->>ST: set offer_attempts=state.offer_attempts, current_rank=?, current_channel=?, process_status=OFFERED
  Note over PM: skip unless precondition holds
  PM->>AG_DeliveryJob: deliver DeliveryDispatchFailed тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=FAILED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryOfferTimedOut (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryOfferTimedOut.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>ST: expect process_status=OFFERED
  PM->>PT_delivery: offer_job
  PM->>ST: set offer_attempts=state.offer_attempts, current_rank=?, current_channel=?, process_status=OFFERED
  Note over PM: skip unless precondition holds
  PM->>AG_DeliveryJob: deliver DeliveryDispatchFailed тАФ the aggregate records it
  PM->>ST: set process_status=FAILED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryStatusUpdated (event)
  Note over PM: skip unless message.status == DELIVERED
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryStatusUpdated.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>AG_Order: send MarkOrderDelivered тАФ the aggregate validates
  PM->>ST: set process_status=COMPLETED
  end
  rect rgb(245,245,245)
  IN->>PM: DeliveryCompleted (event)
  PM->>ST: by delivery_job_id=DeliveryCompleted.deliveryJobId
  PM--xIN: throws DeliveryJobNotFound
  PM->>AG_Order: send MarkOrderDelivered тАФ the aggregate validates
  PM->>ST: set process_status=COMPLETED
  end

providerЁЯФд DeliveryProviderтЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartnernullableINDEPENDENT (rider accepted) or PARTNER (partner accepted); null while PENDING.

estimated_pickup_attimestamptzтЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.estimatedPickupAtnullable
estimated_dropoff_attimestamptzтЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartner.estimatedDropoffAtnullable

picked_up_attimestamptzтЪб DeliveryPickedUpnullable
delivered_attimestamptzтЪб DeliveryCompleted, тЪб DeliveryStatusUpdatednullableSet on DeliveryCompleted or DeliveryStatusUpdated=DELIVERED (conditional occurrence).
last_partner_rejectiontextтЪб DeliveryRejectedByPartner.reasonnullableReason of the latest partner decline (the job stays PENDING and is re-offered, up to the 3-offer cap тАФ ADR-20260720-004556); null if never rejected.

updated_attimestamptzтЪая╕П noneтАФtechnical тАФ stamped from event.occurred_at (implicit on every read model)

тЦ╕Command: ЁЯУй EscalateDeliveryЁЯФЧ #command-escalatedelivery
Restaurant/admin asks to skip the delivery channel currently offered and advance the ranked walk now (#60). The DeliveryJob emits DeliveryEscalationRequested; DeliveryDispatchProcess offers the next ranked channel, or fails the dispatch closed when the walk is exhausted. Self-dispatch and exhaustion are handled by the saga (a benign skip / a terminal fact), not rejected as command errors.
dispatched by: тЬПя╕П escalateDelivery ┬╖ handled by ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
emits: тЪб DeliveryEscalationRequested
throws: тЫФ DeliveryJobNotFound
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobIdЁЯФд DeliveryJobIdтЬЕ required
reasonstringтмЬ nullable

тЪб Events (20)
тЦ╕Event: тЪб DeliveryRequestedЁЯФЧ #event-deliveryrequested
A delivery job has been created for a ready DELIVERY order and offered for fulfilment (dispatched to a partner and/or made available to independent riders). Emitted by DeliveryDispatchProcess.
emitted by: ЁЯОн DeliveryJob, ЁЯОн DeliveryDispatchProcess
consumed by: ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_DeliveryJob
FieldTypeReq.Description
modeЁЯФд ModeтмЬ optional
deliveryJobIdЁЯФд DeliveryJobIdтЬЕ required
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
pickupЁЯУж AddressтЬЕ requiredRestaurant pickup address.
dropoffЁЯУж AddressтЬЕ requiredCustomer delivery address.
providerЁЯФд DeliveryProviderтмЬ nullableIntended channel when known at request time; resolved for certain on acceptance.

atstring date-timeтмЬ optional

A delivery job was cancelled before delivery (e.g. by the restaurant or admin).
emitted by: ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
consumed by: тАФ
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_DeliveryJob

deliveryJobIdЁЯФд DeliveryJobIdтЬЕ required
reasonstringтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Event: тЪб DeliveryDispatchFailedЁЯФЧ #event-deliverydispatchfailed
Dispatch failed terminally: the delivery partner declined the job at every offer attempt (cap of 3 total offers, ADR-20260720-004556). Emitted by DeliveryDispatchProcess (like DeliveryRequested) so read models surface the failed job to the restaurant for manual handling; no automatic retry follows.
emitted by: ЁЯОн DeliveryJob, ЁЯОн DeliveryDispatchProcess
consumed by: ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
projected into: ЁЯЧДя╕П View_DeliveryJob, ЁЯЧДя╕П OrderTracking
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobIdЁЯФд DeliveryJobIdтЬЕ required
orderIdЁЯФд OrderIdтЬЕ required
restaurantIdЁЯФд RestaurantIdтЬЕ required
attemptsintegerтЬЕ requiredTotal offer attempts made before giving up (the cap; the birth offer counts as 1).
lastReasonstringтмЬ nullableReason carried by the final partner decline, when the partner gave one.
тЦ╕Event: тЪб DeliveryEscalationRequestedЁЯФЧ #event-deliveryescalationrequested
An operator (restaurant/admin) asked to skip the delivery channel currently offered and advance the ranked walk now (#60). Emitted by the DeliveryJob aggregate handling the EscalateDelivery command; consumed by DeliveryDispatchProcess, which offers the next ranked channel (or fails closed when the walk is exhausted). Internal dispatch mechanics тАФ feeds no View_*.
emitted by: ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
consumed by: ЁЯОн DeliveryDispatchProcess
projected into: non-projected
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobIdЁЯФд DeliveryJobIdтЬЕ required
reasonstringтмЬ nullableWhy the operator escalated (optional free text).
тЦ╕Event: тЪб DeliveryOfferTimedOutЁЯФЧ #event-deliveryoffertimedout
An outstanding delivery offer expired before the channel answered (#60): the DeliveryOfferTimeoutWorker found an OFFERED run older than the resolved TTL and records this fact (authored like DeliveryDispatchFailed). Recorded by the DeliveryJob aggregate and consumed by DeliveryDispatchProcess, which advances the ranked walk to the next channel (or fails closed when exhausted). Internal dispatch mechanics тАФ feeds no View_*.
emitted by: ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
consumed by: ЁЯОн DeliveryJob, ЁЯОн DeliveryDispatchProcess
projected into: non-projected
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryJobIdЁЯФд DeliveryJobIdтЬЕ required
channelЁЯФд DeliveryChannelKeyтЬЕ requiredThe channel whose offer timed out.
rankintegerтЬЕ required1-based rank of the timed-out channel in the city's ranked walk.
reasonstringтмЬ nullableOptional detail (e.g. the resolved TTL that elapsed).
тЦ╕Event: тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartnerЁЯФЧ #event-deliveryacceptedbypartner

consumed by: ЁЯОн DeliveryJob, ЁЯОн DeliveryDispatchProcess

partnerRefЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтЬЕ requiredPartner-side delivery id; idempotent key for inbound updates.
courierЁЯУж CourierтЬЕ required
estimatedPickupAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable
estimatedDropoffAtstring date-timeтмЬ nullable

тЦ╕Event: тЪб RiderStatusChangedЁЯФЧ #event-riderstatuschanged
A rider's availability/lifecycle status changed.
emitted by: ЁЯОн Rider
consumed by: тАФ
projected into: тАФ
FieldTypeReq.Description
riderIdЁЯФд RiderIdтЬЕ required
statusЁЯФд RiderStatusтЬЕ required
ЁЯФд Scalars (5)
ScalarTypeDescription
ЁЯФд DeliveryJobIdstring uuidIdentifies one DeliveryJob (a single delivery of an order from restaurant to customer).
ЁЯФд RiderIdstring uuidAn independent Captain rider (courier). Null on a partner-fulfilled job (the partner's courier is name/phone only).
ЁЯФд RiderStatusenum (OFFLINE | AVAILABLE | ON_DELIVERY | SUSPENDED)Availability/lifecycle status of an independent Captain rider.
ЁЯФд DeliveryProviderenum (PARTNER | INDEPENDENT)Fulfilment channel of a delivery: PARTNER (e.g. Avelo37) or INDEPENDENT (a Captain rider).
ЁЯФд DeliveryChannelKeystring ^[a-z0-9]+(?:_[a-z0-9]+)*$Slug key of a delivery channel in the DeliveryChannelCatalog (e.g. 'independent', 'avelo37', 'uber_direct', 'coopcycle'). Data-driven (a new partner = a catalog row + an adapter), so channels are NOT a fixed enum (#60).
тЫФ Errors (6)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
тЫФ DeliveryJobNotFoundNo delivery job with this id.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Delivery job not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Livraison introuvable.ЁЯУй AcceptDelivery, ЁЯУй ConfirmPickup, ЁЯУй CompleteDelivery, ЁЯУй CancelDelivery, ЁЯУй EscalateDelivery, ЁЯУй ReportDeliveryIssue, ЁЯУй ResolveDeliveryIssue, ЁЯУй UpdateDeliveryStatus, ЁЯУй AssignDeliveryToPartner, ЁЯУй UnassignDeliveryFromPartner, ЁЯУй UpdateDeliveryPartnerStatus, ЁЯУй DeclineDelivery
тЫФ InvalidDeliveryStatusThe delivery job is not in a status that allows this transition.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This action is not allowed while the delivery is '{currentStatus}'.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Cette action n'est pas autoris├йe tant que la livraison est '{currentStatus}'.ЁЯУй AcceptDelivery, ЁЯУй ConfirmPickup, ЁЯУй CompleteDelivery, ЁЯУй CancelDelivery, ЁЯУй ReportDeliveryIssue, ЁЯУй ResolveDeliveryIssue, ЁЯУй UpdateDeliveryStatus, ЁЯУй AssignDeliveryToPartner, ЁЯУй UnassignDeliveryFromPartner, ЁЯУй UpdateDeliveryPartnerStatus, ЁЯУй DeclineDelivery
тЫФ DeliveryAlreadyAssignedThe delivery job has already been accepted by a courier/rider.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This delivery has already been taken.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Cette livraison a d├йj├а ├йt├й prise en charge.ЁЯУй AcceptDelivery, ЁЯУй AssignDeliveryToPartner, ЁЯУй DeclineDelivery
тЫФ RiderAlreadyRegisteredA rider is already registered for this identity (authRef/id).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз You are already registered as a rider.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Vous ├кtes d├йj├а inscrit en tant que livreur.ЁЯУй RegisterRider
тЫФ RiderNotFoundNo rider with this id.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Rider not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Livreur introuvable.ЁЯУй UpdateRiderInfo, ЁЯУй ChangeRiderStatus
тЫФ InvalidRiderStatusTransitionThe rider is not in a status that allows this transition.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз A rider cannot move from '{currentStatus}' to '{targetStatus}'.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Un livreur ne peut pas passer de '{currentStatus}' ├а '{targetStatus}'.ЁЯУй ChangeRiderStatus
ЁЯУР Business rules (16)
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР DeliveryAcceptedOnlyWhenPendingЁЯФЧ #rule-deliveryacceptedonlywhenpending
A pending delivery job can be accepted by an independent rider only once.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestAcceptDelivery, ЁЯзк TestAcceptDeliveryIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР DeliveryPickupAndCompletionByRiderЁЯФЧ #rule-deliverypickupandcompletionbyrider
The assigned rider confirms pickup then records hand-over, in the correct order.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestConfirmPickup, ЁЯзк TestCompleteDelivery, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryStatusUpdatedByCommand
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР DeliveryCancellableBeforeCompletionЁЯФЧ #rule-deliverycancellablebeforecompletion
A delivery job can be cancelled before completion but not after it is delivered.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestCancelDelivery, ЁЯзк TestCancelDeliveryIsRejected
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ReadyDeliveryOrderTriggersDispatchЁЯФЧ #rule-readydeliveryordertriggersdispatch
A ready DELIVERY order triggers creation of a delivery job (dispatch).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDispatchOnOrderReady, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobBornOnDeliveryRequested
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР PartnerAcceptanceRecordsCourierЁЯФЧ #rule-partneracceptancerecordscourier
When the partner accepts (inbound), the assigned courier is recorded on the job.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDispatchPartnerAccepted, ЁЯзк TestDispatchAcceptedAfterReoffer, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsPartnerAcceptance
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР PartnerRejectionReoffersЁЯФЧ #rule-partnerrejectionreoffers
When the partner declines (inbound), the job is re-offered or flagged for manual handling.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDispatchPartnerRejected, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsPartnerRejection
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР DispatchExhaustionFailsClosedЁЯФЧ #rule-dispatchexhaustionfailsclosed
When Captain dispatches, the delivery job walks the city's ranked channel list, offering each ranked channel at most once in rank order; once every ranked channel has been offered and none accepts, the dispatch fails terminally (DeliveryDispatchFailed, run FAILED) and is surfaced to the restaurant for manual handling тАФ never an unbounded retry loop (#60, supersedes ADR-20260720-004556).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDispatchFailsAfterOfferCap, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsDispatchFailure
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RestaurantDispatchBypassesRoutingЁЯФЧ #rule-restaurantdispatchbypassesrouting
A RESTAURANT-dispatch order (RestaurantDispatchMode RESTAURANT) is never offered to a delivery channel: the dispatch run short-circuits to SELF_DISPATCHED and Captain only tracks the delivery, while the restaurant drives its progress and the customer still gets order tracking (#60).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDispatchSelfDispatched
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР CityRankingWalkedInOrderЁЯФЧ #rule-cityrankingwalkedinorder
When Captain dispatches, channels are offered in the city's configured rank order (CityDeliveryRanking, rank 1 first): the birth offer goes to the rank-1 channel and each advance moves to the next rank (#60).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDispatchPartnerRejected, ЁЯзк TestDispatchAcceptedAfterReoffer
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР TimeoutEscalatesToNextChannelЁЯФЧ #rule-timeoutescalatestonextchannel
When an outstanding delivery offer times out (DeliveryOfferTimedOut), the dispatch advances to the next ranked channel (or fails closed when the ranked walk is exhausted) тАФ a stale offer never blocks the walk (#60).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDispatchAdvancesOnTimeout, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsOfferTimeout
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР ManualEscalateSkipsChannelЁЯФЧ #rule-manualescalateskipschannel
An operator (restaurant/admin) may escalate an outstanding delivery offer (EscalateDelivery тЖТ DeliveryEscalationRequested), skipping the channel currently offered and advancing to the next ranked channel (or failing closed when the ranked walk is exhausted) (#60).
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDispatchAdvancesOnEscalate, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobEscalated
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР OrderClosedOnDeliveryCompletionЁЯФЧ #rule-orderclosedondeliverycompletion
The order is closed (OrderDelivered) when the partner reports DELIVERED or an independent rider completes the delivery.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDispatchClosesOrderOnPartnerDelivered, ЁЯзк TestDispatchClosesOrderOnRiderCompleted
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР DeliveryPartnerAssignmentLifecycleЁЯФЧ #rule-deliverypartnerassignmentlifecycle
A PENDING delivery job can be assigned to a delivery partner (once), unassigned to be re-offered, and partner-reported status changes apply only as valid transitions.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsPartnerStatusReport, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryAssignedToPartner, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryUnassignedFromPartner, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryPartnerStatusUpdated
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР DeliveryDeclineKeepsJobPendingЁЯФЧ #rule-deliverydeclinekeepsjobpending
An independent rider may decline a pending delivery job; the job stays PENDING and re-offerable.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryDeclinedByRider
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР DeliveryIssueLifecycleЁЯФЧ #rule-deliveryissuelifecycle
A delivery issue can be reported on a non-delivered job and later resolved.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryIssueReported, ЁЯзк TestDeliveryIssueResolved
тЦ╕Rule: ЁЯУР RiderLifecycleЁЯФЧ #rule-riderlifecycle
A rider registers once (per auth user), may update editable profile fields, and changes availability status only through valid transitions.
verified by: ЁЯзк TestRiderRegistered, ЁЯзк TestRiderRegisterAgainIsRejected, ЁЯзк TestRiderInfoUpdated, ЁЯзк TestRiderUpdateIsRejectedWhenNotFound, ЁЯзк TestRiderStatusChanged, ЁЯзк TestRiderStatusChangeIsRejected
ЁЯзк Tests (3)

ЁЯОн DeliveryJob

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestAcceptDeliveryЁЯФЧ #test-testacceptdelivery
An independent rider accepts a pending delivery job
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй AcceptDelivery
then: тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryAcceptedOnlyWhenPending
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestAcceptDeliveryIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testacceptdeliveryisrejected
Rejects accepting a missing job or one already taken
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider
when: ЁЯУй AcceptDelivery
thrown: тЫФ DeliveryJobNotFound, тЫФ InvalidDeliveryStatus, тЫФ DeliveryAlreadyAssigned
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryAcceptedOnlyWhenPending
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestConfirmPickupЁЯФЧ #test-testconfirmpickup
The assigned rider confirms pickup from the restaurant
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider
when: ЁЯУй ConfirmPickup
then: тЪб DeliveryPickedUp
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryPickupAndCompletionByRider
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCompleteDeliveryЁЯФЧ #test-testcompletedelivery
The assigned rider records hand-over to the customer
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider, тЪб DeliveryPickedUp
when: ЁЯУй CompleteDelivery
then: тЪб DeliveryCompleted
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryPickupAndCompletionByRider
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCancelDeliveryЁЯФЧ #test-testcanceldelivery
The restaurant cancels a pending delivery job
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй CancelDelivery
then: тЪб DeliveryCancelled
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryCancellableBeforeCompletion
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestCancelDeliveryIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testcanceldeliveryisrejected
Rejects cancelling a missing or already-delivered job
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider, тЪб DeliveryPickedUp, тЪб DeliveryCompleted
when: ЁЯУй CancelDelivery
thrown: тЫФ DeliveryJobNotFound, тЫФ InvalidDeliveryStatus
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryCancellableBeforeCompletion
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobBornOnDeliveryRequestedЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryjobbornondeliveryrequested
The DeliveryJob is born by recording the DeliveryRequested fact delivered by DeliveryDispatchProcess (idempotent)
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryRequested
then: тЪб DeliveryRequested
verifies: ЁЯУР ReadyDeliveryOrderTriggersDispatch
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsPartnerAcceptanceЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryjobrecordspartneracceptance
The DeliveryJob records the inbound partner acceptance with its courier (idempotent by partnerRef)
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryAcceptedByPartner
then: тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartner
verifies: ЁЯУР PartnerAcceptanceRecordsCourier
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsPartnerRejectionЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryjobrecordspartnerrejection
The DeliveryJob records the inbound partner rejection (the dispatcher re-offers, bounded)
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryRejectedByPartner
then: тЪб DeliveryRejectedByPartner
verifies: ЁЯУР PartnerRejectionReoffers
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsDispatchFailureЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryjobrecordsdispatchfailure
The DeliveryJob records the terminal dispatch failure delivered by DeliveryDispatchProcess (job тЖТ FAILED)
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryDispatchFailed
then: тЪб DeliveryDispatchFailed
verifies: ЁЯУР DispatchExhaustionFailsClosed
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobEscalatedЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryjobescalated
An operator escalates an outstanding offer: the DeliveryJob emits DeliveryEscalationRequested
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй EscalateDelivery
then: тЪб DeliveryEscalationRequested
verifies: ЁЯУР ManualEscalateSkipsChannel
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsOfferTimeoutЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryjobrecordsoffertimeout
The DeliveryJob records the offer-timeout fact (the dispatcher advances the ranked walk)
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryOfferTimedOut
then: тЪб DeliveryOfferTimedOut
verifies: ЁЯУР TimeoutEscalatesToNextChannel
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryJobRecordsPartnerStatusReportЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryjobrecordspartnerstatusreport
The DeliveryJob records the inbound partner status report as a valid transition (avelo37 inbox, issue #28)
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartner
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryStatusUpdated
then: тЪб DeliveryStatusUpdated
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryPartnerAssignmentLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryStatusUpdatedByCommandЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliverystatusupdatedbycommand
The delivery status is driven through valid transitions to DELIVERED
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider, тЪб DeliveryPickedUp
when: ЁЯУй UpdateDeliveryStatus
then: тЪб DeliveryStatusUpdated
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryPickupAndCompletionByRider
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryAssignedToPartnerЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryassignedtopartner
A pending delivery job is assigned to a delivery partner
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй AssignDeliveryToPartner
then: тЪб DeliveryAssignedToPartner
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryPartnerAssignmentLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryUnassignedFromPartnerЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryunassignedfrompartner
An assigned delivery job is unassigned from its partner to be re-offered
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAssignedToPartner
when: ЁЯУй UnassignDeliveryFromPartner
then: тЪб DeliveryUnassignedFromPartner
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryPartnerAssignmentLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryPartnerStatusUpdatedЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliverypartnerstatusupdated
A partner-reported status change applies to the job as a valid transition
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByPartner
when: ЁЯУй UpdateDeliveryPartnerStatus
then: тЪб DeliveryPartnerStatusUpdated
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryPartnerAssignmentLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryDeclinedByRiderЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliverydeclinedbyrider
An independent rider declines a pending job; it stays PENDING and re-offerable
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeclineDelivery
then: тЪб DeliveryDeclinedByRider
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryDeclineKeepsJobPending
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryIssueReportedЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryissuereported
An issue is reported on a non-delivered job
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider
when: ЁЯУй ReportDeliveryIssue
then: тЪб DeliveryIssueReported
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryIssueLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDeliveryIssueResolvedЁЯФЧ #test-testdeliveryissueresolved
A previously reported delivery issue is resolved
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider, тЪб DeliveryIssueReported
when: ЁЯУй ResolveDeliveryIssue
then: тЪб DeliveryIssueResolved
verifies: ЁЯУР DeliveryIssueLifecycle

ЁЯОн Rider

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRiderRegisteredЁЯФЧ #test-testriderregistered
A rider registers (linked to the auth provider user)
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй RegisterRider
then: тЪб RiderRegistered
verifies: ЁЯУР RiderLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRiderRegisterAgainIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testriderregisteragainisrejected
Registering the same rider twice is rejected
given: тЪб RiderRegistered
when: ЁЯУй RegisterRider
thrown: тЫФ RiderAlreadyRegistered
verifies: ЁЯУР RiderLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRiderInfoUpdatedЁЯФЧ #test-testriderinfoupdated
A rider updates editable profile fields
given: тЪб RiderRegistered
when: ЁЯУй UpdateRiderInfo
then: тЪб RiderInfoUpdated
verifies: ЁЯУР RiderLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRiderUpdateIsRejectedWhenNotFoundЁЯФЧ #test-testriderupdateisrejectedwhennotfound
Updating an unknown rider is rejected
given: (none)
when: ЁЯУй UpdateRiderInfo
thrown: тЫФ RiderNotFound
verifies: ЁЯУР RiderLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRiderStatusChangedЁЯФЧ #test-testriderstatuschanged
A rider goes AVAILABLE (valid transition from OFFLINE)
given: тЪб RiderRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ChangeRiderStatus
then: тЪб RiderStatusChanged
verifies: ЁЯУР RiderLifecycle
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestRiderStatusChangeIsRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testriderstatuschangeisrejected
An OFFLINE rider cannot jump straight to ON_DELIVERY (invalid transition)
given: тЪб RiderRegistered
when: ЁЯУй ChangeRiderStatus
thrown: тЫФ InvalidRiderStatusTransition
verifies: ЁЯУР RiderLifecycle

ЁЯОн DeliveryDispatchProcess

тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchOnOrderReadyЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchonorderready
A ready DELIVERY order triggers creation of a delivery job
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб OrderPlaced
when: ЁЯУй OrderMarkedReady
then: тЪб DeliveryRequested
verifies: ЁЯУР ReadyDeliveryOrderTriggersDispatch
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchPartnerAcceptedЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchpartneraccepted
Records the assigned courier when the partner accepts (inbound)
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryAcceptedByPartner
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР PartnerAcceptanceRecordsCourier
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchPartnerRejectedЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchpartnerrejected
Advances the ranked channel walk to the next channel on a partner decline (inbound)
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryRejectedByPartner
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР PartnerRejectionReoffers, ЁЯУР CityRankingWalkedInOrder
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchAcceptedAfterReofferЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchacceptedafterreoffer
A channel accepts a re-offered job after the walk advanced: the run reaches ACCEPTED
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryRejectedByPartner
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryAcceptedByPartner
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР CityRankingWalkedInOrder, ЁЯУР PartnerAcceptanceRecordsCourier
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchFailsAfterOfferCapЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchfailsafteroffercap
Exhausting the ranked channel walk fails the dispatch closed (DeliveryDispatchFailed, run FAILED)
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryRejectedByPartner, тЪб DeliveryRejectedByPartner
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryRejectedByPartner
then: тЪб DeliveryDispatchFailed
verifies: ЁЯУР DispatchExhaustionFailsClosed
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchSelfDispatchedЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchselfdispatched
A RESTAURANT-dispatch order is not offered to a channel: the run self-dispatches (Captain tracks only)
given: тЪб RestaurantRegistered, тЪб OrderPlaced
when: ЁЯУй OrderMarkedReady
then: тЪб DeliveryRequested
verifies: ЁЯУР RestaurantDispatchBypassesRouting
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchAdvancesOnEscalateЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchadvancesonescalate
A manual operator escalate skips the current channel and advances the ranked walk
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryEscalationRequested
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР ManualEscalateSkipsChannel
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchAdvancesOnTimeoutЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchadvancesontimeout
An expired offer advances the ranked walk to the next channel
given: тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryOfferTimedOut
then: тИЕ no event (idempotent no-op)
verifies: ЁЯУР TimeoutEscalatesToNextChannel
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchClosesOrderOnPartnerDeliveredЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchclosesorderonpartnerdelivered
Closes the order when the partner reports DELIVERED (inbound)
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, тЪб OrderMarkedReady, тЪб DeliveryRequested
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryStatusUpdated
then: тЪб OrderDelivered
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderClosedOnDeliveryCompletion
тЦ╕Test: ЁЯзк TestDispatchClosesOrderOnRiderCompletedЁЯФЧ #test-testdispatchclosesorderonridercompleted
Closes the order when an independent rider completes the delivery
given: тЪб OrderPlaced, тЪб OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, тЪб OrderMarkedReady, тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryAcceptedByRider, тЪб DeliveryPickedUp
when: ЁЯУй DeliveryCompleted
then: тЪб OrderDelivered
verifies: ЁЯУР OrderClosedOnDeliveryCompletion
ЁЯУб Observability (1)
тЦ╕Contract: ЁЯУб delivery-dispatch-strategyЁЯФЧ #obs-delivery-dispatch-strategy
criticality: high
workflow: saga ЁЯУж DeliveryDispatchProcess
emits: тЪб DeliveryRequested, тЪб DeliveryDispatchFailed ┬╖ inbound: тЪб OrderMarkedReady, тЪб DeliveryRejectedByPartner, тЪб DeliveryEscalationRequested, тЪб DeliveryOfferTimedOut
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idevent.correlation_idтЬЕтАФ
trace_idotel.trace_idтЬЕтАФ
order_iddomain.aggregate_idтЬЕЁЯФд OrderId
delivery_job_iddomain.delivery_job_idтЬЕЁЯФд DeliveryJobId
spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
event.consume.triggerCONSUMERтЬЕтАФbusiness.event_type*
dispatch.resolve_strategyINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.dispatch_mode*, business.city_id
dispatch.select_channelINTERNALтмЬтАФbusiness.channel*, business.rank*, business.channels_remaining*
delivery.offer_jobCLIENTтмЬтАФbusiness.channel*, business.result*
event.store.appendINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.event_type*, business.stream_id*
metrics: delivery_dispatch_duration_ms (histogram), delivery_offer_timeout_ms (histogram) ┬╖ business: delivery_offers_total (counter), delivery_dispatch_failed_total (counter), delivery_self_dispatched_total (counter)
success тЗР spans: event.consume.trigger, dispatch.resolve_strategy, event.store.append
SLOs: p95 тЙд 800ms ┬╖ p99 тЙд 2000ms ┬╖ error тЙд 2%
ЁЯФ▓ 6. cross-cutting ЁЯФЧ
Shared vocabulary and operations that span several bounded contexts (or belong to none).
ЁЯз░ API operations (6)
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО phoneCountriesЁЯФЧ #query-phonecountries
Selectable phone countries for the dialing-code picker (static reference data; the picker sends back the dialingCode '+33').
input: (none)
returns: ЁЯзй PhoneCountry [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П PhoneCountry
roles: EVERYONE (open тАФ roles omitted) ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО operationStatusЁЯФЧ #query-operationstatus
Poll a journaled command's status by its messageId acceptance handle (the pull counterpart of the operationStatusChanged subscription, ADR-20260720-015500). Open to every role path (roles omitted) but OWNERSHIP-SCOPED in the resolver: the row is returned only to the journaling actor (JWT subject match), the journaling session (X-SESSION-ID match тАФ anonymous users), or ADMIN; anything else resolves null (no existence oracle). Transient тАФ served from the command_journal, no View_*.
input: ЁЯзй OperationStatusQueryInput! { messageId: ЁЯФд MessageId }
returns: ЁЯзй Operation ┬╖ reads тАФ
roles: EVERYONE (open тАФ roles omitted) ┬╖ V0
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО pricingPolicyЁЯФЧ #query-pricingpolicy
The active Captain service-fee policy (admin; calibration/transparency).
input: (none)
returns: ЁЯзй PricingPolicy [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П PricingPolicy
roles: ADMIN ┬╖ V1
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО uberEstimationPolicyЁЯФЧ #query-uberestimationpolicy
The active per-cuisine Uber Eats mark-up coefficients (admin; calibration/transparency).
input: (none)
returns: ЁЯзй UberEstimationPolicy [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П UberEstimationPolicy
roles: ADMIN ┬╖ V1
тЦ╕Query: ЁЯФО uberSplitPolicyЁЯФЧ #query-ubersplitpolicy
The active Uber Eats split/fee assumptions for the estimated comparison (admin; calibration/transparency).
input: (none)
returns: ЁЯзй UberSplitPolicy [] ┬╖ reads ЁЯЧДя╕П UberSplitPolicy
roles: ADMIN ┬╖ V1
тЦ╕Subscription: ЁЯФФ operationStatusChangedЁЯФЧ #subscription-operationstatuschanged
Live status of one journaled command, keyed by its messageId acceptance handle (the push counterpart of queries/operationStatus, ADR-20260720-015500). Yields the current journal state first (no subscribe/complete race), then every transition. Open to every role path (roles omitted) but ownership-scoped like the query (JWT subject / X-SESSION-ID via the WS connection_init payload / ADMIN).
input: ЁЯзй OperationStatusChangedSubscriptionInput! { messageId: ЁЯФд MessageId }
streams: ЁЯзй Operation
roles: EVERYONE (open тАФ roles omitted) ┬╖ V0
ЁЯзй Output types (11)
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй ProductЁЯФЧ #type-product
A catalog product grouping one or more purchasable offers.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
idЁЯФд ProductIdтЬЕ required
categoryRefЁЯФд ExternalReferenceтмЬ nullable
nameЁЯФд ProductNameтЬЕ required
descriptionЁЯФд ProductDescriptionтмЬ nullable
tags[ЁЯФд Tag]тЬЕ required
imageIds[ЁЯФд ImageId]тЬЕ required
taxRateЁЯУж TaxRateтЬЕ required
offers[ЁЯзй Offer]тЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй OfferЁЯФЧ #type-offer
A purchasable offer (SKU) of a product, with its price and derived availability.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
idЁЯФд OfferIdтЬЕ required
nameЁЯФд OfferNameтЬЕ required
priceЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
uberPriceЁЯУж MoneyтмЬ nullable
uberPriceBasisЁЯФд ComparisonBasisтмЬ nullable
availabilityЁЯФд CatalogItemAvailabilityтЬЕ required
stockStatusЁЯФд StockStatusтЬЕ required
optionListIds[ЁЯФд OptionListId]тЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй OptionListЁЯФЧ #type-optionlist
A modifier group (HubRise option list).
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
idЁЯФд OptionListIdтЬЕ required
nameЁЯФд OptionListNameтЬЕ required
minSelectionsintegerтЬЕ required
maxSelectionsintegerтмЬ nullable
multipleSelectionbooleanтЬЕ required
options[ЁЯзй Option]тЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй OptionЁЯФЧ #type-option
A selectable option within an option list.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
idЁЯФд OptionIdтЬЕ required
nameЁЯФд OptionNameтЬЕ required
priceЁЯУж MoneyтЬЕ required
defaultbooleanтЬЕ required
availabilityЁЯФд CatalogItemAvailabilityтЬЕ required
stockStatusЁЯФд StockStatusтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй PhoneCountryЁЯФЧ #type-phonecountry
A selectable phone country for the dialing-code picker (static reference data).
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П PhoneCountry
FieldTypeReq.
countryЁЯФд CountryCodeтЬЕ required
dialingCodeЁЯФд DialingCodeтЬЕ required
namestringтЬЕ required
defaultLocaleЁЯФд LocaleтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй PaymentIntentЁЯФЧ #type-paymentintent
Checkout payment state for one order (ADR-20260720-015500): the read-side home of the values placeOrder used to return, served from the PlaceOrderProcess run row by `paymentStatus` / `paymentStatusChanged`. `clientSecret` is present only while the run is in flight (NULLed when it resolves тАФ a revocable Stripe credential, never event-sourced). NON-PROJECTED (transient): resolver-served from the saga state row, never a View_* тАФ hence no `reads`.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
paymentIntentIdЁЯФд PaymentIntentIdтЬЕ required
clientSecretstringтмЬ nullable
statusЁЯФд PaymentStatusтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй MutationAcceptanceЁЯФЧ #type-mutationacceptance
The uniform acceptance EVERY mutation returns (acceptance-first writes, ADR-20260720-015500): the EFFECTIVE technical envelope echoed back (server-computed where the client supplied nothing) plus the journaled operation status. Business outcomes are never here тАФ read them via queries/subscriptions (`operationStatus`, `paymentStatus`, the read models). NON-PROJECTED (transient) тАФ built from the command_journal acceptance, no `reads`.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
messageIdЁЯФд MessageIdтЬЕ required
correlationIdЁЯФд CorrelationIdтЬЕ required
causeIdЁЯФд CauseIdтмЬ nullable
sessionIdЁЯФд SessionIdтмЬ nullable
traceIdЁЯФд TraceIdтмЬ nullable
operationStatusЁЯФд OperationStatusтЬЕ required
duplicatebooleanтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй OperationЁЯФЧ #type-operation
Live status of a journaled command (ADR-20260720-015300), keyed by its `messageId` acceptance handle: polled by `operationStatus`, streamed by `operationStatusChanged`. `errorCode` is the stable errors.yaml code when the operation REJECTED/FAILED after acceptance (the async home of the P-10 rejection contract тАФ sync validation failures still use GraphQL errors). Ownership- scoped in the resolver: the journaling actor (JWT), the journaling session (X-SESSION-ID), or ADMIN. NON-PROJECTED (transient) тАФ served from the command_journal, no backing View_*.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
messageIdЁЯФд MessageIdтЬЕ required
correlationIdЁЯФд CorrelationIdтЬЕ required
statusЁЯФд OperationStatusтЬЕ required
errorCodestringтмЬ nullable
messagestringтмЬ nullable
occurredAtstring date-timeтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй PricingPolicyЁЯФЧ #type-pricingpolicy
The calibratable Captain service-fee policy (ADR-0016/0017); admin/transparency.
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П PricingPolicy
FieldTypeReq.
currencyЁЯФд CurrencyCodeтЬЕ required
feeRatenumberтЬЕ required
buyerSharenumberтЬЕ required
marginLownumberтЬЕ required
marginHighnumberтЬЕ required
effectiveFromstring date-timeтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй UberEstimationPolicyЁЯФЧ #type-uberestimationpolicy
Calibratable per-cuisine Uber Eats mark-up coefficient (ADR-0024/0030); admin/transparency.
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П UberEstimationPolicy
FieldTypeReq.
cuisineCategoryЁЯФд CuisineCategoryтЬЕ required
priceCoefficientnumberтЬЕ required
effectiveFromstring date-timeтЬЕ required
тЦ╕Type: ЁЯзй UberSplitPolicyЁЯФЧ #type-ubersplitpolicy
Calibratable Uber Eats split/fee assumptions for the estimated comparison (ADR-0024/0025/0030); admin/transparency.
read model: ЁЯЧДя╕П UberSplitPolicy
FieldTypeReq.
currencyЁЯФд CurrencyCodeтЬЕ required
uberCommissionPctnumberтЬЕ required
riderBaseCentsintegerтЬЕ required
riderPerKmCentsintegerтЬЕ required
avgDeliveryFeeCentsintegerтЬЕ required
platformFeePctnumberтЬЕ required
effectiveFromstring date-timeтЬЕ required
ЁЯУж Entities (3)
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж CourierЁЯФЧ #entity-courier
The person delivering an order. For an INDEPENDENT rider, `riderId` is set (a Captain RIDER); for a PARTNER courier (e.g. Avelo37) only `displayName`/`phone` are known, reported by the partner.
FieldTypeReq.Description
displayNamestringтЬЕ required
phoneЁЯФд PhoneNumberтмЬ nullable
riderIdЁЯФд RiderIdтмЬ nullableSet when the courier is an independent Captain rider; null for a partner courier.
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж TaxRateЁЯФЧ #entity-taxrate
Per-service-mode VAT, mirroring HubRise product tax_rate.
FieldTypeReq.Description
deliveryЁЯФд TaxRatePercentтЬЕ required
collectionЁЯФд TaxRatePercentтмЬ nullable
eatInЁЯФд TaxRatePercentтмЬ nullable
тЦ╕Entity: ЁЯУж AddressЁЯФЧ #entity-address
FieldTypeReq.Description
line1ЁЯФд AddressLineтЬЕ required
line2ЁЯФд AddressLineтмЬ nullable
postalCodeЁЯФд PostalCodeтЬЕ required
cityЁЯФд CityNameтЬЕ required
countryЁЯФд CountryCodeтЬЕ required
ЁЯФд Scalars (41)
ScalarTypeDescription
ЁЯФд RestaurantIdstring uuidA single restaurant location (HubRise: location), belonging to a RestaurantAccount.
ЁЯФд ProductIdstring uuidA product groups one or more offers (HubRise: product).
ЁЯФд SessionIdstring uuidA session is a temporary auth token (ADR-0041) for a visitor or customer, used to bind carts and track the user across devices.
ЁЯФд OfferIdstring uuidA purchasable offer with its own price (HubRise: SKU).
ЁЯФд OrderIdstring uuid
ЁЯФд CustomerIdstring uuid
ЁЯФд CorrelationIdstring uuidCorrelates a command with the events/state it produces. Returned by every mutation payload so the client can track the outcome via the read side (matches domain_events.correlation_id).
ЁЯФд CauseIdstring uuidCausation id: the id of the message/event that directly caused this one (matches domain_events.cause_id). Threads a causeтЖТeffect chain through the log; null for a root command.
ЁЯФд MessageIdstring uuidUnique id of one command submission тАФ the idempotency key of the write path (command_journal pk, ADR-20260720-015300). Client-suppliable via MetadataInput; server-generated (UUIDv7) when absent. A replayed messageId with an identical payload acknowledges against the original; the same id with a different payload is rejected (Conflict). Events emitted by the command carry it as domain_events.cause_id.
ЁЯФд TraceIdstring ^[0-9a-f]{32}$W3C trace-id (from the inbound `traceparent` header, or server-started). Response-only technical tracing identifier тАФ never client-suppliable, never a substitute for correlationId (P-02).
ЁЯФд ExternalReferencestringExternal reference code (HubRise `ref`), unique within its scope. Used for idempotent import/sync and as a stable reference inside orders. Example: 'MARGHERITA', 'CAT-PIZZAS'.
ЁЯФд Slugstring ^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$URL-safe identifier for restaurants. Lowercase, dash-separated. Example: 'chez-marco', 'tokyo-sushi'.
ЁЯФд RestaurantDisplayNamestringPublic label shown to customers. Can be short and brand-oriented. Example: 'Chez Marco', 'Tokyo Sushi'.
ЁЯФд ProductNamestring
ЁЯФд OfferNamestringOffer label, unique within a product (HubRise SKU name). Example: 'Small', 'Large', 'Default'.
ЁЯФд OptionNamestring
ЁЯФд TagstringFree-form label (HubRise: tags). Example: 'vegan', 'spicy', 'eco'.
ЁЯФд EmailAddressstring email
ЁЯФд PhoneNumberstringCanonical E.164 phone (e.g. '+33612345678'). Composed server-side from DialingCode + NationalPhoneNumber and stored on events/views. Validation enforced at application level.
ЁЯФд AddressLinestring
ЁЯФд CityIdstring uuidA city Captain operates in тАФ the scope that anchors delivery routing config (CityDeliveryRanking) and, later, partner availability. First-class id (delivery dispatch strategy foundation, #60).
ЁЯФд PostalCodestring
ЁЯФд CountryCodestring ^[A-Z]{2}$ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Example: 'FR'.
ЁЯФд TimeZonestringIANA timezone. Example: 'Europe/Paris'.
ЁЯФд CurrencyCodestring ^[A-Z]{3}$ISO 4217 currency code. Example: 'EUR'.
ЁЯФд TaxRatePercentnumberPercentage tax rate. Example: 10.0 for 10%.
ЁЯФд QuantitynumberStock quantity in units. Decimals allowed to match HubRise inventory. 0 means out of stock.
ЁЯФд CustomerDisplayNamestring
ЁЯФд ServiceTypeenum (DELIVERY | COLLECTION)Aligned with HubRise service types. COLLECTION == customer pickup. (EAT_IN is not offered by Captain.Food but is kept in TaxRate for catalog fidelity.)
ЁЯФд DeliveryStatusenum (PENDING | ASSIGNED | PICKED_UP | OUT_FOR_DELIVERY | DELIVERED | FAILED | CANCELLED)Status of one delivery, reported by the partner (inbound) or driven by an independent rider's commands.
ЁЯФд OperationStatusenum (PENDING | SUCCEEDED | REJECTED | FAILED)Live status of a command/operation streamed by the operationStatusChanged subscription: PENDING (accepted, in flight), SUCCEEDED, REJECTED (business invariant), FAILED (technical error)."
ЁЯФд CommandJournalStatusenum (RECEIVED | SUCCEEDED | REJECTED | FAILED)Lifecycle of a journaled command: RECEIVED (durably accepted, handler spawned), then SUCCEEDED, REJECTED (business invariant) or FAILED (technical). Maps onto the API OperationStatus (RECEIVED тЖТ PENDING). A duplicate submission is an acceptance-response attribute, not a status тАФ the journal row keeps the original's real state.
ЁЯФд CommandChannelenum (GRAPHQL | WORKER | INTERNAL)Surface a journaled command arrived through: the GraphQL BFF dispatch, an on-app drain/enrichment worker (e.g. the HubRise enricher), or an internal trigger endpoint.
ЁЯФд InboundEventStatusenum (RECEIVED | DELIVERED | FAILED)Lifecycle of an adapted inbound business event (inbound_events row): RECEIVED (staged by the adapter ACL), DELIVERED (appended through the normal write path тАФ includes the aggregate's already-recorded no-op), FAILED (delivery error, left for retry/inspection).
ЁЯФд PaymentProcessStatusenum (AWAITING_PAYMENT_RESULT | ORDER_PLACED | FAILED)State of one PlaceOrderProcess checkout run (payment_process_manager row, keyed by cart).
ЁЯФд RefundProcessStatusenum (PENDING_APPROVAL | APPROVED_AWAITING_SETTLEMENT | DENIED | REFUNDED)State of one RefundProcess run (refund_process_manager row, keyed by order). Refunds are approved by the restaurant (own orders) or an admin.
ЁЯФд DeliveryDispatchProcessStatusenum (OFFERED | ACCEPTED | FAILED | COMPLETED | SELF_DISPATCHED)State of one DeliveryDispatchProcess run (delivery_dispatch_process_manager row, keyed by order). FAILED now marks the ranked channel walk exhausted (fail closed, rules.yaml#/DispatchExhaustionFailsClosed тАФ #60 supersedes the ADR-20260720-004556 numeric cap-3 framing). SELF_DISPATCHED is appended LAST to preserve the declaration-order ordinals of the pre-#60 values (ADR-0037)."
ЁЯФд RestaurantDispatchModeenum (CAPTAIN | RESTAURANT)Who is responsible for fulfilling a restaurant's deliveries (restaurant-scoped config, resolved at runtime; #60). Default CAPTAIN keeps today's behaviour.
ЁЯФд DeliveryChannelKindenum (POOL | PARTNER)Kind of a DeliveryChannelCatalog entry тАФ POOL (independent riders) vs PARTNER (adapter-backed). Every PARTNER channel must have a wired services.yaml delivery implementation (#60).
ЁЯФд Modeenum (LIVE | TEST)Whether an aggregate is production (LIVE) or a non-production TEST fixture coexisting in prod (ADR-0038, Stripe-`livemode`-style). Set at creation, immutable; absent = LIVE. TEST data is isolated from payouts, analytics and real notifications; a TEST order may target a LIVE restaurant to validate the real receipt path.
ЁЯФд UserTypeenum (PUBLIC | CUSTOMER | RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT | RESTAURANT | RIDER | ADMIN | EXTERNAL)
тЫФ Errors (10)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
тЫФ UnauthorizedNo valid authentication for this path/role.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз You must be signed in to do this.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Vous devez ├кtre connect├й pour effectuer cette action.тАФ
тЫФ ForbiddenAuthenticated, but not allowed to act on this resource (e.g. not the owner).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз You are not allowed to perform this action.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Vous n'├кtes pas autoris├й ├а effectuer cette action.тАФ
тЫФ ValidationErrorInput failed schema validation (type, format, required, bounds).ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз The field '{field}' is invalid.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Le champ '{field}' est invalide.тАФ
тЫФ ConflictConcurrent modification (optimistic-concurrency version clash); retry.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз This item was modified meanwhile. Please retry.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Cet ├йl├йment a ├йt├й modifi├й entre-temps. Veuillez r├йessayer.тАФ
тЫФ RateLimitedToo many requests on this path.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Too many requests. Please slow down.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Trop de requ├кtes. Veuillez patienter.тАФ
тЫФ InternalUnexpected server error.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Something went wrong on our side.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Une erreur est survenue de notre c├┤t├й.тАФ
тЫФ RestaurantNotFoundNo restaurant with this id.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Restaurant not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Restaurant introuvable.ЁЯУй ActivateRestaurant, ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurant, ЁЯУй DeactivateRestaurant, ЁЯУй ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode, ЁЯУй RemoveRestaurant, ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile, ЁЯУй MarkRestaurantClosed, ЁЯУй ClaimRestaurantListing, ЁЯУй OptOutRestaurantListing, ЁЯУй ChangeRestaurantListingStatus, ЁЯУй ConfigureGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink, ЁЯУй VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink, ЁЯУй CreateCatalog, ЁЯУй MarkRestaurantAsFavorite
тЫФ NoEditableFieldProvidedUpdate command carried no editable field.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Provide at least one field to update.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Indiquez au moins un champ ├а modifier.ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurantAccount, ЁЯУй UpdateRestaurant, ЁЯУй UpdateCustomerInfo, ЁЯУй UpdateRiderInfo
тЫФ OfferNotFoundNo offer with this id in the catalog.ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Product offer not found.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Offere de produit introuvable.ЁЯУй UpdateOfferStock, ЁЯУй AddCartLine
тЫФ PaymentEventOrphanedA Stripe payment outcome (capture or failure) references a PaymentIntent that matches no known checkout run. The inbound fact stays recorded on the Payment, but the process manager aborts and surfaces this error for ops attention (money may have been taken with no order to materialize) тАФ an anomaly is never silently skipped. ЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Payment event received for an unknown checkout.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ ├Йv├йnement de paiement re├зu pour un checkout inconnu.тАФ
ЁЯУб Observability (4)
тЦ╕Contract: ЁЯУб command-acceptanceЁЯФЧ #obs-command-acceptance
criticality: high
workflow: surface graphql (dispatch pipeline)
emits: тАФ ┬╖ inbound: тАФ
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idcommand.correlation_idтЬЕтАФ
trace_idotel.trace_idтЬЕтАФ
message_idcommand.message_idтЬЕтАФ
command_typecommand.typeтЬЕтАФ
channeljournal.channelтЬЕтАФ
spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
command.receiveSERVERтЬЕтАФbusiness.command_type*, business.actor*, business.channel*
command.journalINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.message_id*, business.journal_status*
command.dispatchINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.message_id*, business.dispatch_outcome*
metrics: commands_accepted_total (counter), command_duplicates_total (counter), command_sync_conflicts_total (counter), command_completion_ms (histogram) ┬╖ business: тАФ
success тЗР spans: command.receive, command.journal, command.dispatch
SLOs: p95 тЙд 150ms ┬╖ p99 тЙд 400ms ┬╖ error тЙд 0.5%
тЦ╕Contract: ЁЯУб stripe-webhook-ingestionЁЯФЧ #obs-stripe-webhook-ingestion
criticality: high
workflow:
emits: тАФ ┬╖ inbound: тЪб PaymentCaptured, тЪб PaymentFailed, тЪб PaymentRefunded
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idinbound.correlation_idтЬЕтАФ
trace_idotel.trace_idтЬЕтАФ
inbound_event_idinbound.inbound_event_idтЬЕтАФ
external_event_idstripe.event_idтЬЕтАФ
spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
webhook.verifySERVERтЬЕтАФbusiness.source*, business.signature_status*
external.persistINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.external_event_id*, business.dedupe*
acl.translateINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.event_type*
inbound.persistINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.inbound_event_id*
inbound.drain.deliverCONSUMERтЬЕтАФbusiness.inbound_event_id*, business.delivery_outcome*
event.store.appendINTERNALтЬЕтАФbusiness.event_type*, business.stream_id*
metrics: stripe_webhook_ingest_duration_ms (histogram), inbound_drain_lag_ms (histogram) ┬╖ business: inbound_events_staged_total (counter), inbound_events_delivered_total (counter), webhook_duplicates_total (counter)
success тЗР spans: webhook.verify, external.persist, acl.translate, inbound.persist, inbound.drain.deliver, event.store.append
SLOs: p95 тЙд 1000ms ┬╖ p99 тЙд 3000ms ┬╖ error тЙд 1%

ЁЯУ▒ Customer screens (SDUI) ЁЯФЧ

Server-Driven UI screens (customer_screens.yaml, ADR-0033). Per screen, the reads (resolversтЖТqueries) and writes (actionsтЖТmutations) are $ref-bound to the GraphQL API and validated тАФ the mockups are the proof the API answers the UI. тЪая╕П marks gaps the API does not serve yet; ЁЯЪл screens are intentionally not SDUI-rendered.

тЦ╕Screen: ЁЯУ▒ home / ЁЯУ▒ SDUIЁЯФЧ
ЁЯУ▒ Home ┬╖ /
┬лtopbar┬╗
hero_search_bar Search restaurants or dishesтАж
horizontal_scroll
section What are you craving?
section Featured near you
section All restaurants
cta_banner Are you a restaurant?
┬лcart_fab┬╗
┬лbottom_nav┬╗
UI needGraphQL operation
readpromotions.activeтЪая╕П No promotions/deals query тАФ HubRise deals not modelled in V0 (home promo banners).
readcategories.allЁЯФО categories
readrestaurants.featuredЁЯФО restaurants
readrestaurants.allЁЯФО restaurants

Gaps

  • тЪая╕П `promotions.active` (promo banners) has no backing query тАФ deals deferred.
тЦ╕Screen: ЁЯУ▒ search /search ЁЯУ▒ SDUIЁЯФЧ
ЁЯУ▒ Search ┬╖ /search
┬лtopbar┬╗
search_bar_active Restaurants, dishes, cuisinesтАж
conditional_section
┬лbottom_nav┬╗
UI needGraphQL operation
readrestaurants.searchЁЯФО restaurants
readcategories.allЁЯФО categories
readdishes.searchтЪая╕П No dish/product search query тАФ only restaurant search (queries/restaurants) exists.

Gaps

  • тЪая╕П `dishes.search` (the "Dishes" results) has no backing query тАФ only restaurant search exists.

readcatalog.byRestaurantЁЯФО catalog
writetoggle_favoriteтЬПя╕П markRestaurantAsFavorite

cart_lines
promo_code_input Promo code
delivery_mode_toggle
order_summary_block
minimum_order_warning
sticky_bottom_bar
UI needGraphQL operation
readcart.currentЁЯФО cart
writechange_cart_line_quantityтЬПя╕П changeCartLineQuantity
writeapply_promo_codeтЪая╕П No applyPromoCode mutation тАФ promo codes / cart discount not modelled.
writeset_delivery_modeтЪая╕П Cart-level delivery-mode toggle not modelled тАФ serviceType is chosen at placeOrder.

Gaps

  • тЪая╕П `apply_promo_code` action + cart.discount/promoCode have no backing mutation тАФ promo codes not modelled.
  • тЪая╕П `set_delivery_mode` action has no backing mutation тАФ serviceType is chosen at placeOrder, not stored on the cart.

ЁЯМР Translations ЁЯФЧ

The i18n catalog (translations.yaml) тАФ every screen string, referenced by $ref, generated to one translations.generated.json. {param} tokens are validated against declared params.

KeyParamsenfr
ЁЯМР common.nav.homeтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз HomeЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Accueil
ЁЯМР common.nav.searchтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз SearchЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Recherche

ЁЯМР common.nav.accountтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз AccountЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Compte

ЁЯМР common.action.changeтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз ChangeЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Modifier
ЁЯМР common.action.applyтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз ApplyЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Appliquer
ЁЯМР common.action.submitтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз SubmitЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Envoyer

ЁЯМР location.titleтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Delivery addressЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Adresse de livraison
ЁЯМР location.search_placeholderтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Search for an addressтАжЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Rechercher une adresseтАж

ЁЯМР auth.titleтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Sign in or create accountЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Se connecter ou cr├йer un compte
ЁЯМР auth.bodyтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Enter your phone number to continue. No password needed.ЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Entrez votre num├йro de t├йl├йphone pour continuer. Aucun mot de passe requis.
ЁЯМР auth.phone_labelтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Phone numberЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Num├йro de t├йl├йphone
ЁЯМР auth.continueтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз ContinueЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Continuer

ЁЯМР auth.resendтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Resend codeЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Renvoyer le code

ЁЯМР partner.applyтАФЁЯЗмЁЯЗз Apply to joinЁЯЗлЁЯЗ╖ Postuler
ЁЯПЫя╕П Architecture (C4) ЁЯФЧ
system: Captain.Food тАФ Local-first food ordering & delivery for independent restaurants and food trucks (V0: Tours).

ЁЯФ▓ L2 тАФ Bounded contexts

ContextDescriptionAggregates / process managers
ЁЯФ▓ restaurantRestaurant provider domain: accounts, locations, lifecycle, order-acceptance mode (incl. catalog & order-fulfilment operations performed by restaurant staff).ЁЯОн RestaurantAccount, ЁЯОн Restaurant, ЁЯОн Prospect
ЁЯФ▓ catalogCatalog tree, products, offers (SKUs), option lists, per-offer stock; HubRise import.ЁЯОн Catalog
ЁЯФ▓ orderCart selection тЖТ checkout тЖТ order lifecycle, incl. the checkout & refund sagas (the V0 risk point: external Stripe).ЁЯОн Cart, ЁЯОн Order, ЁЯОн Payment ┬╖ ЁЯУж PlaceOrderProcess, ЁЯУж RefundProcess
ЁЯФ▓ customerCustomer-facing consumer domain: discovery/browse, identity (phone-keyed), favorites, profile, address book, cart & ordering use-cases; cart binding.ЁЯОн Customer ┬╖ ЁЯУж CartBindingProcess
ЁЯФ▓ deliveryDelivery fulfilment: dispatch of ready DELIVERY orders to a partner (Avelo37) and/or independent riders, courier assignment, status tracking to hand-over (ADR-0031).ЁЯОн DeliveryJob, ЁЯОн Rider ┬╖ ЁЯУж DeliveryDispatchProcess

ЁЯз▒ L2 тАФ Containers

ContainerTechnologyDescription
ЁЯз▒ web-clientLeptos (Rust тЖТ WASM), Crux core, SSR+hydrationCustomer mobile-first web client (SDUI renderer, ADR-0033/0034); multi-tenant via {restaurantSlug}.captain.food.
ЁЯз▒ web-restaurantLeptos (Rust тЖТ WASM), Crux coreRestaurant web app/dashboard: onboarding (incl. Google Business Profile 'Order online' setup тАФ ADR-019), catalog, order queue, payouts (/restaurant-account/graphql, /restaurant/graphql).
ЁЯз▒ web-adminLeptos (Rust тЖТ WASM), Crux corePlatform back-office for Captain.Food staff (/admin/graphql): restaurant approvals, pre-registration pipeline, ops.
ЁЯз▒ desktop-restaurantTauri 2.0 shell + Leptos + Crux core (Rust)Restaurant-manager desktop app (ADR-0034): the web-restaurant UI in a native shell, same Rust core in-process.
ЁЯз▒ mobile-customerSwiftUI (iOS) / Jetpack Compose (Android) thin shells тЖТ Crux core via UniFFI (Rust)Customer mobile app (post-V0); thin native UI over the shared Rust core (ADR-0034); same GraphQL API (/customer/graphql, /public/graphql).
ЁЯз▒ mobile-restaurantSwiftUI / Jetpack Compose thin shells тЖТ Crux core via UniFFI (Rust)Restaurant-staff mobile app (post-V0): order queue, accept/ready (/restaurant/graphql).
ЁЯз▒ mobile-riderSwiftUI / Jetpack Compose thin shells тЖТ Crux core via UniFFI (Rust)Delivery-rider mobile app (post-V0): assigned deliveries + status updates (/rider/graphql).
ЁЯз▒ apiRust тАФ Axum + Tokio + SQLx + async-graphql (BFF over the Crux core)CQRS-light write+read API (ADR-0034). Hosts command handlers, projections, GraphQL gateway. Role = path (/{role}/graphql).
realizes: ЁЯОн RestaurantAccount, ЁЯОн Restaurant, ЁЯОн Prospect, ЁЯОн Catalog, ЁЯОн Cart, ЁЯОн Order, ЁЯОн Customer, ЁЯУж PlaceOrderProcess, ЁЯУж RefundProcess, ЁЯУж CartBindingProcess, ЁЯОн DeliveryJob, ЁЯУж DeliveryDispatchProcess
ЁЯз▒ event-storeManaged PostgreSQL (e.g. Supabase)Append-only domain_events table (the write model / source of truth at runtime).
ЁЯз▒ read-modelsManaged PostgreSQLDenormalized View_* projection tables fed from the event log; queries read here, never domain_events.
ЁЯз▒ sync-workerScheduled worker (GitHub Actions cron + Rust binary, shared Crux core)Restaurant listing sync (ADR-0020): polls INSEE Sirene + Google Maps and, via the ACL, calls the api's RegisterRestaurant / UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile / MarkRestaurantClosed as the owner. Prospection scoring/outreach is a later step.
ЁЯз▒ bamProjection workerBusiness Activity Monitoring projector тАФ consumes the same event stream to answer business questions.
ЁЯз▒ otel-collectorOpenTelemetry CollectorReceives traces/metrics/logs from the api and bam containers; exports to the backend(s).

ЁЯФМ L2 тАФ External systems

SystemDescription
ЁЯФМ stripePayments (PaymentIntent capture, refunds); later Stripe Connect.
ЁЯФМ hubriseExisting restaurant catalog/orders systems; import via the Anti-Corruption Layer.
ЁЯФМ delivery-partnerDelivery partner (e.g. Avelo37): dispatch delivery jobs out, receive courier/status facts inbound via the avelo37-acl (ADR-0031).
ЁЯФМ supabase-authPasswordless OTP identity for customers (not a domain concern).
ЁЯФМ sireneINSEE Sirene / Recherche d'Entreprises (Etalab open data): SIRET, name, address, NAF, active/closed. Seeds listings via the ACL.
ЁЯФМ google-mapsGoogle Maps Places / Business Profile: rating, reviews, hours, phone, website, place id, and the 'Order online' link (ADR-0021). Enrichment + ownership proof.
ЁЯФМ hubspotCRM for B2B prospection leads (ADR-0020); post-V0.
ЁЯФМ resendTransactional email for prospection outreach sequences (ADR-0020); post-V0.
ЁЯФМ slackOps/prospection alerts (active-partner closures, sequence events); post-V0.

тЮбя╕П L2 тАФ Relationships

EdgeDescription
web-client тЖТ apiGraphQL over HTTPS (/customer/graphql, /public/graphql)
web-restaurant тЖТ apiGraphQL (/restaurant-account/graphql, /restaurant/graphql)
web-admin тЖТ apiGraphQL (/admin/graphql)
desktop-restaurant тЖТ apiGraphQL (/restaurant-account/graphql, /restaurant/graphql) тАФ Tauri shell
mobile-customer тЖТ apiGraphQL (/customer/graphql, /public/graphql) тАФ post-V0
mobile-restaurant тЖТ apiGraphQL (/restaurant/graphql) тАФ post-V0
mobile-rider тЖТ apiGraphQL (/rider/graphql) тАФ post-V0
api тЖТ event-storeAppend domain events (command side)
api тЖТ read-modelsRead projections (query side) + projection updates
api тЖТ stripeCreate PaymentIntents, request refunds; receive webhooks (inbound facts)
api тЖТ hubriseImport catalog / sync inventory via ACL (inbound facts)
api тЖТ supabase-authOTP verify / session (out of domain)
api тЖТ delivery-partnerDispatch delivery jobs; receive courier acceptance/status webhooks (inbound facts) тАФ ADR-0031
sync-worker тЖТ sirenePoll establishments (SIRET/NAF/address/closures)
sync-worker тЖТ google-mapsFetch Business Profile data (rating/reviews/hours/website)
sync-worker тЖТ apiRegister/enrich/close listings + record prospect contacts via the ACL (/external/graphql)
api тЖТ google-mapsVerify restaurant ownership (GBP) for claim/opt-out
sync-worker тЖТ hubspotCreate/update prospection leads (ADR-0020)
sync-worker тЖТ resendSend prospection outreach emails (ADR-0020)
sync-worker тЖТ slackProspection / ops alerts (ADR-0020)
bam тЖТ event-storeConsume the event stream for business metrics
api тЖТ otel-collectorExport traces/metrics/logs (OTLP)
bam тЖТ otel-collectorExport traces/metrics/logs (OTLP)

тЪЩя╕П L3 тАФ Components of the api container

ComponentInstrumentedDescriptionBinds
тЪЩя╕П graphql-gatewayЁЯУб yesPer-role GraphQL endpoint (/{role}/graphql); applies the @auth/@public ACL; entry span (SERVER).тАФ
тЪЩя╕П observability-middlewareЁЯУб yesAttaches business.* attributes + correlation/cause ids to spans; structured JSON logging; the only place domain context meets OTel.тАФ
тЪЩя╕П command-busЁЯУб yesDispatches commands to handlers; span 'command.receive'/'command.validate'/'command.handle'.тАФ
тЪЩя╕П command-handlersтАФ noOne handler per aggregate; validates invariants then appends events. Pure domain тАФ NOT instrumented.handles ЁЯОн RestaurantAccount, ЁЯОн Restaurant, ЁЯОн Prospect, ЁЯОн Catalog, ЁЯОн Cart, ЁЯОн Order, ЁЯОн Customer, ЁЯОн DeliveryJob
тЪЩя╕П process-managersЁЯУб yesSagas coordinating aggregates + externals (checkout, refund, cart binding, delivery dispatch).handles ЁЯУж PlaceOrderProcess, ЁЯУж RefundProcess, ЁЯУж CartBindingProcess, ЁЯУж DeliveryDispatchProcess
тЪЩя╕П event-store-adapterЁЯУб yesAppends to domain_events; span 'event.store.append' with business.event_type/stream_id.тАФ
тЪЩя╕П event-publisherЁЯУб yesPublishes appended events to the bus; span 'event.publish' (PRODUCER).тАФ
тЪЩя╕П message-consumersЁЯУб yesConsume domain + inbound integration events; span 'event.consume.*' (CONSUMER).тАФ
тЪЩя╕П projection-updatersЁЯУб yesUpdate the View_* read models from events; span 'event.consume.projection'.updates ЁЯЧДя╕П View_RestaurantAccount, ЁЯЧДя╕П Restaurant, ЁЯЧДя╕П Customer, ЁЯЧДя╕П Catalog, ЁЯЧДя╕П Cart, ЁЯЧДя╕П OrderTracking, ЁЯЧДя╕П ProspectionPipeline, ЁЯЧДя╕П View_DeliveryJob
тЪЩя╕П bam-projectorЁЯУб yesBusiness Activity Monitoring projection (runs in the bam container); business_metrics only.тАФ
тЪЩя╕П hubrise-aclЁЯУб yesAnti-Corruption Layer translating HubRise payloads (SKU/option_list/'9.80 EUR') into the domain.тАФ
тЪЩя╕П stripe-adapterЁЯУб yesStripe Connect (Separate Charges & Transfers, transfer_group=ORDER_{id}; Captain = merchant of record): creates the PaymentIntent for the buyer total, then after capture transfers restaurantPayout/riderPayout to the connected accounts (3-way split, ADR-0017), keeping captainNet on the platform; refunds reverse the transfers. Records inbound webhook facts (PaymentCaptured/Failed/Refunded).тАФ
тЪЩя╕П supabase-aclЁЯУб yesAnti-Corruption Layer wrapping Supabase Auth (ADR-0015): sends/verifies phone OTP (Twilio; mock in dev) and email magic links SYNCHRONOUSLY, validates tokens server-side, and translates the Supabase user (id/phone/email) into the domain (authRef). Keeps the Supabase SDK out of the aggregates.тАФ
тЪЩя╕П sirene-google-aclЁЯУб yesAnti-Corruption Layer translating INSEE Sirene + Google Maps data into Restaurant commands (RegisterRestaurant / UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile / MarkRestaurantClosed) as the owner, and validating Google Business Profile ownership proofs for claim/opt-out (ADR-0019/0021). Keeps Sirene/Google SDKs out of the aggregate.тАФ
тЪЩя╕П prospection-aclЁЯУб yesB2B prospection worker (ADR-0020): reads the COMPUTED score from ProspectionPipeline, applies the J+0/J+7/J+21 schedule + anti-spam, fires HubSpot/Resend/Slack, then issues RecordProspectContact / MarkProspectCold to record the facts. The score is never an input it stores back.тАФ
тЪЩя╕П avelo37-aclЁЯУб yesAnti-Corruption Layer for the delivery partner (Avelo37; ADR-0031): on DeliveryRequested, dispatches the job to the partner API; translates the partner's webhooks into the inbound facts DeliveryAcceptedByPartner / DeliveryRejectedByPartner / DeliveryStatusUpdated (idempotent on partnerRef). Keeps the partner SDK out of the domain; mirrors stripe-adapter.тАФ
тЪЩя╕П coopcycle-aclЁЯУб yesAnti-Corruption Layer for the CoopCycle delivery federation (issue #58, ADR-20260721-122910): the third PARTNER seam, mirroring avelo37-acl. FEDERATION тАФ CoopCycle is many self-hosted co-op instances, so the outbound offer_job resolves a job to an instance (per-instance base URL + OAuth2 client-credentials, env-gated) and each instance's verified webhook (per-instance secret) is translated into the same inbound facts DeliveryAcceptedByPartner / DeliveryRejectedByPartner / DeliveryStatusUpdated (idempotent on partnerRef). Keeps the partner SDK out of the domain.тАФ
ЁЯЧ║я╕П System map (interactive) ЁЯФЧ

Drill in: System тЖТ container тЖТ bounded context тЖТ aggregate flow. Boxes are colored by kind (containers/aggregates teal, externals orange, contexts gold, commands yellow, events purple, views blue). Click to go deeper; leaf boxes jump to their section; use тЧА back to climb out.
